name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: the next phase of our campaign to flip PA blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're still missing your response...
#
Derek,
We came to you seven days ago to ask if you'd please take just a sec to share your thoughts with our team as part of our official Post-Election Day Focus Group.
**That said, it looks like we don't have a response on file for you just yet!**
[**Will you please share your feedback about our campaign strategy by entering our Post-Election Day Focus Group before it closes? We'll only be able to accept additional responses for a few more days before reporting the findings to John, so we hope you'll add your thoughts today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211117-3503&t=1&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)
_[John Fetterman is running a true 67 County campaign strategy across the Commonwealth to reach every voter in every county — no matter how red or blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211117-3503&t=2&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)_
[Do you agree with John’s campaign strategy to organize everywhere — urban, suburban, AND rural?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211117-3503&t=3&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)
Select your answer: Yes No Unsure
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211117-3503&t=4&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)**
Not to be alarmist, Derek, but we simply can't afford to let Democrats get shellacked in the midterms. Our House AND Senate majorities are at stake.
We can't risk a repeat of the Virginia election results — especially since President Biden won Pennsylvania by a _muuuuch_ smaller margin here than VA.
History tells us that we can't simply go on autopilot and still expect to win this race to flip Pennsylvania. We have to throw out old, outdated playbooks. **We have to run a different kind of campaign, with a sharp strategy that's informed by YOU — the grassroots supporters on the ground across the Commonwealth.**
Essentially, the more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters in our Focus Group, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat.
**So, will you please take a few minutes to participate in our Post-Election Day Focus Group?** **[You can click here or use your own custom link to begin!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211117-3503&t=5&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)**
[https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211117-3503&t=6&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211117-3503&t=7&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)**
Thanks a ton,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211117-3503-footer&t=8&refcode2=3503_434096_CCOGAQ&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3503%2E434096%2ECCOGAQ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: RESPONSE REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: 16 more responses requested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to COVER UP the truth about the Capitol insurrection?
2O,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED TO HIT MY GOAL: | | | **BREAKING NEWS: Steve Bannon indicted for defying Jan. 6 committee investigation**

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED:**

We're LIVID.

Steve Bannon and his right-wing cronies are still dead set on BLOCKING critical investigations into Jan. 6.

But we need to know this grassroots team will continue to hold insurrectionists accountable.

**So tell us: Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to COVER UP the truth about the Capitol insurrection?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr~)
---|---|---

We're OUTRAGED.

_Trump 's right-wing cronies are BLOCKING every attempt to hold insurrectionists accountable for their actions on January 6 -- one of the darkest days in American history._

They've tried to **STOP** a bipartisan investigation.

They've **DISMISSED** the seriousness of that day.

**And now, top Trump cronies -- -****_like Steve Bannon _****\- are using every loophole and trick in the book to stop the truth from coming to light. ******

It's disgusting, but we're not surprised.

Republicans have made it perfectly clear that they have no regard for the truth, integrity, _or our democracy_.

**But we want to make sure this grassroots team stands firm in their conviction to hold insurrectionists accountable.**
**So please tell us: do you CONDEMN Steve Bannon and Republicans for their schemes to OBSTRUCT the truth?** | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr~)
---|---|---
****
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45959363&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTk5MDg2MQS2&l=14173003&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45959363&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTk5MDg2MQS2&l=14173003&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

subject: Final Notice ⚠️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Nick's email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

This morning, our Campaign Manager Nick reached out about the reaction to
Beto's big announcement. It's just been two days since Beto announced our
run for Governor — and the response has been overwhelming!

We're so grateful that folks across Texas, from Laredo to Dallas, are
joining this people-powered movement to defeat Greg Abbott and build a
bigger, bolder vision for Texas. Every $3 donation, social media post, and
volunteer sign-up is proof that Texans are ready for change.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211117-162994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=162994%2E444211%2E9AXVX5 ]If you can, will you read Nick's message below, then chip in
$3 or more? Donations in these first few days are critical
to continuing this momentum all the way to Election Day.

This
election is bigger than any one headline or any one person, it's about all
of us working together to create the change we want to see.

Thank you,

Team Beto

----Forwarded message----
Date: November 17, 2021
Sender: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
Subject line: Look at these headlines

Hi I’m Nick, Beto’s
Campaign Manager.

And if there’s one takeaway from the press we’ve received since Beto
announced this campaign, it’s this: there’s major grassroots momentum
fueling our campaign. Just look at these headlines:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211117-162994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=162994%2E444211%2E9AXVX5 ]The Texas Tribune headline

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211117-162994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=162994%2E444211%2E9AXVX5 ]El Paso Times headline

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211117-162994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=162994%2E444211%2E9AXVX5 ]Dallas Morning News headline

We have what it takes to elect Beto as Governor and put Texas back on
track. But the strength
of our grassroots fundraising in the first 72 hours of this campaign is
going to be make-or-break for us in terms of how many staffers we can
hire, how many volunteers we can recruit, and how many voters we can
reach.

Simply put, we can’t afford to slow down right now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211117-162994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=162994%2E444211%2E9AXVX5 ]Can you help keep up our momentum? Make a $3
contribution today to help us finish the first 72 hours of this campaign
strong.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49642?refcode=ema20211117-162994&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=162994%2E444211%2E9AXVX5 ]Contribute $3

If we’re going to win against Greg Abbott, we’re all going to have to work
together to sustain our campaign all the way until Election Day 2022.
You’re a critical part of this movement, and we’re grateful you’re here.

Thank you,

Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=162994%2E444211%2E9AXVX5

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mike Pompeo, 70th United States Secretary of State
Date: Sun, Nov 14, 2021 at 7:51 AM
Subject: 75 Patriots needed by 11:59 PM
**URGENT MESSAGE:** **FROM THE DESK OF
70TH UNITED STATES SECRETARY OF STATE
MIKE POMPEO**

_Despite being one of our top Trump Patriots, our records show that you haven’t chipped in yet. _

Normally, we would let it slide... but I just got off the phone with our House Republican Finance Team, and to be honest the news isn’t good. **WE’RE SHORT OF OUR NOVEMBER MID-MONTH FUNDRAISING TARGET BY JUST 75 TRUMP PATRIOTS.**

**_[I need 75 Patriots to STEP UP and help restore a Conservative Majority in Congress. Can I count on you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vpiq-1lb34-4qqlpo1/ "I need 75 Patriots to STEP UP and help restore a Conservative Majority in Congress. Can I count on you, Fellow Conservative?")_**

---
| | | [TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vpiq-1lb35-4qqlpo2/ "TAKE BACK THE HOUSE")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vpiq-1lb36-4qqlpo3/)
---
| | | **NOVEMBER MID-MONTH SUPPORTER STATUS: MISSING **

**PATRIOT ID:** 43567

**MID-MONTH DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT**

---
| | | | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vpiq-1lb37-4qqlpo4/ "CHIP IN NOW")
---

I hope we haven’t lost you to the Radical Left. Their senseless and irrational policies are tearing our great nation apart. From the crippling cost of living, to rampant crime, the _**Socialist Left is determined to DESTROY our country. **_

**But if you are no longer interested in supporting America, please ignore this email. **

We must fight our hardest to defeat Nancy Pelosi and her liberal band of minions’ Socialist agenda; we **cannot** give up. Because allowing the Left to sabotage our country’s principles is NOT an option.

**[If you still care about this country and you’re willing to join me in the fight, use your personal link to chip in before midnight tonight!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vpiq-1lb38-4qqlpo5/ "If you still care about this country and you’re willing to join me in the fight, use your personal link to chip in before midnight tonight!")**

Fighting for our future,

Mike Pompeo
70th United States Secretary of State

|
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vpiq-1lb39-4qqlpo6/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vpiq-1lb3a-4qqlpo6/ "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

"That’s why we unlocked 9X-Match for TOP PATRIOTS like you who chipped in BEFORE MIDNIGHT." | | | "900% MATCH DONATE ASAP" As Mike Pompeo said, we’re dangerously close to MISSING our goal and we’re relying on YOU to get us to the finish line. Reaching our goal before this critical deadline is the only way we’ll WIN targeted, toss-up battleground races in make-or-break elections across the nation. The Red Wave is here. But we have to keep our momentum building. This is our ONLY chance to fire Pelosi and take back the House – we’re just five seats away. Failure is NOT an option. | | | | What's Jack doing in November?
---
Taping the video, “Who I am. Why I’m Running.” at his family’s ranch, homesteaded by his grandfather.
Hosting a pizza party for high schoolers about the importance of voting, how to register and to hear what issues are most important to them.
Coaching masters ski racers at Red Lodge Mountain and Big Sky
Bird-hunting with his family and Percy (of course).
Attending campaign events in Bridger, Stevensville, Bozeman and elsewhere across the state.
Enjoying Thanksgiving dinner with friends and family.
_Check BallardforMontana.com for places and events where you can MEET JACK._

IF YOU WOULD LIKE HIM TO SPEAK AT YOUR GATHERING, LIVE OR BY ZOOM, . | | I’ll represent all Montanans and work hard to find balanced solutions. -Jack Ballard (from his “Straight Talk - Slack Line” video) | Follow Jack on , , and . | | | HOW YOU CAN HELP JACK WIN: | | | to his campaign ---|--- | | Join the JACK PACK! (volunteer) ---|--- | | Host an event ---|--- | | Follow Jack on social media and share his posts with your friends. ---|--- | | Visit with your friends and neighbors about Jack ---|--- | | | Contact Jack: PO Box 2249 Red Lodge, MT 59068 tel:+4064221333 mailto:campaign@ballardformontana.com | | | | What's Jack doing in November? Taping the video, “Who I am. Why I’m Running.” at his family’s ranch, homesteaded by his grandfather. Hosting a pizza party for high schoolers about the importance of voting, how to register and to hear what issues are most important to them. Coaching masters ski racers at Red Lodge Mountain and Big Sky Bird-hunting with his family and Percy (of course). Attending campaign events in Bridger, Stevensville, Bozeman and elsewhere across the state. Enjoying Thanksgiving dinner with friends and family. Check BallardforMontana.com for places and events where you can MEET JACK.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Pres. Trump Turns up Heat on AZ AG Brnovich
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Catch the perps |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f3d1b5d62c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump-endorsed Election Integrity Patriot running for Secretary of State in Arizona. I have been leading the Vanguard in America’s audit and [now it is time to take the next step.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=048531da8d&e=44b8c466b0)

**We found the fraud. Time to Act on it. It’s your turn to do YOUR job, Mark Brnovich.**

_And this is exactly the message which President Trump told America this week:_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7f8c3e64c0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| In President Trump’s statement, he says:

_The great Patriots of Arizona are anxiously awaiting the Attorney General’s review of the large-scale Election Fraud that took place during the 2020 Presidential Election. The findings of the Forensic Audit Report were clear and conclusive. The results from the Congressional Election Integrity hearing that just took place in Washington, D.C., upon cross examination, were devastating to the other side. The Arizona Legislature (and other States!) should, at a minimum, decertify the Election. The American people deserve an answer, now!_

President Trump couldn’t be more right: We need an answer, now!

**The pressure which we have put on Brnovich thus far has caused him to take a crucial first step.**

_Just recently, he formally opened up an inquiry into the fraud that happened in the 2020 election._

**_But I stand by President Trump when I say this: If the perpetrators behind Arizona’s fraud do not end up in jail, then Mark Brnovich is as guilty as they are._**

_Help me and President Trump keep up the pressure on Arizona’s AG by a donation today! We need the warchest at this critical moment to go on the offense and make sure that Mark Brnovich doesn’t forget where he comes from!_
_“The Findings of the Forensic Audit Report were clear and conclusive.” – President Trump_
The audit showed fraud, and now it is Mark Brnovich’s job to prosecute. And the work will not be done until big names end up behind bars.

**This is the punishment for undermining America’s elections. Period.**

[And this is why I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=07a11c83f3&e=44b8c466b0) For America to heal and for election integrity to be restored, exactly two things need to happen.

**For the first, we need punishment of past crimes. Otherwise, the Leftist thieves are INCENTIVIZED to keep stealing. **

_Second, we need a clear path forward. And to have this clear path forward, we need Secretary of States, especially in key states such as Arizona, that support Election Integrity and will stand up to fraud._

[This is where you come in. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=79f8f4bbec&e=44b8c466b0) We have ran a tremendous grassroots campaign bringing together patriots around the country. And the more attention on Election Integrity, the more the media, Big Tech, and the Leftist Establishment wants to stop us.

**_I need your help to bring Election Integrity to Arizona and to defend our elections. [Can you help me today so that I can help Republicans and President Trump in 2024?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e6bc84eb57&e=44b8c466b0)_**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am proud to be the Election Integrity, Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona. We are all in this together. If you have already joined the Election Integrity movement, thank you and [please continue to support us, we need all the help we can get.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=42cad9837b&e=44b8c466b0)

**If you have been wondering about how to support the cause of Election Integrity, follow President Trump. He has supported our campaign and our fight for Election Integrity in Arizona. [Help us now so that I can fight for secure elections going forward – especially in 2024 – in Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2b6caef40f&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3a950f34ce&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5ae8719e8d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=476ac80156&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=944be70848) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=944be70848).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Biden loves illegals with all his wimpy heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Amnesty in his reconciliation bill |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=07d45a924a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I thought it was bad enough that Biden wanted to give illegals $450,000 each!

But now his reconciliation bill gives them amnesty, all illegally.

_It is now clear: Biden loves illegals, with all his heart. He wants this invasion!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=74c05caeb6&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area. This district was targeted by the NRCC- it's ripe for the taking!**

Joe Biden is sponsoring an invasion of America, consisting of millions of illegal immigrants.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2e35cd94dc&e=afa21b7626)
---
| FOX News reports on Biden's plans to invite an invasion of illegal immigrants:

_A provision in Democrats' Build Back Better social spending plan would grant parole to immigrants who entered the U.S. illegally more than 10 years ago to shield them from being deported.

The $1.75 trillion spending package introduced in the House on Thursday, which is expected to go to a vote Friday, includes a provision — Section 60001 — allowing the Secretary of Homeland Security (DHS) to grant five-year parole to certain immigrants who file for parole and pay an undisclosed administrative fee, as well as a background check "to the satisfaction of the Secretary of Homeland Security," until Sept. 30, 2031.

Parole would allow some 6.8 million immigrants who entered the United States before Jan. 1, 2011 — and have continued to live in the country since — to obtain travel and work permits, plus drivers' licenses or state identification cards.

DHS is currently required to grant parole to qualifying individuals entering the country, but this new provision would allow the secretary to offer parole to those who have already been living within U.S. borders for a decade or longer.

The provision also prohibits the DHS secretary from revoking an individual's parole unless the secretary "determines that the individual is ineligible for parole, based on the policies and implementing guidance that were in effect when the individual was initially granted parole."_

$450,000 per illegal entering the country.

7 million illegals getting amnesty by Biden.

_**Joe Biden is committing treason. He has invited an invading army of foreign nationals into our country to destroy it from within.**_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4b69b78d0b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Biden knows he can't win re-election with votes from Americans. So he's importing new voters.

And my Dem incumbent, Darren Soto, is cheering him along, rooting for amnesty!

This must be stopped. A country without borders is no country at all.**

[I will force Biden to close our border. We will repeal this odious reconciliation bill, as well as the "infrastructure" act. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3c47de93ce&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto hasn't cast one single vote to hold Biden accountable for this disaster. He wants open borders just like Biden!_

Right now, we need to defend our country against this traitor! [Help me get elected and put a stop on every bad idea Biden has!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4fd681c367&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d815b5bcc9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8c7b8ca11a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=035cdca511&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b16baa960e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=2fbf9aa564) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=2fbf9aa564).

name: Official GOP Interview Request
subject: INTERVIEW RE: Woke Democrats Changing Tactics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| ****
---
Official GOP Digital Interview Form

* * *
Interviewee Locator #: 937432
Name: Fellow Conservative
Subject: Woke Democrats Changing Tactics
Summary: **_Desperate not to lose their RAZOR-THIN House and Senate Majorities in the wake of the Virginia & New Jersey shakeups, Democrats are pulling out all the stops. Nancy Pelosi has "committed to bringing the fight to Republicans EACH AND EVERY DAY" -- and she's not the only one. _**

We need 2 more people from your city to give a digital interview.

name: RESPONSE REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Steve Bannon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to COVER UP the truth about the Capitol insurrection?
2O,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED TO HIT MY GOAL: | | | **BREAKING NEWS: Steve Bannon indicted for defying Jan. 6 committee investigation**

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED:**

We're LIVID.

Steve Bannon and his right-wing cronies are still dead set on BLOCKING critical investigations into Jan. 6.

But we need to know this grassroots team will continue to hold insurrectionists accountable.

**So tell us: Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their schemes to COVER UP the truth about the Capitol insurrection?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cv2G-)
---|---|---

We're OUTRAGED.

_Trump 's right-wing cronies are BLOCKING every attempt to hold insurrectionists accountable for their actions on January 6 -- one of the darkest days in American history._

They've tried to **STOP** a bipartisan investigation.

They've **DISMISSED** the seriousness of that day.

**And now, top Trump cronies -- -****_like Steve Bannon _****\- are using every loophole and trick in the book to stop the truth from coming to light. ******

It's disgusting, but we're not surprised.

Republicans have made it perfectly clear that they have no regard for the truth, integrity, _or our democracy_.

**But we want to make sure this grassroots team stands firm in their conviction to hold insurrectionists accountable.**
**So please tell us: do you CONDEMN Steve Bannon and Republicans for their schemes to OBSTRUCT the truth?** | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cv2G-)
---|---|---
****
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45960011&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMjAxMTQ0MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45960011&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMjAxMTQ0MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: Marc For Oregon
subject: Welcome!
body:
Welcome aboard, !

We are so glad to welcome you to the Marc for Oregon campaign. As a team, we are committed to serving Oregon and doing all we can to ensure our children have a bright future in our beautiful state.

We appreciate your support and encourage you to step up and join our fight to save Oregon! You will stay up to date on events, appearances and opportunities to get involved. We thank you for your support and look forward to working together in our battle for the future of Oregon.

Kind regards,
The Marc For Oregon Campaign

We thank you for your support and look forward to working together in our battle for the future of Oregon. Kind regards, The Marc For Oregon Campaign

name: Betsy Johnson
subject: Thanks for Joining Me!
body:
Thanks for Joining Me! , Thank you for adding your name to follow along
with our campaign. Taking on the entrenched two parties will be difficult
and expensive. Your support will allow me to build a first-rate campaign
organization necessary to win this election and change Oregon for the
better. Freed from the distraction of a primary election, I will formally
launch my campaign in early 2022. Next summer, I will be formally nominated
for Oregon Governor by the people through the power of their signatures. I
am grateful to have you on my side and in my corner. I hope you will follow
me on Facebook <https://www.facebook.com/StateSenatorBetsyJohnson/> and
spread the word about our campaign with your friends. Thank you for
caring for Oregon and our future. Sincerely, Betsy

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Democrats Are About to Raise Your Taxes, Again
body:
The warning signs cannot be ignored... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Democrats Are About to Raise Your Taxes, Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-j/)
Hold onto your wallets. Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are trying to raise your taxes again. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [What a Week!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-d/)
A lot to talk about in this week's blog. As always, I'll try to make it informative, and interesting. Let me know if I succeeded! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Another Brilliant Democrat Idea](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Democrats have given the American people a lot of reasons to vote them out of office at the next opportunity. Read about one more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Defending Taiwan](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-triyjrdl-kujkulhluu-n/)
China's actions against our critical ally Taiwan have gotten more and more provocative lately. Our goal is to defend Taiwan, but avoid a military confrontation with China if at all possible. How to accomplish both? Read about it in this week's blog. subject: Let’s Restore American Prosperity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, the Democrats have been pursuing far left policies that are destroying this country. Help us fight back to restore American prosperity.
Hi Peter, Due to the failures of the Democrat's agenda, the past several months have been tough for all of us.**Costs of everyday goods, groceries and gasoline have been rising, economic growth has been slower than expected, government spending has dramatically increased, and on the global stage we are seen as weak and not committed to defending our allies.**[**We can fix it, but we need your help to get the Democrats out of office. It is up to us to cut government spending, eliminate ineffective and bloated bureaucracies, and rebuild our workforce.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zqpdt-idtjvlhlh-r/) Let's restore American prosperity together by helping hard working taxpayers, decreasing spending, working with our allies abroad, and lowering our energy costs.[**Will you stand with us as we work to restore American prosperity?**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zqpdt-idtjvlhlh-y/) Thank you,Bryan

---
Peter,

There's no doubt about it: Anthony Fauci needs to resign.
* _He lied about masks. _
* _He lied about funding gain of function research._
* _And he's never going to tell the truth about the origins of COVID-19._

He's intentionally misled, misinformed, and failed the American people.

But here's the thing: a power-hungry bureaucrat like Fauci is never going to step down on his own accord.

Just look at this recent headline:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800658:JqFXmS2RN:m:1:3298722022:09EF1748C844E514D8F547C5973C5802:r)
That leaves us one choice, Peter. If Fauci won't step down, he must be FIRED.

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800658:JqFXmS2RN:m:1:3298722022:09EF1748C844E514D8F547C5973C5802:r) **

We know if the media's favorite doctor had his way, COVID-19 would NEVER be in the rearview mirror.

You can tell by the way he downplays natural immunity, hypes up any "variant" of the virus, and ignores the most recent, effective treatments for Coronavirus.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy Fauci EVER. He won't sacrifice the power if he has a choice. _That 's why he's basically telling us he's NEVER going to step down. _

But I refuse to allow Fauci's chaos to become permanent. I'm calling on the administration to do what is right and FIRE FAUCI NOW.

Will you join my fight by chipping in today?
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800658:JqFXmS2RN:m:1:3298722022:09EF1748C844E514D8F547C5973C5802:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $55**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800658:JqFXmS2RN:m:1:3298722022:09EF1748C844E514D8F547C5973C5802:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800658:JqFXmS2RN:m:1:3298722022:09EF1748C844E514D8F547C5973C5802:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800658:JqFXmS2RN:m:1:3298722022:09EF1748C844E514D8F547C5973C5802:r)
Enough is enough.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

|

---
I've said it time and time again: **American strength deters war. Weakness only invites attacks.**

As Secretary of State during the Trump Administration, I always put America first. We were honest, hard-working and treated the world as it is not as we wished it were. But, when the time came, when the situation so-required, we led. Our actions made the world safer and America stronger.

Now, President Biden is demonstrating _weakness_ everywhere you look. He is pushing our allies away and cozying up to our enemies. From Afghanistan to Iran to China, Biden is allowing those who threaten America to run wild without consequences.

Just compare the records between Biden's weakness and our strength:
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800303:JDHSyS2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF2EBAEEC5479AEDD2C3CDFD2ECE9D20:r)
---

_We cannot allow these weak policies to continue._ So, how do we stop it? First and foremost, we need to elect more principled conservatives at every level so we can hold the Democrats accountable for their weakness and failed policies.

That's why **[I am asking you to rush a donation to help me fight back against the radical Left and push to elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800303:JDHSyS2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF2EBAEEC5479AEDD2C3CDFD2ECE9D20:r "I am asking you to
rush a donation to help me fight back against the radical Left and push to elect more America First conservatives.")** We need the resources to go up against the Democrats and their Big Money mega-donors. That's where you come in.

---

---
We cannot just sit idly by and let Biden and the Democrats keep pushing their weak policies that put Americans at risk. All dedicated conservatives must **[take action RIGHT NOW to save America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800303:JDHSyS2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF2EBAEEC5479AEDD2C3CDFD2ECE9D20:r "take action RIGHT NOW to save America.")**

President Biden recently said that the world sits at a critical moment and that the world needs strong American leadership. He was actually right about that.

Unfortunately, that leadership is nowhere to be found from the Biden Administration.

We can and we must change course. **[You can help us do just that by rushing a contribution right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58800303:JDHSyS2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF2EBAEEC5479AEDD2C3CDFD2ECE9D20:r "You can help us do just that by rushing a contribution right now.")** Unapologetically American,

body:
In the next few months the Biden administration is doling out $66.5 million to community organizations and “minority-serving institutions” that will help “strengthen vaccine confidence” among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities.

| | | Because no one is above the law! | November 17, 2021

# [Biden Administration Invests $66.5 Mil to “Strengthen Vaccine Confidence” Among Minorities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57140&L=26324&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24taW52ZXN0cy02Ni01LW1pbC10by1zdHJlbmd0aGVuLXZhY2NpbmUtY29uZmlkZW5jZS1hbW9uZy1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
In the next few months the Biden administration is doling out $66.5 million to community organizations and “minority-serving institutions” that will help “strengthen vaccine confidence” among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities. The allocation is part of a broader, $143.5 million initiative launched by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) this month to “address barriers to COVID-19 vaccination.” Under the plan an HHS offshoot called Health Resources and Services Administration that aims to “achieve health equity” will keep disbursing funds throughout the fiscal year to expand “community-based efforts” to vaccinate minorities. “We have seen great progress in vaccination rates in recent months, but we know our work isn’t done in addressing misinformation and ensuring equitable access in underserved communities,” HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra said.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57140&L=26324&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24taW52ZXN0cy02Ni01LW1pbC10by1zdHJlbmd0aGVuLXZhY2NpbmUtY29uZmlkZW5jZS1hbW9uZy1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

### [Targeting Trump: Durham Exposes Clinton Connections Behind “Steele Dossier” Smear, Raises Questions About Role of FBI, Justice Department ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57140&L=26293&F=H&) Judicial Watch Special Counsel John Durham continues his steady march to the truth about the Russia mess—the sensational allegations of Trump “collusion” with Russia that disrupted and nearly derailed the Trump presidency. Last month, we reported on the Durham indictment of Clinton campaign adviser Michael Sussman for lying to the FBI about attempts to link Trump to a Kremlin-connected bank. Last week, Durham struck again, exposing the Clinton connections behind the notorious Steele Dossier—the compendium of anonymous smears, supposedly from Russian sources, that electrified the media and the liberal-left mob. clean_body: In the next few months the Biden administration is doling out $66.5 million to community organizations and “minority-serving institutions” that will help “strengthen vaccine confidence” among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities. | | | Because no one is above the law! | November 17, 2021 ---|---|--- | | In the next few months the Biden administration is doling out $66.5 million to community organizations and “minority-serving institutions” that will help “strengthen vaccine confidence” among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities. The allocation is part of a broader, $143.5 million initiative launched by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) this month to “address barriers to COVID-19 vaccination.” Under the plan an HHS offshoot called Health Resources and Services Administration that aims to “achieve health equity” will keep disbursing funds throughout the fiscal year to expand “community-based efforts” to vaccinate minorities. “We have seen great progress in vaccination rates in recent months, but we know our work isn’t done in addressing misinformation and ensuring equitable access in underserved communities,” HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra said. | | | == Judicial Watch The FOIA lawsuit is against the Office of the Director of National Intelligence and the CIA seeking communications among former Director of National Intelligence James Clapper, former CIA Director John Brennan and CNN around the time the Clinton-Democrat National Committee Trump dossier was being pitched to key media outlets. == = Just the News Kash Patel, the congressional investigator who played a key role in unraveling the Russia collusion narrative, says his next mission is to force the news media to make necessary corrections to the avalanche of false stories they produced over the last many years. = Judicial Watch Special Counsel John Durham continues his steady march to the truth about the Russia mess—the sensational allegations of Trump “collusion” with Russia that disrupted and nearly derailed the Trump presidency. Last month, we reported on the Durham indictment of Clinton campaign adviser Michael Sussman for lying to the FBI about attempts to link Trump to a Kremlin-connected bank. Last week, Durham struck again, exposing the Clinton connections behind the notorious Steele Dossier—the compendium of anonymous smears, supposedly from Russian sources, that electrified the media and the liberal-left mob. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.

At [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjekahsqbj9ikb0h3kgov066u0pmof3rt19babl8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j6coj6chh2bs), members are free to discuss ideas, hold honest conversations and form their opinions without being overwhelmed or suppressed by the liberal bias inherent in Twitter, Facebook, and other platforms.

name: Dr. Bob Lorinser
subject: This hilarious picture explains why I got "locked up" and am "seeking bail"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
My team can't stop laughing at this photo. As you can see by the expression on his face, Bentley is in charge. I've been "locked up" and we're seeking "bail". Peggy and I have partnered with dogs for decades until we left to go overseas to serve with the State Department. Most of our pets have come from UPAWS-like places. Throughout our marriage, we have taken in three dogs and one stray kitten. We thank adoption organizations for the enjoyment our pets bring to our children. I say we "partnered with dogs" and not "owned" because they are genuinely part of our family. **Dr. Bob seeks "bail" after being "locked up" in the Upper Peninsula Animal Welfare Shelter's fundraiser** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38739541/316853384/-1810003876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJjNGZkYy02MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpTENJ0LWfiJ1FI9lerXJ9V0AEOGgEGWhVWRFlTL3TQ=&emci=abaf309c-2a48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=432c4fdc-6248-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15167427) [BAIL OUT BOB](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38739542/316853385/-1810003876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJjNGZkYy02MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpTENJ0LWfiJ1FI9lerXJ9V0AEOGgEGWhVWRFlTL3TQ=&emci=abaf309c-2a48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=432c4fdc-6248-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15167427) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38739543/316853386/-1810003876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJjNGZkYy02MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpTENJ0LWfiJ1FI9lerXJ9V0AEOGgEGWhVWRFlTL3TQ=&emci=abaf309c-2a48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=432c4fdc-6248-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15167427) Good morning, Friend. I am excited to participate in the Upper Peninsula Animal Welfare Shelter's "Home for the Holidays Kennel Lock-Up Fundraiser." The Lorinsers are passionate about pet adoption and supporting the efforts of UPAWS. I value its mission to care for homeless, unwanted, abandoned, or abuse domestic animals.

Peggy and I have partnered with dogs for decades until we left to go overseas to serve with the State Department. Most of our pets have come from UPAWS-like places. Throughout our marriage, we have taken in three dogs and one stray kitten. We're thankful for adoption organizations for the enjoyment our pets bring to our children. I say we "partnered with dogs" and not "owned" because they are genuinely part of our family.

We are proud to offer our services as grandparents to our children's dogs, one of which arrived from UPAWS, Bentley Ray, who many know. [**A contribution to my Congressional campaign is always welcome**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38739544/316853387/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJjNGZkYy02MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpTENJ0LWfiJ1FI9lerXJ9V0AEOGgEGWhVWRFlTL3TQ=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38739545/316853389/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJjNGZkYy02MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpTENJ0LWfiJ1FI9lerXJ9V0AEOGgEGWhVWRFlTL3TQ=) , but in addition this morning, I'm asking you please consider a donation to Upper Peninsula Animal Welfare Shelter to "**[bail me out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38739547/316853390/551658497?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJjNGZkYy02MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpTENJ0LWfiJ1FI9lerXJ9V0AEOGgEGWhVWRFlTL3TQ=&emci=abaf309c-2a48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=432c4fdc-6248-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15167427)** " Have a great morning. – Dr. Bob | |

name: ICYMI News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z159uodikks9eab8lemm4ae41fe90gc4q4og04t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbsrinre9pav9ehl0d123jrm7vsj6j75l30cfv38_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze03j9saem11b17nebbb348j1huqp2jmctb60l7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsb8bncrqks0p3nkdfepbamso933a3h7kdivct4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrrdtrti6f31dml285l3daollpuf4ciut9ugrpv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjk06vcvfdjadmp7ohptl7f4iiaj5rv31o0te7e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0ils3onbmtaf04m8jspmuujhkflaqcoj9j8snho_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgefcvg0vqc0elq5tni180mip9cguu04b6udffco_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9rtnocfni6qd0o67pt9p40tgekf5v8o0f1fe48g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4ongethj8d33elhm4dli6so7edj56grbcd3j6lgn5c71mapncdplcmp35dhkc9r6ech5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr3rll6bmi21h82au3o9jcrj3ru18986a42m0j2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9j66o72c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: School vax mandates are out of control
body:
A dangerous new line has been crossed, and it could affect us all. After the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals issued a stay o
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z63v6a3frb9bd0t5q60h0sq5pp2dc5ni88r5hubg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65spk68r68tdhm3gb0tj6c8oj8dlgs4qr8d3k6doj7dtlmqo6at1j6lgrcdhh6qoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbephkssqr0pti65j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z66q2scie6lpmocoggutrccoqqghn2eickj4uplg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, A dangerous new line has been crossed, and it could affect us all. After the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals issued a stay on Joe Biden’s unconstitutional OSHA executive order, __the president instructed businesses to comply with his vaccine mandate anyway__. He effectively gave a “green light” to any constitution-ignoring school, business, or organization willing to go ahead with _potentially dangerous_ vaccine mandates on students, workers, or even customers. Right now, millions of students at thousands of colleges are facing an ultimatum—**get the shot, or forfeit your education!** **At Turning Point USA (TPUSA), we’re fighting to put an end to these _radical_ policies that defy the fundamental rights of MILLIONS of young college students—and, if left unchallenged, could soon be used even more forcefully against YOU and ME. **[**Help students take a stand and defend their freedom to make their _own_ decisions for their _own_ health by giving $15, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztqbhardqe9r2d45s1g989rjvvjgvpi0lvc7qae8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
[**Make A Donation**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4u3lara9mi5imannt1f9be10oeet3qdd4tc0h4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6g4anrbgvj69430eoohk5mknvp1dbfi265n12s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
Your gift of $25 will immediately enable us to send a **“No Forced Vax” Activism Kit** to one TPUSA campus chapter, equipping them with the facts, materials, and support they’ll need to defend their freedom on campus. **Colorado State University** and others have threatened to arrest students for __TRESPASSING__ if they show up to campus unvaccinated. _“_ __The school really doesn’t care about our health__ __,_ ” _CSU student Gabby Reichardt recently told us. **Creighton University** , a mid-western Catholic school, is allowing faculty and staff to apply for exemptions to their vaccine mandate, _but not the students_. How hypocritical! All students are required to take the vaccine— _without religious or medical exemptions._ And you and I both know that stories like these are multiplying every day. This _insane overreach_ at college and university campuses around this country needs to be reined in and halted immediately. _These outrageous and potentially dangerous policies are not just a clear and present danger to the freedom of students today; they have emboldened bureaucrats at all levels of government—including the White House—to mandate vaccines for _MILLIONS_ and _MILLIONS_ of Americans._ **We must defeat these mandates on college campuses before they reach our own doorsteps..._if they haven’t already!_ ** [**Your contribution will help students across America fight dangerous vaccine mandates by empowering them with activism kits, field staff, training, and live events. Please consider a gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $25 today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlgik0m2pd3f269gsm3bijb2c3n31prc0j3gkfeo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
[**Contribute Today!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrsbakav2mlt84q6c9u0re54bahm2kvb2r8lmlg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
_No student should be forced to choose between their rights or an education. And yet, that’s exactly the ultimatum millions of our nation’s young people face today._ TPUSA’s mission is to empower students to stand up against these dangerous medical mandates and anti-freedom policies at colleges and universities. _We have reached over 400,000 students with our kits and events at over 2,500+ high schools and colleges_ —but it is absolutely necessary for us to continue increasing those numbers. We need your help to do that. **Please donate today and help Turning Point USA send support and activism kits to more students. They need our help. No individual can stand up to this tyranny alone.**[**Consider a gift of $500, $250, $100, $50 or even $25.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf6uevsuuqqfrh1ocefbp6o615th197j5eavqeng_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)**Every dollar goes a long way toward helping these young Americans defend their liberty.**
---
[**GIVE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjboslm253oi2sgmm6f3qp7bfuqr69a5av5k3or8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9gm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
Let’s fight this, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2i482qfadn72pnal5coa45nhh68r1u1gib1glno_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cth62o31chgm49fg)

## What An Incredible Journey!
---
A little more than 7 months ago we launched this campaign that has rapidly turned into much more than a campaign but a movement to #SaveAmerica. I've been blown away by the kindness and generosity of so many Americans like you towards Kendra and I. Everyday we get messages from great people telling us that they are praying for our family and we can feel it. This campaign is a total MIRACLE. Nobody thought we would be where we are and all I can say is "We serve a God of miracles." I want to say thank you so much for praying for me and my family as well as supporting this movement through spreading word on social media and financially contributing to the cause. The other day we had a matching campaign of $5000. If we could raise $5000 in 24hrs then Kendra and I would personally match it with another $5000. Good News: WE DID IT! Please keep praying for us and spreading word on social media that there is still HOPE for America. If you or anyone that you know is being forced to choose between a jab or a job be sure to direct them to my website www.jacksonlahmeyer.com and they can download the COVID19 Religious Exemption form. I've signed over 45,000 and thousands of people have kept their jobs without taking the jab! Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Wes Moore
subject: Let’s celebrate our educators
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38743842/316867183/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211118education_wm_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU2MDhkNi03NzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Tt0KMFqaUTvLKvbaMQ5eCYVsD8Op17c32mThQOJvDo=)
---
Friends, This week is **American Education Week** , a time for us to take a moment to celebrate public schools and thank educators in Maryland and across the country for the transformative work they do in shaping the futures of our children and the betterment of our society as a whole. **I come from a family of educators and know that education is what allowed me to fulfill my true potential in life.** My grandmother who helped raise me, Mama Win, was a lifelong educator, and many in my family followed a similar path as educators too. Educators play such a critical role in the lives of children and youth, yet often go without the pay, funding, and thanks they deserve. Their jobs became all the more challenging when the pandemic struck in 2020, drastically changing the way teachers and professors reach and prepare their students for success. **I believe every child should have access to a strong education, regardless of where they live or their circumstances in life.** That’s why I started a small business in Baltimore devoted to helping young people access and complete college, and advocated for The Blueprint for Maryland’s Future. As your next governor, I would ensure its proper implementation by extending tutoring programs, increasing funding for digital devices critical to modern learning, raising teacher pay, providing additional access to pre-K for 3 and 4 year olds from low-income families, and equitably funding school construction that ensures our children are learning in 21st century school buildings. **[In the meantime, join me in showing our Maryland educators the support they deserve: add your name to thank teachers, administrators, and public school employees for all they do for us and our children during this year’s American Education Week.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38743845/316867190/-865879078?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211118education_wm_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU2MDhkNi03NzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Tt0KMFqaUTvLKvbaMQ5eCYVsD8Op17c32mThQOJvDo=&emci=a1b2cbd9-ed47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6be608d6-7748-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38743848/316867202/-865879078?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211118education_wm_30da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU2MDhkNi03NzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Tt0KMFqaUTvLKvbaMQ5eCYVsD8Op17c32mThQOJvDo=&emci=a1b2cbd9-ed47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6be608d6-7748-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)
---
Elevate,
Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
---
| [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38743850/316867208/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211118education_wm_30da_xx_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU2MDhkNi03NzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Tt0KMFqaUTvLKvbaMQ5eCYVsD8Op17c32mThQOJvDo=)

clean_body: I predict the 2022 election will be a red wave that sweeps America. But more importantly, it will be an America-First wave! | Peter, I predict the 2022 election will be a red wave that sweeps America. But more importantly, it will be an America-First wave! Look at what happened in Virginia. American patriots elected the first Republican governor in over a decade! The Left thought they could turn this once bright red state to dark blue. But the America-First movement proved them wrong. Michigan can lead the America-First red wave. And it starts with getting Fred Upton out of office. Democrats are losing control over Michigan. Voters are disgusted with what they've done to our economy, our schools, and what they did to us during the COVID-19 lockdowns. I am asking you to join the America-First red wave by supporting my campaign. Peter, you can launch the America-First wave in Michigan. Click any link below to donate and empower our victory in November 2022! Thank you, Steve Carra Michigan Candidate for Congress Personal cell phone number: 269-267-4641 | | Steve Carra for Congress, PO Box 404, Three Rivers, MI 49093, United States
