name: John Gibbs
subject: Endorsed by President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbs for Congress_**
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r) Dear Peter, **President Donald Trump just endorsed my campaign for Congress.** My name is John Gibbs, and I'm running to replace RINO Peter Meijer, who stabbed conservatives in the back to vote with Nancy Pelosi to impeach President Trump. President Trump endorsed me, declaring that _" Meijer has been a terrible representative of the Republican Party and beyond...John Gibbs is a fabulous talent who loves the State, our Military, and our Vets. _ _John will always protect our Second Amendment, our Southern Border, and the Police - there will be no defunding with John..._ _Unlike Peter Meijer, he will not turn his back on Michigan._ _Importantly, John was a member of my 1776 Commission, and he will be strong on Education Issues. John has my complete and total endorsement! "_ **_[Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign to defeat Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r)_****?**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r)
I'm running for Congress with President Donald Trump's endorsement because there is a problem in Washington. GOVERNMENT is RUN AMOK. **The Biden regime holds political prisoners in solitary confinement for months on end for misdemeanors.** The Biden Department of Justice is labeling its political opponents, including concerned parents, as domestic terrorists. Biden's Department of Justice also amassed lists of millions of gun owners. Entrenched bureaucrats outside the reach of elections override parents' medical decisions to force vaccines in children's arms. **Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for Congress because it's time for America First Patriots to take our country back in 2022.** **[Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign for Congress by chipping in your most generous contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r)**?
Instead of fighting back against Joe Biden's lawless abuse of power, Peter Meijer voted to empower Nancy Pelosi. Meijer marched in lockstep with Pelosi and the Democrats to support the witch hunt January 6 commission. **And Meijer obeyed Pelosi's call to weaponize the witch hunt committee to prosecute Trump supporters like Steve Bannon criminally.** Electing an America First conservative majority starts with electing America First conservatives to Congress. And that's why Donald Trump endorsed my campaign to remove pro-impeachment RINO and Nancy Pelosi ally Peter Meijer from Congress. **[Can I count on you to stand with President Trump and support my campaign by chipping in your most generous contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r)**?

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r)
Your donation will ensure all the voters in Michigan's Third Congressional District know Donald Trump supports my America First conservative message. It was an honor to serve in the Trump administration. And you can bet I'll continue the fight in Congress! **[So please join President Trump in supporting my campaign for Congress by chipping in your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r)**!

Sincerely,

John Gibbs

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59170313:sdduqCH1N:m:1:2365227053:C379C81DC474E78224B92C65A36F9E24:r)

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Disaster at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Thanks to Joe Biden’s open border policies, we have a crisis at the border. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/891a00dc66e31238/4367b3c13ac6c36fc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, This is an immigration crisis in our country, and it is a direct result of Joe Biden’s incompetence. On Day ONE in the Oval Office, he started undoing Trump-era policies that worked to keep our borders secure and our country safe. body:

Peter,

You probably don't keep tabs on the amount of money that Nancy Pelosi and the national Democrats raise each quarter, but I do, and **that 's why I'm writing to you today to sound the alarm. **

Even though the Biden/Pelosi machine is an absolute failure that

* **Stranded American personnel and left military equipment for terrorists**.

* Had federal agents looking into concerned parents at local school board meetings.

* **Disincentivizes work, and made it harder for employers to keep those that DO work**.

* Has no plans to solve the illegal immigration problem

House Democrats are **STILL** outraising House Republicans. Their cash-on-hand advantage gives them the only chance they have of maintaining control of Congress and continuing to force their liberal agenda on the American people.

[** HELP REPUBLICANS LEVEL THE PLAYING FIELD
CHIP IN $10 TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804394:JtM5wS2Nm:m:1:3298722022:421C7BEFF1BCB86476828F3F2E95DF6E:r)
**Democrats' $1.5 million fundraising advantage can make the difference between Republican victories like we saw this year in Virginia and New Jersey, or two more years of an unfettered Speaker Pelosi.**

We must work together to overcome this gap, or else face losing very winnable races next year.

I know that we ask for conservatives like you to make a donation often, but the truth is**[we wouldn't need to ask if we were able to keep pace with what Democrats are raising](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804394:JtM5wS2Nm:m:1:3298722022:421C7BEFF1BCB86476828F3F2E95DF6E:r)**.

If you want unstable gas prices, expensive groceries, illegal immigrants flooding the southern border or for Democrats to bankrupt the country,**then please ignore this email**. If you want to help me and my team do something about the crises Democrats have created over the past 9 months, then **[please chip in $10 or more right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804394:JtM5wS2Nm:m:1:3298722022:421C7BEFF1BCB86476828F3F2E95DF6E:r)**.

We've got a country to save,

Jim

name: Matt West
subject: Why I’m running for Congress here in Oregon.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
Let’s do this. | Friends, Since 2020, it feels like our community has been in crisis. Leaders spread conspiracy theories about basic science and public health measures like masks and vaccines, forest fires burn with no end in sight while conservatives continue to deny climate change, and voting rights are constantly under attack by the far right. I wrote op-eds, volunteered, and helped my neighbors get out and vote, but I felt like I was screaming into the void. So I sat down with friends and family and we had a serious conversation — what was the best way I could help my community? **I have decided to run for Congress because Oregon needs a leader who is going to take action to combat the climate crisis, fight for universal healthcare, and protect our democracy.[Will you join my team to make Congress work for us, friend?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38748560/316886139/165014388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRjZWExOC03ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VwTvEQ98lPPbCvMbPw-30XUgXrifqYyH9G-tsq2p34=&emci=ed14b837-d831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=efdcea18-7e48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5643049)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38748563/316886146/165014388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRjZWExOC03ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VwTvEQ98lPPbCvMbPw-30XUgXrifqYyH9G-tsq2p34=&emci=ed14b837-d831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=efdcea18-7e48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5643049) I’m not your typical candidate for Congress. I’m an engineer, a chemist, a public school kid, and a lifelong progressive. I’ve spent my career solving problems, following data, and getting sh*t done. Our community needs a leader who is going to work with experts in their field to get the best results for families and workers — not the same old politicians who sit in the pockets of special interest groups. **[I’m launching a different kind of campaign and I need your help, team. I’m not a career politician with special interest connections, but with your help, I know I can get the job done. Join my team and together we can shake it up in Congress>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38748568/316886148/165014388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRjZWExOC03ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VwTvEQ98lPPbCvMbPw-30XUgXrifqYyH9G-tsq2p34=&emci=ed14b837-d831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=efdcea18-7e48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5643049)** | [Join The Team »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38748571/316886155/165014388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRjZWExOC03ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VwTvEQ98lPPbCvMbPw-30XUgXrifqYyH9G-tsq2p34=&emci=ed14b837-d831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=efdcea18-7e48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5643049)

name: Team Ras Smith
subject: The strike is over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
The striking workers at John Deere just secured a new contract that will boost wages and improve working conditions. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38748802/316886963/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDExZGU1NC03ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ts5B6wIDV32dNfzTWycE6i9LRyrmhsbICxUgMlqh7vc=)
Huge news, friend.

The striking workers at John Deere just secured a new contract that will boost wages and improve working conditions.

While this contract may not represent all the demands of the workers, the gains represent what can happen when community and workers stand together to demand dignity and respect on the job.

**[Now that the strike is over and the contract is settled, Team Ras is sending congratulations to the workers on their well-deserved contract. name: Team Dickinson
subject: Welcome to the movement.
body:
| | |
---
| [ ](https://www.jerrydickinson.com?utm_source=headerlogo-ar&utm_medium=email)
---
| Dear friend, Thank you so much for signing on and being a part of this team. Jerry is truly in this race for the right reasons, and together we're building a movement that brings people together and empowers people that have been left behind. These aren't just platitudes. We really mean it. From now until Election Day, you'll be hearing a lot from us about Jerry's vision, and how we're bringing transformational change to the 18th district and the city of Pittsburgh. We'll be plugging you in to all of the ways you can help soon, but our first ask is this: **Can you forward this link to 5 family members and friends, tell them a little bit about the campaign, and ask them to join in?** https://secure.ngpvan.com/IECxB1CuNEqjJQ2HN13J9A2 When you reach out, remember, this is a campaign about ideas, not ideologies. We lead with the heart and we don't leave people behind. Thanks again, more to come soon! Team Dickinson
---
|
---
|

---

_**“FBI Whistleblower Claims DOJ Used Counterterrorism Tools against Parents in Response to School-Board Memo” – National Review**_

**FIRST,** the Radical Left wanted to teach their Socialist Critical Race Theory in schools.
**THEN,** they called parents against Critical Race Theory “ _Domestic Terrorists._ ”
**NOW,** the FBI is _spying_ on parents!

**[As a strong supporter of Conservative values and putting the wellbeing of the American people (especially children) FIRST, we need you to sign our petition ASAP:](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vsln-1lcb8-4qqlpo6/ " As a strong supporter of Conservative values and putting the wellbeing of the American people \(especially children\) FIRST, we need you to sign our petition ASAP:")**

body:
Red (Jasmine’s Version) 🧣

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38750408/316894988/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQ0M2NlNi04MDQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkSy5-4U0jdTlTJBecK-CQt_sH5rBptkpASxA9FmFvw=)

| | Peter, Ever since Madison Cawthorn announced he was leaving his home district to run in NC-13, our team has been in a _State of Grace._ We can only hope Cawthorn left NC-14 to become a _Better Man_ , but we know _All Too Well (10 minute version)_ that he will do _Nothing New_ and keep prioritizing the national _Starlight_ over his constituents. The good news from all of this is that I’m _The Lucky One_ who gets to _Stay Stay Stay_ and _Run_ in NC-14 to replace his _Treacherous_ ideologies. Despite the fact that _Everything Has Changed_ with our new district lines and Cawthorn leaving, NC-14 still leans _Red._ From _The Very First Night_ I decided to run for Congress, I knew that this race would be tough to win. But just like _The Last Time_ I ran for county commissioner, I know what it takes to _Begin Again_ and come out on top. [**I’m ready to deliver real leadership to Western NC that is based on love and empathy, and I can’t do it alone. subject: We’re being outraised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We must work together to overcome this gap, or else face losing very winnable races next year.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804406:JwXFKS2tN:m:1:3253819041:6AD745F8855985A4CFCC49CBEBD32B4D:r)
---

Peter,

You probably don't keep tabs on the amount of money that Nancy Pelosi and the national Democrats raise each quarter, but I do, and **that 's why I'm writing to you today to sound the alarm. **

Even though the Biden/Pelosi machine is an absolute failure that

* **Stranded American personnel and left military equipment for terrorists**.

* Had federal agents looking into concerned parents at local school board meetings.

* **Disincentivizes work, and made it harder for employers to keep those that DO work**.

* Has no plans to solve the illegal immigration problem

House Democrats are **STILL** outraising House Republicans. Their cash-on-hand advantage gives them the only chance they have of maintaining control of Congress and continuing to force their liberal agenda on the American people.

[** HELP REPUBLICANS LEVEL THE PLAYING FIELD
CHIP IN $10 TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804406:JwXFKS2tN:m:1:3253819041:6AD745F8855985A4CFCC49CBEBD32B4D:r)
**Democrats' $1.5 million fundraising advantage can make the difference between Republican victories like we saw this year in Virginia and New Jersey, or two more years of an unfettered Speaker Pelosi.**

We must work together to overcome this gap, or else face losing very winnable races next year.

I know that we ask for conservatives like you to make a donation often, but the truth is**[we wouldn't need to ask if we were able to keep pace with what Democrats are raising](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804406:JwXFKS2tN:m:1:3253819041:6AD745F8855985A4CFCC49CBEBD32B4D:r)**.

If you want unstable gas prices, expensive groceries, illegal immigrants flooding the southern border or for Democrats to bankrupt the country,**then please ignore this email**. If you want to help me and my team do something about the crises Democrats have created over the past 9 months, then **[please chip in $10 or more right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804406:JwXFKS2tN:m:1:3253819041:6AD745F8855985A4CFCC49CBEBD32B4D:r)**.

We've got a country to save,

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Terrifying for unions.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

It's looking like Pennsylvania might soon become a scary place for workers. There are real threats on the horizon. Anti-union advocates are making a lot of headway in next year’s PA race for governor — and it's terrifying.

PA state legislators have been introducing bills that would make it harder to form and easier to opt out of unions and put up roadblocks to raising money for political work. Thankfully, Gov. Wolf has vetoed these measures.

But with this election looming and anti-union politicians gaining momentum, we must support unions by preparing to Get Out The Vote in 2022.

Keystone Progress is working to do just that. We are on the ground connecting people with information about their voting rights, linking community based organizations to build coalitions that build up organizers, and training leaders to mobilize voters in areas of the state that are often overlooked.

We cannot leave workers in the dust. This is Pennsylvania. We must vote for politicians and judges who will stand with workers.

Are you in?

Please donate today to strengthen our efforts. We need your support now more than ever.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111821&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111821&amount=20] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111821&amount=30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111821&amount=30] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111821&amount=50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111821&amount=50]
Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=111821]

Thank you,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Elaine Luria
subject: This is why the race for VA-02 matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38752294/316903261/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTQ3OGE2Yi04NDQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JBr7wxl1-kp-pef8ncoK9k_aqheTywrQDqewV0bQZOY=)

| | Folks, Representing one of the closest swing districts in the nation isn’t easy -- _there’s a lot at stake in the race for VA-02._ **Democracy & Integrity**
The midterms will serve as a barometer of our country’s Democratic values and integrity -- the choice is clear in our race. One of my opponents, Jen Kiggans, won’t admit that President Biden won the 2020 election. She’s feeding into the lies and conspiracy theories that resulted in an unprecedented attack on our democracy. You can count on me to always lead with integrity and to uphold the Democratic values on which our nation was built. **Climate Change**
Coastal communities like ours are already experiencing the consequences of climate change. I’m a champion for bold climate action that will help curb greenhouse gas emissions, reduce dependency on fossil fuels, and create good, clean jobs. I’ll never stop fighting for policies to safeguard Coastal Virginians’ homes and livelihoods -- the same can’t be said for my Republican opponents. **Our Democratic House Majority**
This seat is vital for maintaining our Democratic House Majority. As you know, Republicans only need to regain _five seats_ to take back control of the House. Republicans just made serious gains in VA-02 with the election of Republican Glenn Youngkin and other Republicans down ballot -- this is going to be my tightest and closest rate yet. We overcame the odds last year, and I know we can do it again -- _all the progress our Democratic House Majority has worked for is at stake._ **The outcome of this race will have far-reaching implications -- help me make sure they’re positive ones for our district and our democracy.[Please make a $25 donation today before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38752296/316903263/483782168?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211118_FR_ALotAtStake_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTQ3OGE2Yi04NDQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JBr7wxl1-kp-pef8ncoK9k_aqheTywrQDqewV0bQZOY=)** | | | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38752297/316903264/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211118_FR_ALotAtStake_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTQ3OGE2Yi04NDQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JBr7wxl1-kp-pef8ncoK9k_aqheTywrQDqewV0bQZOY=)

name: Grassroots Fundraising Update
subject: re: meeting with Congresswoman Demings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Congresswoman Demings asked us to get an urgent email out to you, and she told us to be blunt with the truth:
| | |
---
Hi friend, Val Demings' finance team here – we just got out of a _very_ concerning meeting with the congresswoman about our fundraising for this battleground Senate race where we unfortunately had to show her this:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38753038/316904249/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1642-fr-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FlYjkxYS04NTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyZZdwH6hkIw6jWVNKNyjAKtLNr9SSFx8oEirnKsZ8o=)
You're seeing that right, friend. **Our grassroots fundraising has ****massively** **slowed down** – and the congresswoman was rightfully worried, because Senate Republicans have _already_ raised $76 MILLION to defeat her and keep Florida red.
That's why Congresswoman Demings asked us to get an urgent email out to you, and she told us to be blunt with the truth: **If our grassroots fundraising doesn't pick up – we risk our momentum slowing down. We risk losing the race that will decide Senate control.**
Florida's Senate race was decided by just 10,033 votes – and it was the most expensive race of 2018. We _know_ Val Demings can win and strengthen our Democratic Senate majority, but she can't do it without the resources to compete. **Please friend, in the face of our massive fundraising shortfall – and recent polling showing this race statistically TIED – can we count on your donation to close this fundraising gap and pull ahead of Marco Rubio?**

| | | **BREAKING: Psaki defends Kamala Harris' position in the Biden administration amid sinking poll numbers— FOX NEWS** Fellow Conservative,
Kamala Harris continues to make history! She is in the running to be the most unpopular Vice President in history.

And it's not just Republicans and independents who are turning against her. According to reports from the White House, Joe Biden is no fan of Kamla either.

**There's even rumors he’s looking to replace her as his VP. **With whom you may ask?

Mayor Pete Buttigieg... That’s right, Fellow Conservative, and we honestly can’t decide who would be worse for the job. **[So if you have an opinion on this, please let us know by filling out the poll>>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vt1r-1lctg-4qqlpo7/ "So if you have an opinion on this, please let us know by filling out the poll>>>>")**

---

**YOUR RESPONSE HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED YET!**

**[Let us know if you approve or not ASAP!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vt1r-1lctl-4qqlpo2/ "Let us know if you approve or not ASAP!")**

Thank you for your feedback,

House Conservatives Polling HQ

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vt1r-1lcto-4qqlpo5/ "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38756005/316911493/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjM1OGY1Zi04OTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vXjHsc31AGDTJ3aMa1eJMFrVcA0uM2xezEsHhGs2Hqs=)
Team, **Racism is one of the defining public health crises of our time, and its consequences for Massachusetts residents of color — and for Black residents in particular — are a matter of life and death.** Now it is time to not just reflect, but put to practice what racial justice means for Massachusetts. That’s why on Monday, I released our Racial Justice Action Plan — a framework for how a Downing Administration will approach transformational racial justice in Massachusetts. It is grounded in cultural humility, deep listening, and co-delivery on equity in Massachusetts. This Action Plan represents my commitment to racial justice in Massachusetts, but it’s important to note that this is not “my plan for racial justice.” That is why concrete commitments to input from advocacy groups played such a central role in this plan. **As Governor, I will be accountable to people who have devoted their lives to the fight for racial justice and to the communities I am elected to serve, and I will use the powers of the office to deliver on my commitments to them. I will devote my administration to embedding racial justice in the structures and operations of state government.** I know I’m imperfect and will get things wrong. _But I am in this fight — together, alongside people like you_. That is also why this plan is fundamentally unfinished — it is not complete until I hear from you. I am holding Feedback Hubs across the state this month, and I will revise our plan to reflect new commitments I make during these meetings. [**Friend, please join us at any of our upcoming Racial Justice Feedback Hubs. Click here to view the calendar and RSVP >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38756006/316911494/981525699?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjM1OGY1Zi04OTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vXjHsc31AGDTJ3aMa1eJMFrVcA0uM2xezEsHhGs2Hqs=&emci=ed358f5f-8948-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ef358f5f-8948-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496#events) | [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38756007/316911495/981525699?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjM1OGY1Zi04OTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vXjHsc31AGDTJ3aMa1eJMFrVcA0uM2xezEsHhGs2Hqs=&emci=ed358f5f-8948-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ef358f5f-8948-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496#events)
---
I look forward to meeting with you soon,
Ben
Paid for By the Downing Committee

PO Box 120
Lowell, MA 01853
United States

name: John Gibbs
subject: Endorsed by President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbs for Congress_**
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r) Dear Peter, **President Donald Trump just endorsed my campaign for Congress.** My name is John Gibbs, and I'm running to replace RINO Peter Meijer, who stabbed conservatives in the back to vote with Nancy Pelosi to impeach President Trump. President Trump endorsed me, declaring that _" Meijer has been a terrible representative of the Republican Party and beyond...John Gibbs is a fabulous talent who loves the State, our Military, and our Vets. _ _John will always protect our Second Amendment, our Southern Border, and the Police - there will be no defunding with John..._ _Unlike Peter Meijer, he will not turn his back on Michigan._ _Importantly, John was a member of my 1776 Commission, and he will be strong on Education Issues. John has my complete and total endorsement! "_ **_[Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign to defeat Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r)_****?**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r)
I'm running for Congress with President Donald Trump's endorsement because there is a problem in Washington. GOVERNMENT is RUN AMOK. **The Biden regime holds political prisoners in solitary confinement for months on end for misdemeanors.** The Biden Department of Justice is labeling its political opponents, including concerned parents, as domestic terrorists. Biden's Department of Justice also amassed lists of millions of gun owners. Entrenched bureaucrats outside the reach of elections override parents' medical decisions to force vaccines in children's arms. **Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for Congress because it's time for America First Patriots to take our country back in 2022.** **[Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign for Congress by chipping in your most generous contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r)**?
Instead of fighting back against Joe Biden's lawless abuse of power, Peter Meijer voted to empower Nancy Pelosi. Meijer marched in lockstep with Pelosi and the Democrats to support the witch hunt January 6 commission. **And Meijer obeyed Pelosi's call to weaponize the witch hunt committee to prosecute Trump supporters like Steve Bannon criminally.** Electing an America First conservative majority starts with electing America First conservatives to Congress. And that's why Donald Trump endorsed my campaign to remove pro-impeachment RINO and Nancy Pelosi ally Peter Meijer from Congress. **[Can I count on you to stand with President Trump and support my campaign by chipping in your most generous contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r)**?

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r)
Your donation will ensure all the voters in Michigan's Third Congressional District know Donald Trump supports my America First conservative message. It was an honor to serve in the Trump administration. And you can bet I'll continue the fight in Congress! **[So please join President Trump in supporting my campaign for Congress by chipping in your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r)**!

Sincerely,

John Gibbs

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59171321:WHQpOCHNQ:m:1:2365227053:04963D3E0536FCC25890B91F209A267E:r)

name: Aaron
subject: NEW: The GOP just unleashed a 6-figure ad buy in NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team – A dark money super PAC unleashed yet another massive ad buy in New Hampshire, targeting Maggie Hassan. **Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and the rest of the GOP have a plan to take back the Senate in 2022, and it starts with flipping New Hampshire.** Just this year, outside special interest groups and dark money super PACs have spent _over $4.5 million_ attacking Senator Hassan, and McConnell and Trump have promised that there are millions more on the way. Regardless of who the Republican nominee is, the GOP will continue to flood the Granite State with dark money to spread misinformation and rally their far-right base. If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, it will take a grassroots effort. **[We don't need megadonors like Republicans, but we do need people like you, friend, to give $5 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against these unrelenting attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38756716/316914979/-1803038125?refcode=e20211118_adbuy-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDUxM2Q5NS04YTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSMec-dXab5ItUkdHrlBhHHDfg7BL879YSB1siMrguI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38756717/316914980/-1803038125?refcode=e20211118_adbuy-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDUxM2Q5NS04YTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSMec-dXab5ItUkdHrlBhHHDfg7BL879YSB1siMrguI=)

[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38756722/316915012/-1803038125?refcode=e20211118_adbuy-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDUxM2Q5NS04YTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSMec-dXab5ItUkdHrlBhHHDfg7BL879YSB1siMrguI=)
If we lose here in New Hampshire, we could lose the Senate – affecting everything from climate change to the fate of Roe v. Wade. That's why it's crucial to respond to these attacks early and show Republicans that we're ready to defend this seat.
Your support is so important to this campaign, and we're counting on your help. **[So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help keep New Hampshire and the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38756724/316915014/-1803038125?refcode=e20211118_adbuy-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDUxM2Q5NS04YTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSMec-dXab5ItUkdHrlBhHHDfg7BL879YSB1siMrguI=)**

name: Roger Marshall
subject: Are you there?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3980244fe62fb2b6/79c55c778b357571c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — I’m a physician, a veteran, and I’ve led the fight against Joe Biden’s un-American mandates and push to dishonorably discharge servicemembers who refuse a vaccine.**

---
It TERRIFIES the media that a physician would challenge the narrative like this... and it makes it even more important that we have the resources it takes to share our message. [**Will you help us? Chip in now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3980244fe62fb2b6/2d54ca92257c287cc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
[**CHIP IN NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3980244fe62fb2b6/e50ebb9c1be3e947c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Make no mistake... we have the momentum in this fight right now. **Just yesterday, OSHA announced it's halting enforcement and****implementation****of its vaccine mandate for businesses.** **But the work has just begun... and we know **Democrats and their buddies in the media are going to continue to attack me and do everything they can to sweep our work under the rug. I’ve introduced a bill to STOP Joe Biden from treating veterans like felons for refusing the vaccine. And if OSHA even thinks about changing its mind and implementing its mandate, I've introduced a bill to BAN our tax dollars from being used to enforce it. [**Will you help us get the word out? Chip in now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3980244fe62fb2b6/61f780bcb59a868ec3d6b838967d376c/37973)** ** Every dollar helps us share our message and expose how Biden and the Democrats want to control every part of our lives and treat veterans like common criminals. They have liberal elites and radical donors. We have YOU, and we’re counting on you to stand with us now. [**Please, chip in whatever you can.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3980244fe62fb2b6/9a55c4445fc651fac3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3980244fe62fb2b6/67e50169487d81e6c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---

clean_body: | | | Friend — I’m a physician, a veteran, and I’ve led the fight against Joe Biden’s un-American mandates and push to dishonorably discharge servicemembers who refuse a vaccine. It TERRIFIES the media that a physician would challenge the narrative like this... and it makes it even more important that we have the resources it takes to share our message. Make no mistake... we have the momentum in this fight right now. Just yesterday, OSHA announced it's halting enforcement andimplementationof its vaccine mandate for businesses. But the work has just begun... and we know Democrats and their buddies in the media are going to continue to attack me and do everything they can to sweep our work under the rug. I’ve introduced a bill to STOP Joe Biden from treating veterans like felons for refusing the vaccine. And if OSHA even thinks about changing its mind and implementing its mandate, I've introduced a bill to BAN our tax dollars from being used to enforce it. Every dollar helps us share our message and expose how Biden and the Democrats want to control every part of our lives and treat veterans like common criminals. They have liberal elites and radical donors. We have YOU, and we’re counting on you to stand with us now. Senator Roger Marshall | | | Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help. subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend, **enough is enough.**
Yesterday, the House voted to censure Republican Rep. Paul Gosar and remove him from his committee assignments.
Rep. Gosar — who served on the Oversight Committee with Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez — tweeted a violent video depicting him killing Rep. Ocasio-Cortez and stabbing President Biden.
Yesterday, Mondaire took to the House floor to demand Gosar be held accountable. [In a speech that went viral](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38757265/316917832/1425550854?s=21&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211118_AM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjI0NWVhNy04YzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTKzGfVQXwRsZ0aQIgyWYd37SFXqbzS6b4TXHE_5fbM=&emci=c0e4222b-8c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7f245ea7-8c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896), Mondaire declared: “We cannot let the Republican Party make Congress the only workplace in America where violence against your coworkers is not a crime, but a credential.”
The GOP is determined to play partisan politics and turn a blind eye to the egregious acts of right-wing violence in our country — like this behavior by Rep. Gosar and those who played a role in the January 6 attacks. We cannot continue to tolerate this kind of vitriol and violence in our politics.
Mondaire ran for office to stand up for what’s right, but he can’t do it alone.

subject: Help us wish Salud a Happy Birthday!

body:
Our campaign team is celebrating Salud Carbajal's birthday, and we want you to join us!
We are so grateful for all Salud does for us in Washington, like combating climate change, investing in our country's infrastructure and fighting for affordable healthcare and prescription drugs, and we want to make sure he has a great birthday.
Will you **[click here to sign our virtual birthday card](https://act.myngp.com/el/5rQQPKmSXRYM8kPMUUUbXrXXKu_fLflrvih1inCubaM=/sp8e677AjIGGkAtmlUG6c3l-RAvkTOhGKGxsGd069Fo=?recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) **for him? Thank you for taking a moment to add your name. We appreciate you joining us in making his birthday a celebration to remember.

subject: our democracy or the filibuster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |

Since the 2020 election Republicans have been using Donald Trump's Big Lie as justification to push draconian voter suppression laws in states across America — endangering our voting rights in 2022 and beyond. The Senate could protect our democracy and pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. But, Republicans are determined to block this popular legislation by resorting to the antiquated and undemocratic Senate filibuster procedure — which is nowhere to be found in the Constitution. It is simply being used to subvert the will of the American people. [We cannot let this happen. It's time to end or amend the filibuster. Chip in now if you agree and join our fight to preserve the legitimacy of our elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38757712/316920194/-1808413249?amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_PT_3MCL_211118_1_1&refcode2=5c64dcce-8e48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&contactdata=llUPkj3am55Ae2czT4F8lCzZpZMJzunG3J9ia7l9JML5UBCCK9oYfuF9Kkj%2B8ArM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzY0ZGNjZS04ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1oLMTkHyPcsTe1kj8gVeUG-jd-rcVl3pq-MElTbPac=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $7 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38757713/316920196/-1808413249?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=CVH_EM_PT_3MCL_211118_1_1&refcode2=5c64dcce-8e48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&contactdata=llUPkj3am55Ae2czT4F8lCzZpZMJzunG3J9ia7l9JML5UBCCK9oYfuF9Kkj%2B8ArM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzY0ZGNjZS04ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1oLMTkHyPcsTe1kj8gVeUG-jd-rcVl3pq-MElTbPac=)

By its very nature, the filibuster reinforces the already existing anti-democratic structure of the U.S. Senate — where every state receives TWO votes regardless of the size of its population. Functionally, it allows powerful interest groups to block important new initiatives favored by a large majority of the voting population.
In the case of voting rights the filibuster is blocking legislation required to ensure that every eligible voter can participate in our democracy under the American promise of "one person, one vote".
Too much is at stake to allow this open attack on the foundation of our election system to succeed without fighting back to defend American values.
[Join our fight to end the filibuster by chipping in whatever you can here. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38757741/316920222/-1808413249?amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_PT_3MCL_211118_1_1&refcode2=5c64dcce-8e48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&contactdata=llUPkj3am55Ae2czT4F8lCzZpZMJzunG3J9ia7l9JML5UBCCK9oYfuF9Kkj%2B8ArM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzY0ZGNjZS04ZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1oLMTkHyPcsTe1kj8gVeUG-jd-rcVl3pq-MElTbPac=)
Together, we must break through this debilitating gridlock and preserve our democracy.
Onwards,
Chris

clean_body: | | Since the 2020 election Republicans have been using Donald Trump's Big Lie as justification to push draconian voter suppression laws in states across America — endangering our voting rights in 2022 and beyond. The Senate could protect our democracy and pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. But, Republicans are determined to block this popular legislation by resorting to the antiquated and undemocratic Senate filibuster procedure — which is nowhere to be found in the Constitution. It is simply being used to subvert the will of the American people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = By its very nature, the filibuster reinforces the already existing anti-democratic structure of the U.S. Senate — where every state receives TWO votes regardless of the size of its population. Functionally, it allows powerful interest groups to block important new initiatives favored by a large majority of the voting population. In the case of voting rights the filibuster is blocking legislation required to ensure that every eligible voter can participate in our democracy under the American promise of "one person, one vote". Too much is at stake to allow this open attack on the foundation of our election system to succeed without fighting back to defend American values. = Together, we must break through this debilitating gridlock and preserve our democracy. Onwards, Chris * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

body:
|
#
| | **Trump Claimed Republican Leaders Wanted Pelosi and Schiff Sued – But It Never Happened**
---
In a bombshell new book by _ABC News_ reporter Jonathan Karl, new details have emerged about Trump’s continued abuse of power and love affair with autocracy. This time, it centers around him trying to use the White House to sue... me. And the Speaker. All because we were doing our jobs.
In a meeting, Trump lied to White House Counsel, saying that the Republican House leadership demanded the White House sue me and Pelosi. And then demanded they carry it out.
Let that sink in. The President of the United States tried to pressure the White House legal team, with a blatantly false lie, to _leverage the power of the White House to sue me_ and the Speaker of the House.
Why you may ask? Because he wanted to silence us. He wanted to stop us from revealing his abuses and crimes against our country. He wanted to discredit us. And he wanted to punish us for pursuing the truth.
**That is how a democracy devolves into an autocracy. And we came far too close.**
**These threats aren’t idle, and they inspire real action by extremists. Can you rush $10 to our campaign right now? We cannot allow Trump’s lies and legal threats to go unanswered.**

But let’s take a step back, what if myself and Speaker Pelosi weren’t standing in Donald Trump’s way as he pushed our democracy to the brink?
That is the situation we would confront if Kevin McCarthy ever held the Speaker’s gavel. And if Trump and McCarthy ever both held power at the same time... our democracy could very well come to its bitter end. And we might slide into autocracy.
**We can’t let that nightmare happen. We need to build the resources necessary to protect Democrats across the country and prepare for my own personal – and potentially difficult – re-election next year. It’s not going to be easy, but with your help, we can hold the majority and our democracy.**

name: Nate Sandvig
subject: Portland Progressives Backpedaling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/08c635136b82858d/fe27dcd4cad69444c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends, Cause and effect is a concept that Portland progressive just can’t seem to grasp.

One year after their “Defund the Police” budget cuts to appease the anarchist mob, 200 officers have left the city’s police department – citing low morale and lack of support.

Their anti-police agenda has been DISASTROUS for Portland and our state...

**Police staffing is at a record low and homicides have hit a record high.** The criminals are running rampant, families no longer feel safe, and business owners are closing up shop.****

Now, Mayor Wheeler is DESPERATE to quell public outrage... proposing $25,000 signing bonuses to hire more officers!
This is what FAILED LEADERSHIP looks like. Enough is enough.

name: Kathy Barnette Press Team
subject: Kathy takes a stand against vaccine mandates on live TV
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pF6WqBpwkzAvWONuPgZa7okl2K_ixBwTqLijZohdXtFn_hoZ5YYMQiADe3FrSb0XrO_4KV6QxMmW0LmodNMgUecZ1i36gGmAf7wt3CPlwNXi27ovTM9WFp6-JZks1i3UKUIXpGcz6SjR3nRnVUIqKpbG29VsYDxqOPckwx-W93Ihyr4kF2-f19wzLskXC1b6NL03ffuXG3o=&c=kXllRRZ_RVX1McItpbMwSHDPrgdTSwoEPHo58MoWalNavCxGDY0Gmg==&ch=R9Dkvmn69X_x5mmTEt3nnq7iQ93539fWKUpkBi5Q5qWAbDpoamAfcA==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| The United States was founded for the purpose of protecting our fundamental rights. One of the most important of these fundamental and universal rights is the right to make personal medical decisions for yourself.
Meanwhile, Joe Biden continues to expand vaccine mandates to more segments of American life. First, he mandated vaccines for the military. Then, he mandated vaccines for healthcare workers. Then, he mandated vaccines for everyone working at a company with 100 employees or more.
---
| | | [STAND UP FOR OUR RIGHTS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pF6WqBpwkzAvWONuPgZa7okl2K_ixBwTqLijZohdXtFn_hoZ5YYMQiADe3FrSb0XrO_4KV6QxMmW0LmodNMgUecZ1i36gGmAf7wt3CPlwNXi27ovTM9WFp6-JZks1i3UKUIXpGcz6SjR3nRnVUIqKpbG29VsYDxqOPckwx-W93Ihyr4kF2-f19wzLskXC1b6NL03ffuXG3o=&c=kXllRRZ_RVX1McItpbMwSHDPrgdTSwoEPHo58MoWalNavCxGDY0Gmg==&ch=R9Dkvmn69X_x5mmTEt3nnq7iQ93539fWKUpkBi5Q5qWAbDpoamAfcA==)
---
| This is tyranny plain and simple, and as your next Senator from the great state of Pennsylvania, I will always stand against any mandate of any kind forced on the American people.
I've already started standing up to these vaccine mandates. As you can see, I just recently went on Newsmax to make clear that the American people will not stand for such government interference in our daily lives!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pF6WqBpwkzAvWONuPgZa7okl2K_ixBwTqLijZohdXtFn_hoZ5YYMQiADe3FrSb0XrO_4KV6QxMmW0LmodNMgUecZ1i36gGmAf7wt3CPlwNXi27ovTM9WFp6-JZks1i3UKUIXpGcz6SjR3nRnVUIqKpbG29VsYDxqOPckwx-W93Ihyr4kF2-f19wzLskXC1b6NL03ffuXG3o=&c=kXllRRZ_RVX1McItpbMwSHDPrgdTSwoEPHo58MoWalNavCxGDY0Gmg==&ch=R9Dkvmn69X_x5mmTEt3nnq7iQ93539fWKUpkBi5Q5qWAbDpoamAfcA==)

| | | [WATCH THE INTERVIEW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pF6WqBpwkzAvWONuPgZa7okl2K_ixBwTqLijZohdXtFn_hoZ5YYMQiADe3FrSb0XrO_4KV6QxMmW0LmodNMgUecZ1i36gGmAf7wt3CPlwNXi27ovTM9WFp6-JZks1i3UKUIXpGcz6SjR3nRnVUIqKpbG29VsYDxqOPckwx-W93Ihyr4kF2-f19wzLskXC1b6NL03ffuXG3o=&c=kXllRRZ_RVX1McItpbMwSHDPrgdTSwoEPHo58MoWalNavCxGDY0Gmg==&ch=R9Dkvmn69X_x5mmTEt3nnq7iQ93539fWKUpkBi5Q5qWAbDpoamAfcA==)
---
| This is what my grassroots, insurgent campaign for Senate is all about - standing up to the overreaches of the corrupt DC establishment swamp!
With your help, I can go to DC and stand up to the tyranny of the crooked Democrat establishment.
[Will you answer the call to contribute today and help send me to stop progressive overreaches and restore the freedom our great country used to enjoy?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pF6WqBpwkzAvWONuPgZa7okl2K_ixBwTqLijZohdXtFn_hoZ5YYMQiADe3FrSb0XrO_4KV6QxMmW0LmodNMgUecZ1i36gGmAf7wt3CPlwNXi27ovTM9WFp6-JZks1i3UKUIXpGcz6SjR3nRnVUIqKpbG29VsYDxqOPckwx-W93Ihyr4kF2-f19wzLskXC1b6NL03ffuXG3o=&c=kXllRRZ_RVX1McItpbMwSHDPrgdTSwoEPHo58MoWalNavCxGDY0Gmg==&ch=R9Dkvmn69X_x5mmTEt3nnq7iQ93539fWKUpkBi5Q5qWAbDpoamAfcA==)

Peter,

Why I'm running for Governor is simple: It's time to get past the politics of division and focus on making real, meaningful progress for families across our state.

Honestly, it's humbling to realize just how many people believe in what I'm running for. I hope I can count on your support -- please **[chip in and join my team to support real progress for Oregon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38758489/316924482/-1211873717?refcode=em21_welcome1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRhNmY0Mi05MTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNWAxd8zR1P5RfDPNUucicZ3ZppbZoam4sU9OcwzBc8=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38758490/316924483/-1211873717?refcode=em21_welcome1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRhNmY0Mi05MTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNWAxd8zR1P5RfDPNUucicZ3ZppbZoam4sU9OcwzBc8=) I'm not running for Governor just because I want to do things. I'm running for Governor because as a leader, I've realized we can only "get things done" if we work together.

Another thing about me? I'm not an either/or person. I'm a **both/and** person. Take a look at the housing crisis. People are unhoused right now -- and it's on each of us to solve this challenge right now. Everyone has the right to live somewhere with security and dignity.

But while short-term fixes are important they are ultimately insufficient. We also need long term solutions.

This year alone, I led the fight in the legislature to pass the largest housing investment ever for the state's two-year budget -- $765 million statewide to build more affordable housing, preserve existing affordable housing, and more. Throughout my entire time in public service, I've fought to expand housing options. I don't plan on stopping that fight any time soon.

**I need your help this month so we can kick this campaign into high gear -- because this is the campaign that's willing to work together in order to reckon with the legacies of injustice and inequality. This is the campaign where everyone has a place, where nobody will get left behind.**

**[Let's do this -- please chip in $5 or whatever you can so we can keep our campaign in a strong spot. We're in a busy primary, but I believe in our power together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38758491/316924484/-1211873717?refcode=em21_welcome1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRhNmY0Mi05MTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNWAxd8zR1P5RfDPNUucicZ3ZppbZoam4sU9OcwzBc8=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38758493/316924485/-1211873717?refcode=em21_welcome1&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRhNmY0Mi05MTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNWAxd8zR1P5RfDPNUucicZ3ZppbZoam4sU9OcwzBc8=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38758494/316924486/-1211873717?refcode=em21_welcome1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRhNmY0Mi05MTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNWAxd8zR1P5RfDPNUucicZ3ZppbZoam4sU9OcwzBc8=)

name: Team Bass
subject: Karen's ready to build on the momentum of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend --

This week, President Joe Biden signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law. This historic bill is a BIG deal for Los Angeles and our nation. It will create over 1.5 million jobs, invest in roads, bridges, transit, water systems, ports, and broadband, transform public transportation infrastructure, __and__ prioritize climate resilience.

**Karen also helped secure a local hire provision in the final version of the law, bringing thousands of well-paying,_local_ jobs to L.A. and returning our tax dollars back to our communities. **

Karen's delivering on her promise to build our city back better in Congress, and she's ready to continue that progress in City Hall as mayor. While she continues to fight on behalf of Angelenos in Congress, she needs our help building a winning campaign for mayor of Los Angeles.

**[Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual contributions from residents could be matched 6-to-1. Will you chip in to Karen's campaign for mayor to help her put the people of L.A. first?](https://act.myngp.com/el/YG4VXlPDqTCC7ubIXj-8BnAoG-jELL6BwHDsNu-qgWU=/XhsctjxUMwMuecNfiuxSijAZl4Uw0VTkRkL1FhaF9hg=?ms=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/YG4VXlPDqTCC7ubIXj-8BnAoG-jELL6BwHDsNu-qgWU=/XhsctjxUMwMuecNfiuxSijAZl4Uw0VTkRkL1FhaF9hg=?ms=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_albbt1&refcode=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_albbt1&source=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_albbt1&utm_campaign=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_albbt1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

This federal investment in our local workforce will help build our city back better and stronger than before.

Karen has the vision to address homelessness, invest in affordable housing, rebuild our local economies, and tackle the systemic inequities in health care, infrastructure, and more. Now is the time for bold solutions to our city's most pressing issues, and Karen's not holding back. She needs to know you're dedicated to this fight for social and economic justice, too.

**[Will you chip in what you can now to help Karen take this momentum to City Hall? Individual donations from L.A. residents could be matched 6-to-1 by the city, so every little bit helps.](https://act.myngp.com/el/YG4VXlPDqTCC7ubIXj-8BnAoG-jELL6BwHDsNu-qgWU=/XhsctjxUMwMuecNfiuxSijAZl4Uw0VTkRkL1FhaF9hg=?ms=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/YG4VXlPDqTCC7ubIXj-8BnAoG-jELL6BwHDsNu-qgWU=/XhsctjxUMwMuecNfiuxSijAZl4Uw0VTkRkL1FhaF9hg=?ms=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alftr&refcode=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alftr&source=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alftr&utm_campaign=em21_211117_infra_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx_alftr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)

name: Team Engel
subject: So what's Arizona getting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
A breakdown of projects coming to Arizona thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill becoming law.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38759323/316928067/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjQzYzY5Ni05MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-09kdCmf_uiBtBYsmOoQgWB6t7QFAFloBYk0_0k5M8=&emci=aafa5a70-2647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=eb43c696-9248-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
After months of negotiations **Congress has finally passed the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38759324/316928068/558373307?refcode=X_111721_BipartisanInfrastructure&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjQzYzY5Ni05MjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-09kdCmf_uiBtBYsmOoQgWB6t7QFAFloBYk0_0k5M8=)
---
This is a huge win for Southern Arizona. Here's a quick look at how the funds from this historic bill will benefit Arizona:
* Create good-paying, clean energy jobs

* Improve the 3,100 miles of Arizona highways and hundreds of bridges that need repairs

* Ensure all of our communities have safe, reliable drinking water

* Deliver reliable high-speed internet to the 14% of Arizonans who currently don't have access

* Improve the resiliency of our infrastructure while helping communities recover from extreme weather events

This is a great first step in improving our infrastructure \-- **but Kirsten knows we can do more and is ready to fight for it. **
**We need to work on expanding Medicare to include dental and vision, we need to extend the child tax credit, and we need to fight for paid family leave. And that's exactly what Kirsten will fight for once she's elected.**

clean_body: A breakdown of projects coming to Arizona thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill becoming law. Friend, After months of negotiations Congress has finally passed the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act! = This is a huge win for Southern Arizona. Here's a quick look at how the funds from this historic bill will benefit Arizona: Create good-paying, clean energy jobs Improve the 3,100 miles of Arizona highways and hundreds of bridges that need repairs Ensure all of our communities have safe, reliable drinking water Deliver reliable high-speed internet to the 14% of Arizonans who currently don't have access Improve the resiliency of our infrastructure while helping communities recover from extreme weather events This is a great first step in improving our infrastructure \-- but Kirsten knows we can do more and is ready to fight for it. We need to work on expanding Medicare to include dental and vision, we need to extend the child tax credit, and we need to fight for paid family leave. And that's exactly what Kirsten will fight for once she's elected.** = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you for all you do, Team Engel Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please._

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Replacing 100 Leftist School Board Members
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Will you join Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. In supporting our campaign to take back our schools from the radical socialist Left? [**_We need your help as we launch a nationwide effort to replace socialist, anti-American school board members with Patriots. Will you please support us?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804362:6wKSWS2bN:m:1:3253819041:B82ECAEAAE3C4505BD56D9D9F1AD6F82:r) For too long, the Left has worked to infiltrate schools and indoctrinate our kids with hateful "critical race theory" lessons. **As you may know, Critical Race Theory or "CRT" teaches our children to ****hate****our country,****hate****our history, and****hate****our American values. ** It's being taught in every state across the nation, and it MUST be stopped. If we're not careful, we will soon wake up in a country run by the generation that was trained by their teachers to hate America. And they'll work to destroy everything our country stands for. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. **_But in the process, we 've neglected smaller local races - like school board - that are often not publicized._** One of the reasons these races get overlooked is that they're discussed as "non-partisan." What that means is radical leftists get to quietly slip into a position of power and waste your tax dollars on "equity" equity consultants and train your children and grandchildren to HATE America. That's the bad news: our nation is under assault by the left, and our children are their number one target. But here's the good news. We can and will stop the radical left from corrupting the minds of an entire generation. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. **Here 's my ****_3R 's Campaign Battle Plan:_****_ _** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. [_**But we can 't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC ahead of the 40+ November elections we're targeting?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804362:6wKSWS2bN:m:1:3253819041:B82ECAEAAE3C4505BD56D9D9F1AD6F82:r) Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! **> >>> Tucker Carlson:**** "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** _ _ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." **> >>> Laura Ingraham:****** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.:****** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the **1776 Project PAC.** **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [_**Help us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, and $100.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804362:6wKSWS2bN:m:1:3253819041:B82ECAEAAE3C4505BD56D9D9F1AD6F82:r) In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [_**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804362:6wKSWS2bN:m:1:3253819041:B82ECAEAAE3C4505BD56D9D9F1AD6F82:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804362:6wKSWS2bN:m:1:3253819041:B82ECAEAAE3C4505BD56D9D9F1AD6F82:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804362:6wKSWS2bN:m:1:3253819041:B82ECAEAAE3C4505BD56D9D9F1AD6F82:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58804362:6wKSWS2bN:m:1:3253819041:B82ECAEAAE3C4505BD56D9D9F1AD6F82:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

| Team,

**We are less than one year out from Election Day 2022. Let me tell you, this year will be gone before we know it.**

After recent wins in Virginia and elsewhere, national Republicans now think they can win the midterm elections. **South Florida is key to holding the majority!**

I am running for re-election so that I can continue to stand up for you in Congress. We’ve already been able to deliver on historic infrastructure, COVID-19 relief, economic assistance for Americans, and assistance for working families. Progress such as the child tax credit that has been landing in bank accounts would not be possible without a Democratic Congress.

[With less than one year until Election Day, we need to ramp up our campaign now so that we can hold our majority and keep delivering for you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Unconstitutional vaccine mandates: smacked down 💥
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Tim Walz wanted them | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c448f77c1f41/unconstitutional-vaccine-mandates-smacked-down?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Yesterday OSHA announced it was [suspending enforcement of Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b76db49141&e=33b11688c1) for employers after getting rebuked by the courts. [Tim Walz praised this overreaching effort](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=cbb925b1c5&e=33b11688c1), and yesterday - while traveling in Europe - he also made it known that _**now**_ he thinks emergency powers are [not actually effective](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=be6cbf0064&e=33b11688c1) when it comes to controlling a pandemic. He even seemed to admit that his choices were being dictated by "political fallout".

I’m glad he’s learned from his mistakes, but the devastation and carnage of the past 18 months... what has it all been for? Following the Cuomo/Newsom playbook and locking our elders in with the sick? Deteriorating our children's mental health with lockdowns, while trying to blame them for spreading the virus? Closing our churches and places of worship?

_The damage is done,_ and I have some thoughts on what needs to happen now:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=a2ed891a77&e=33b11688c1)
---
| Peter, if you've been following our campaign, you know we're running on a robust set of issues: Safety in the Streets, refocusing on our Students instead of broken institutions, ensuring we have Security in our elections, and utilizing Science (NOT political science) when it comes to decision making in our government. Freedom and liberty are at the heart of our campaign!

It has never been more clear that Tim Walz's leadership is often concerned about political implications. Instead of speaking boldly, taking on his own party when its wrong, or involving a diverse set of voices when tackling challenges, he simply fails the test of courage.

A Scott Jensen administration isn't going to "toe the line" or "kiss the ring" of special interests when making decisions. Our challenges are far too complex and our potential as a state is far too high. In the coming weeks, we are going to lay out a bold, new vision for Minnesota - predicated on the strength of OUR PEOPLE and pioneering a positive future. The politics of the last two decades have clouded the vision of many of our leaders, where instead of asking "what's possible?", they ask "which lobbying group am I going to anger with a decision?"

It's time for us to step away from the cynical, political finger-in-the-wind leadership we've come to know. We must make a different decision next November if we want to be a state where our children and grandchildren can thrive. [Take the first step and consider caucusing in February.](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b2905a4396&e=33b11688c1)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
| | | | | | | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c112f35c16&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=8c9dd42509&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=35a9621e78&e=33b11688c1)
---

In the coming weeks, we are going to lay out a bold, new vision for Minnesota - predicated on the strength of OUR PEOPLE and pioneering a positive future. The politics of the last two decades have clouded the vision of many of our leaders, where instead of asking "what's possible?", they ask "which lobbying group am I going to anger with a decision?" It's time for us to step away from the cynical, political finger-in-the-wind leadership we've come to know. We must make a different decision next November if we want to be a state where our children and grandchildren can thrive. In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved. PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR. SCOTT JENSEN FOR GOVERNOR.

name: Mark Holland
subject: The earth is not disposable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/508bad82-8a48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/cb79a81a-9848-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc5YTgxYS05ODQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGRko2BYOXMgj0AEkloamxFCvg6zunF2mA9Fz8PoKck=&id=103697760)

| Dear friend —

How is protecting our planet not a bipartisan issue? This might be one of the most outrageous legacies of our generation of American politics. Our planet is literally reeling from extreme weather, loss of biodiversity, diminished water supplies, drought, and floods. These are observable, quantifiable realities. We can see it right here in Kansas.

In my faith tradition — which includes both Democrats and Republicans — we are the stewards of God’s good creation. Genesis 2:15 says, “The Lord God took the man and put him in the garden of Eden to till it and keep it.” **Please note, the instructions were not to trash it! This home was given to us to protect and care for.**

Kansas farmers till this sacred soil, Kansas ranchers graze the cattle, and Kansas hunters harvest the bounty of the wildlife. This state brings forth food that feeds all of us. And yet, we humans act like we do not value the gift. The earth is not disposable. Our children and grandchildren need it.**Protecting our planet should be the top concern of every person who breathes the air, drinks the water, and eats the food.**

[Please donate today to send a Kansan to the US Senate who cares deeply about protecting the very soil, water, and air that make up our great state. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38760485/316932649/1159943518?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_211118_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc5YTgxYS05ODQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGRko2BYOXMgj0AEkloamxFCvg6zunF2mA9Fz8PoKck=)

There may not be a lot of tree-huggers here in Kansas — in part because there are not a lot of trees! But there are a lot of us who feel we need to leave this planet better off than we found it, for the next generation. [If you agree, please support my campaign:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38760486/316932661/1159943518?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_211118_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc5YTgxYS05ODQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGRko2BYOXMgj0AEkloamxFCvg6zunF2mA9Fz8PoKck=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.
