name: MartinForTN.com
subject: Bill Lee is trying to OUTLAW mask mandates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38760673/316933420/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211118midmonth_MFTweb_active_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjViZDUyMi05OTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5IayBhgXLRR7-RlVpEVvO504D5cn371uapdChfnrhc=)
---
Hey Peter, we have to ask: Is Gov. Bill Lee even aware that we’re still dealing with a global pandemic?
Because just a few days ago, he signed into law a bill that **_almost entirely outlaws mask mandates._**
AND THEN, as if that wasn’t bad enough, he announced yesterday that Tennessee (_our tax dollars_) will cover relocation expenses for law enforcement officers leaving states with strict COVID-19 vaccine mandates. **Let us put that another way: Gov. Lee is saying that if you’re a police officer who got fired because you refused to get the COVID-19, come work in Tennessee!** It’s mind-boggling.
[**We cannot afford another 4 years of Lee’s recklessness and callous disregard for the lives of Tennesseans — make a donation of any amount now to help us ensure that he’s a one-term governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38760674/316933421/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211118midmonth_MFTweb_active_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjViZDUyMi05OTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5IayBhgXLRR7-RlVpEVvO504D5cn371uapdChfnrhc=)

Because just a few days ago, he signed into law a bill that almost entirely outlaws mask mandates. Let us put that another way: Gov. Lee is saying that if you’re a police officer who got fired because you refused to get the COVID-19, come work in Tennessee! As I’m sure you’ve heard, my favorite President -- Donald J. Trump -- is launching a brand new social media app. I’m so excited to sign up! But when I was combing through the thousands of Patriots who pledged to join, **I was disappointed to see your name not on our official list...**
I know you’re busy but could you do me a favor and respond in the next 10 minutes? _I promise to not bug you again! So will you join?_
**[Yes: I Stand With Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vuf1-1lemv-4qqlpo6/)**
**[No: I Don’t Support Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vuf1-1lemw-4qqlpo7/)**
President Trump is building his very own platform to stop Big Tech from controlling what we can and can’t see... censoring strong Conservative voices... and blacklisting content they don’t agree with.... _And the Liberals are desperate to stop him._
**Thousands have already signed a petition to BAN his app from the Apple and Google app stores -- they’ll do ANYTHING to stop him.**
President Trump needs to know we have his back.
[**So would you join? I’ll be on the lookout for your answer in 10 minutes from now.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vuf1-1lemx-4qqlpo8/)
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Sam

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Can you contribute $3 to Mark Kelly’s re-election today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly knows how to win - with your help.
#

Friends —
In the 2020 election, in both my home state of Georgia and Mark Kelly’s home state of Arizona, we demonstrated that years of hard work registering, engaging and mobilizing voters while embracing demographics not as destiny but as opportunity was a recipe for electoral success.
But the most important ingredient in that success was supporters like you who believed victory was achievable and who worked tirelessly to get it done.
Our historic victories were cause for celebration, but that celebration was brief, because both Mark Kelly and Raphael Warnock are back on the ballot next year. In each of our states, we will need to work even harder in 2022 than we did in 2020.
If that thought exhausts you, you’re in good company... but we do not have the luxury of time to waste. Delay, inaction and complacency are not options; we cannot go back and we cannot sit still.
What Mark Kelly did last year with your help — his first time running for office — was remarkable. I know he has what it takes to again withstand the outside spending and negative attacks. It won’t be easy, but Mark is prepared to win a full-term in the Senate, where his continued leadership is needed.
We cannot leave any aspect of this campaign to chance, though, and that’s why I am humbly asking:
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today? He needs all of us to win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)
With your help, Mark’s campaign will register every eligible voter possible, engage Arizonans in every corner of the state, and build a broad coalition of supporters from all walks of life.
As anti-voter politicians work to silence the voices of Arizona voters and voters around the country, Mark will again run a campaign in which every voice is valued — a campaign where no one is unseen, unheard or uninspired.
My father was a shipyard worker and mother a college librarian. Mark comes from similar roots. Hard work, inclusion and service to others is our calling.
But one or two people cannot win an election alone so Mark and I are fortunate to have supporters like you at our side.
[**Please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today. I would not ask were this not so incredibly important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=21&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=22&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=23&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=24&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=25&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211118-1-subs&t=26&refcode2=1675_6688874_-sNOSD&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD)**
---
****
If we work together, fight together, organize together and dream together, we will win. Thank you for all you are doing.
Now, let’s get it done.
Stacey Abrams

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1675%2E6688874%2E-sNOSD).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

subject: Fed Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RIK FOR NEW JERSEY INC
body:
Together we will reject the failed agenda of Phil Murphy and Joe Biden, and with your help, we’ll deny Nancy Pelosi another term as Speaker! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fab3b4773145/urgent-deadline-approaching-5722899?e=146fae137d)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

If there’s one thing that New Jerseyans can agree on, it’s that **one-party rule has made us the least family-friendly, and the least business-friendly state in the nation**.

**In fact, these days, New Jersey’s number one export is people just like you —** hardworking blue-collar taxpayers who are being forced to leave because of high taxes and burdensome regulations.

**Phil Murphy** said it himself: “If taxes are your problem, then New Jersey isn’t for you.”

**That ain’t right — and it’s because of politicians like Phil Murphy, Nancy Pelosi, and Joe Biden that our state and nation continue to decline.**
---
|
---
| [TAKE BACK NEW JERSEY](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=1b8da64dbd&e=146fae137d "TAKE BACK NEW JERSEY")
---
| I’m **Rik Mehta** and I’m running for Congress because I’m fed up with an **out-of-control government** , **high taxes** , **rising inflation** , **supply shortages** , and **less freedom**.

**Peter, can I count on you to join me in this fight?**

Together we will reject the failed agenda of **Phil Murphy** and **Joe Biden** , and with your help, we’ll deny **Nancy Pelosi** another term as Speaker!

**[Chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, or more right now to give our campaign the juice it needs to take on the Biden-Pelosi-Murphy agenda](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=6e0c60b6eb&e=146fae137d)! **

**I’m counting on you, Peter! ** Don’t let me down!

Yours,

Rik Mehta

body:
|
| | | Conservatives are preparing for battle, and right now, **we need you with us more than ever before. **

The Midterm Election results will define the future we leave behind for our children and grandchildren. We cannot hesitate. The time to strike is now. **[Are you with us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806078:6gn_JS2fN:m:1:3253819041:46D53FA7AB8E3E2526FD20351B60A4BE:r "Are you with

_850% Match Activated until 11:59 PM_
We refuse to lie to you, and we won't sugarcoat it for you either. The Radical Left is energized, and they're determined to destroy every lasting legacy President Trump left on this great nation.

_They have the money, and the manpower._

The odds are stacked against us, and **no Conservative is safe.**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: this bill is dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Republicans in Pennsylvania want to make it legal to carry concealed guns without a permit
#

Folks, this is urgent.
Republicans in Pennsylvania want to make it legal to carry concealed guns without a permit, and they’re about to send a bill to Governor Wolf’s desk.
I fought back against the bill on Tuesday when I took the floor to individually name every person who had their life cut short by senseless gun violence in Philly this year.
**This bill is dangerous. So we need to make a lot of noise and show Governor Wolf that Pennsylvanians are AGAINST no-permit concealed carry.**
[Will you sign my petition and tell Governor Wolf to VETO the Republican bill to allow no-permit concealed carry in Pennsylvania?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38762570/316940995/756804357?refcode2=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211118-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ1NDUwNi05YzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7nNgZO48mYQMelThzriECxpJoPc1yLiMMGAG7nQIG0A=&emci=94454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38762571/316940996/756804357?refcode2=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211118-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ1NDUwNi05YzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7nNgZO48mYQMelThzriECxpJoPc1yLiMMGAG7nQIG0A=&emci=94454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)**
391\. That’s how many people have been murdered by gun violence in Philadelphia just in 2021.
That’s 391 too many, but it’s just a fraction of the total number of Americans who have been made victims of gun violence this year.
Gun violence is a public health crisis, and it’s past time we treat it as such.
I’m not afraid of the NRA — and as Pennsylvania’s next United States Senator, I’ll fight to get rid of the filibuster and pass meaningful gun safety legislation that will save lives.
**But today, I’m asking you to stand with me and help defeat this bill. We need a lot of signatures to show that we absolutely OPPOSE no-permit concealed carry.**
[Please add your name now and tell Governor Wolf to immediately veto the bill for no-permit concealed carry in Pennsylvania.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38762572/316940997/756804357?refcode2=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211118-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ1NDUwNi05YzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7nNgZO48mYQMelThzriECxpJoPc1yLiMMGAG7nQIG0A=&emci=94454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38762573/316940998/756804357?refcode2=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211118-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ1NDUwNi05YzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7nNgZO48mYQMelThzriECxpJoPc1yLiMMGAG7nQIG0A=&emci=94454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=95454506-9c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)**

\- Malcolm

This once-in-a-generation legislation will turbocharge economic growth in districts like PA-07.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38762654/316941413/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211118-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdhNWZiMi05YzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGvp66jzzcMMh6HeA9bfiUDui_s4A3e4Xs8aetm8u8g=)

| Peter,

**Earlier this week, I was proud to stand with President Biden as he signed the historic Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law.**

This once-in-a-generation legislation will turbocharge economic growth in districts like PA-07 by securing key funding to repair and improve our roads and bridges, increase access to broadband in all areas, ensure clean drinking water, and create good-paying jobs. The long-term effect of these changes is sure to be monumental.

But here’s the thing: this kind of large-scale change can only happen with a Democratic majority in Congress. Between a razor-thin margin and upcoming redistricting, we cannot afford to lose a single seat if we’re going to hold on to the House in 2022.

clean_body: This once-in-a-generation legislation will turbocharge economic growth in districts like PA-07. | = | Peter, Earlier this week, I was proud to stand with President Biden as he signed the historic Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law. This once-in-a-generation legislation will turbocharge economic growth in districts like PA-07 by securing key funding to repair and improve our roads and bridges, increase access to broadband in all areas, ensure clean drinking water, and create good-paying jobs. The long-term effect of these changes is sure to be monumental. But here’s the thing: this kind of large-scale change can only happen with a Democratic majority in Congress. Between a razor-thin margin and upcoming redistricting, we cannot afford to lose a single seat if we’re going to hold on to the House in 2022. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. Susan's campaign runs on grassroots donations. = = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. subject: Stand with Parents!
body:
It’s become clear to concerned citizens across the country that total far-left control is bad for parents - it shuts them out of the classroom completely!

| Peter,

It's become clear to concerned citizens across the country that total far-left control is bad for parents - it shuts them out of the classroom completely!
Parents were left helpless recently as Teachers Unions, liberal special interests, and Democrat politicians ignored science to keep class on Zoom, and pushed for curriculums full of Critical Race Theory and other far-left ideologies.
Isn't it time we get leadership that actually stands with parents instead of their own agendas? [You can join the growing chorus of thousands of Americans who think so by signing on to this petition today.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cTzC7i6mTOOxr6ovf2oFbcurLX6N3e0DR8xXEA9lQuzxOK6WX7GVlurdg4bVk6g6-0RPs5iGYO6EEPY7QvWhxDaDAWatjbWIQo5SrA_exir9rycq1bZwlhaPcm9mYHOdhHJhG49aYmhQ4t3u6_7fF_zoOcpKai4QXteseW6JrINwAD7fcwVR5ZB9ZZhRwc95H7XdfG0z5fXGJ8VuZuhGLA==&c=1d5iZ4LWAJLWdkVdtBfCk6AejhyyKnU1AhM66k_TQUW7zgnUPl7d_A==&ch=sjkzGfopYiYRWeAtc9F1JpXUnk1WFw-pZKlgV0k-ko8bgrTABz7Ctw==)

| The longer states like Nevada are stuck with politicians like Steve Sisolak, the longer parents will continue to have their voices ignored when it comes to their kids' education.
But with Sheriff Joe Lombardo in charge, we can finally start to see a change on this front.
Parents can feel empowered with expanded access to charter schools, school choice, and opportunity scholarships. They can finally know that they have a say on something as important as their son or daughter's time in the classroom!
So join Sheriff Joe and the concerned citizens across the country who believe it's time parents are given the support they need - add your name to the petition below!

body:
Democrats want to make some simple truths FORBIDDEN to say. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8039%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=tLQ8Dkv4H7IBhsWwNBifDQ&sysid=1)

Friend, Democrats want to make some simple truths FORBIDDEN to say.
So, I'm going to commit a radical act. I'm going to speak the truth:
**America is the _GREATEST_ country on Earth. **
**Christopher Columbus discovering America was a good thing. **
**George Washington was an extraordinary national hero. **
**Thomas Jefferson was an extraordinary national hero. **
**Abraham Lincoln was an extraordinary national hero. **
**Police Officers keep us safe. **
**Israel is our friend. **
**COVID-19 came from _CHINA_. **
**There is a difference between men and women. **
**Critical Race Theory is RACIST. It shouldn't be taught in schools.** Sadly, for Democrats these basic truths (and many others) are unspeakable.
We must say them loudly and often to save our country and culture.
[**If you agree, please click to donate now, and help my campaign to build a national movement to defeat Democrats' far-left ideological agenda and their progressive political front that hates America! **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WkdnrClP2UlbNJRnXQ%2ftBA&sysid=1)
_I will never stop speaking the truth or stop speaking up for YOU! _
For Liberty,

body:
Stop the Madness | Fight for North Jersey | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/75f55992203b/casha-launches-agressive-campaign-13447903?e=ade10d3dbe)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

We want to know!

Tell us which _quality_ is **most important** to YOU in our next Congressman.

We know the awful qualities of the left - the lying ("inflation is good") - the pandering ("my old friend in China") - the ideological blindness ("Americans can afford higher gas prices").

The Biden/Pelosi/AOC/Sherrill qualities are Un-American and will lead to the ruination of our great country.

Take our poll now, Peter, and let's work together to STOP THE MADNESS!
---
| [TAKE THE POLL](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=5b24b61ad3&e=ade10d3dbe "TAKE THE POLL")
---
|
---
| _About Larry and his campaign:
Larry is the sitting Republican State Committeeman from Morris County, has served as Council President in Kinnelon Borough and as a Trustee to the County College of Morris. He has lived his entire life in New Jersey’s 11th District. He is a small business owner deeply involved in community and charitable organizations. Larry and his wife Debra dated in high school and now are law partners. They have spent their careers fighting for the forgotten residents of New Jersey who have been abandoned by Washington and Trenton bureaucrats. It is time New Jersey gets more back on every dollar in taxes we send to Washington. It is time to save our nation from Pelosi’s socialist agenda, that is supported by Mikie Sherrill, which is attempting to change the fabric of the country. This shortchanges New Jersey, driving away the very friends and neighbors with whom we grew up._

**McCarthy promises Marjorie Taylor Greene Committee Assignments Back**
_\- Newsweek_
Friend,

**Kevin McCarthy just promised that if the GOP takes the House back, Republicans like Paul Gosar and Marjorie Taylor Greene will "have committee" assignments back.** He even said that he'd consider giving them "better committees."

Earlier this year, GOP leadership stripped Taylor Greene of her committees after her past social media comments came to light. She advocated for violence against Nancy Pelosi and Barack Obama, denied the Sept. 11 attacks, and even alleged that a Jewish space laser started wildfires in California.

Now, we can only assume that McCarthy is making these promises at Trump's behest in exchange for the Speaker's gavel. We have to do everything we can to stop the GOP from getting the majority, and that starts with holding McCarthy accountable right here in his backyard.

clean_body: | = McCarthy promises Marjorie Taylor Greene Committee Assignments Back \- Newsweek Friend, Kevin McCarthy just promised that if the GOP takes the House back, Republicans like Paul Gosar and Marjorie Taylor Greene will "have committee" assignments back. He even said that he'd consider giving them "better committees." Earlier this year, GOP leadership stripped Taylor Greene of her committees after her past social media comments came to light. She advocated for violence against Nancy Pelosi and Barack Obama, denied the Sept. 11 attacks, and even alleged that a Jewish space laser started wildfires in California. Now, we can only assume that McCarthy is making these promises at Trump's behest in exchange for the Speaker's gavel. We have to do everything we can to stop the GOP from getting the majority, and that starts with holding McCarthy accountable right here in his backyard. Every moment McCarthy spends fighting off our campaign in his backyard is one less minute he has to help the Republicans retake the House. That alone is worth asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = One thing we know for certain: McCarthy is going to have to answer to this community sooner or later. Meanwhile, Marisa is putting forward a better alternative -- one who actually puts working families, farmers, and small businesses first. Let's do this, Team Marisa Wood = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. name: Team Allen
subject: We’re proud of this endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
body:
Hi, Peter Willis.
We’re always proud and grateful for every endorsement Danielle receives as she runs for governor.
It means a lot to Danielle and our entire team to know people and organizations across the Commonwealth are standing with her, sharing her vision for Massachusetts.
Right now, we’re proud — and equally humbled — Danielle has received an endorsement from the Higher Heights PAC. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25]
Higher Heights is the only national organization providing Black women with a political home. They are exclusively dedicated to harnessing their power to expand Black women’s elected representation and voting participation while advancing progressive policies.
As a Black woman running for governor, Danielle knows she is setting an example for other Black women and girls to, in the words of Higher Heights, “run, win, and lead.”
That’s why the Higher Heights PAC endorsement [https://allenforma.com/2021/11/17/higher-heights-pac/] of our race means so much to our team. The endorsement helps shine a spotlight on what powerful Black women can accomplish when they harness their power for political good.
Will you show your support as well, Peter Willis? Danielle is building an unparalleled grassroots coalition in every part of Massachusetts, and your donation expands our efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25]
Donate ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25]
Thank you for your continuing support — and thank you to the Higher Heights PAC for their endorsement of Danielle and confidence in our race.
— Team Allen

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25]
Danielle is a nonprofit leader, policy innovator, educator, and mom. Over the last twenty years, she has led organizations at all scales from local civic education providers to the $6 billion Mellon Foundation. Her leadership is characterized by listening, collaborating, and innovating– as in leading a multi-disciplinary COVID response team that led to the Biden-Harris Pandemic Testing Board and an interstate compact to build out COVID testing resources.
Donate Now ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/da4manov2021?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.18_b1_TA_all&amount=25]
Learn more at allenformassachusetts.com [https://allenformassachusetts.com/]
PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN 124 Washington Street Suite 101 Foxborough, MA 02035 United States [#]

name: Team Kilmer
subject: There's another bipartisan package on the horizon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Earlier this month, Derek and his colleagues in the House passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. This law is the largest long-lasting investment in our country's infrastructure in a generation, but Derek isn't done yet!

**There 's another bipartisan package on the horizon**, and it includes a bill that Derek is championing in Congress: the RECOMPETE Act.

This legislation will help economically distressed communities get back on their feet by establishing a new federal grant program to provide flexible, long-term assistance. These grants will invest in workers, address local needs, create new jobs, and ensure communities can bounce back.

Derek is the lead co-sponsor on the RECOMPETE Act because he knows this bill will _really_ work. **Instead of a one-size-fits-all approach, Derek 's bill is focused on local needs and would empower communities to make the best decisions for their own economic recovery. **

The RECOMPETE Act focuses on communities that were struggling even before the COVID-19 pandemic. For these communities, returning to pre-pandemic normalcy is not good enough. The RECOMPETE Act will give them the jump start they need to build back _better_.

**[Derek needs your help to show broad public support for getting the RECOMPETE Act and Build Back Better Agenda over the finish line. Will you sign on now as a strong, grassroots supporter of this critical legislation?](https://act.myngp.com/el/NU8eqHEmpMLuLawiK0NgpUEkETwV4CqgS0-gLgYKwJQ=/iXrWpn6I3260gE4Escj3k-XR3gJzZWPmpceK2tVy0kw=?ms=em21_211119_RBBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em21_211119_RBBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_211119_RBBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211119_RBBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/NU8eqHEmpMLuLawiK0NgpUEkETwV4CqgS0-gLgYKwJQ=/wfzSPU3WoRvr6xFxQUUlYw2BSQl4EIfMFSSPNUsvWBE=?refcode=em21_211119_RBBB_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211119_RBBB_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})

body:
I know you've heard from my team a lot lately, but this is such an important moment
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38764083/316948392/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1098-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBiYjk3MS1hMjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkp0btpTYBdOWlVyoEkRT6uAVO_3L5SWqLZhsE9ww78=)
---
Peter,

I know you've heard from my team a lot lately, but that's because this is such an important moment for our grassroots campaign: **Just as Republicans are ramping up their efforts to unseat me, I'm about to head into a fundraising blackout.**
Because you're one of my top supporters, I know you'll agree that it's more important than ever to keep New Mexico blue. Republicans are using their power in states across the country to unleash a wave of voter suppression laws, fan the flames of hate, and sow division – **but I won't let that happen here in New Mexico.**
It's up to the people – that means you, Peter – to stand up for your rights, your community, and our democracy. **So will you join me in this fight, Peter?**
**To keep New Mexico blue, I need to hit my goals every step of the way, and I'm coming up on our biggest fundraising deadline yet. Right now, we urgently need to raise $150,000 before the end of this month, because I won't be able to fundraise from December through March during the legislative session while my opponents can. Please, give whatever you can now.**
**[With everything on the line in this election, I can't afford to let my resources run dry during this fundraising blackout: Will you donate $5 right now to help me keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38764084/316948393/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1098-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBiYjk3MS1hMjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkp0btpTYBdOWlVyoEkRT6uAVO_3L5SWqLZhsE9ww78=)**
Thank you for your support,

Michelle Lujan Grisham

clean_body: | | | | Nancy Pelosi just passed another $1.25 trillion in wasteful spending. Apparently the $6 trillion that was already spent this year isn't enough! Hi Friend - Nancy Pelosi just passed another $1.25 trillion in wasteful spending. Apparently the $6 trillion that was already spent this year isn't enough! This is crazy. We cannot afford to keep mortgaging our children's futures. Inflation is out of control. Our supply chain is broken. And the Democrats like Stephanie Murphy are throwing money at their friends and campaign contributors! | The worst part about this "infrastructure" spending bill is the fact that no one knows what's in it. It's another case of Nancy Pelosi's favorite saying "we have to pass it to see what's in it". But liberal Democrats like Stephanie Murphy think this is completely fine. She was one of the biggest cheerleaders for this bill. Not one of the families I have talked to in our district supports this legislation. They want real solutions to their problems, not more wasteful spending. If we don't take back the House next year the Democrats will spend another $7 trillion in waste. They'll do it the year after too. No matter how much they spend it will never be enough. It will never fix our real problems. We have to stop it. Join our campaign today, and we can put an end to this insanity together. | Thank you for your generous support, Brady Duke Republican for Congress USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY. Brady Duke - Navy Seal 83 Geneva Dr #622673, Orlando, FL 32762

| Friend,

Joe Biden’s Build Back Better Bill will do nothing except build back **BROKE**.

**The past 10 months under the Biden Administration has been one giant _failure!_** The Left and Joe Biden have proven to us that they have no business leading our country. Crisis after crisis, life in America under this Administration becomes harder.

>From the current supply chain flow, to historic inflation, to empty store shelves, to the southern border crisis, to outrageous gas prices, to unconstitutional mandates; the Democrats have shown us all that they can’t protect America or ensure our freedom.

[_**We have to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and stand up to the Socialists in Congress. With your support, we can get our great nation back on track. >>>**_](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b9c86ac735&e=598f6aa24c) **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=8fa188bdbe&e=598f6aa24c)

[**_Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or even $25 dollars so we can ensure the Red Wave comes to Georgia in 2022? >>>_**](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=4d503279b6&e=598f6aa24c) [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=4d21c50853&e=598f6aa24c)

subject: Empty Shelves Biden
body:
The supply chain crisis is a direct result of the Biden administration’s total incompetence.
---

| Friend,

The supply chain crisis is a direct result of the Biden administration's total incompetence.
There simply aren't enough goods on shelves. Even if there were, Bidenflation has made groceries exorbitantly more expensive than they were under President Trump.
Biden's far-left socialist "economics" is destroying working-class wallets and our Nation's economy.
---

| President Biden has been asleep at the wheel. Either that, or he just doesn't care. After all, his radical spending habits and leftist policies don't negatively affect him or his cronies. If he ever runs short of funds, he will just raise taxes on you while he spends America deeper into debt.
This has to stop. We need to return to a government that puts America First by:

* Bringing our jobs back from overseas; resulting in less reliance on foreign markets and China.
* Pushing for energy independence by supporting our native gas industries and jobs.
* Ending this wasteful Leftist spending.

Kat has always pushed for an America First economy. But, she needs your support to retake the House and end the supply chain crisis.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Don’t believe their lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806988:JjU6zS2-N:m:1:3253819041:EE5AEBCA97E0E87531ED3564E8C87047:r)

---
Peter - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it.

All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans.

I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806988:JjU6zS2-N:m:1:3253819041:EE5AEBCA97E0E87531ED3564E8C87047:r)
Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump.

President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - _a mentor, a confidante, and a friend._

Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run.

Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806988:JjU6zS2-N:m:1:3253819041:EE5AEBCA97E0E87531ED3564E8C87047:r)
I firmly believe national leaders are taking our country down the wrong path. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year, which starts in Georgia by defeating the country's most vulnerable Senate Democrat.

**[Peter, if you agree that our nation is on the wrong track and desperately needs fresh, new leaders who will unite us instead of dividing us, will you support my campaign with a personal contribution of $25, $34, $50 or $100?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806988:JjU6zS2-N:m:1:3253819041:EE5AEBCA97E0E87531ED3564E8C87047:r)**

Once we elect the right people to office and hold them accountable, we will bring this nation together rather than tearing it further apart. That's one of the reasons why I'm running for the U.S. Senate and why I'm humbly asking for your personal financial support today.

Sincerely,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806988:JjU6zS2-N:m:1:3253819041:EE5AEBCA97E0E87531ED3564E8C87047:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. This is a dangerous world. There's too much at stake right now to be pitting American against American. If you agree, then I need all the support I can get to win this important race for our country's future. **[Will you join my team and mail your contribution of $25, $34, $50, $100 or more today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806988:JjU6zS2-N:m:1:3253819041:EE5AEBCA97E0E87531ED3564E8C87047:r)**

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806988:JjU6zS2-N:m:1:3253819041:EE5AEBCA97E0E87531ED3564E8C87047:r)

clean_body: If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. | Peter - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it. All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans. I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome. Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump. President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - a mentor, a confidante, and a friend. Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run. Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation. I firmly believe national leaders are taking our country down the wrong path. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year, which starts in Georgia by defeating the country's most vulnerable Senate Democrat. Once we elect the right people to office and hold them accountable, we will bring this nation together rather than tearing it further apart. That's one of the reasons why I'm running for the U.S. Senate and why I'm humbly asking for your personal financial support today. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. This is a dangerous world. There's too much at stake right now to be pitting American against American. If you agree, then I need all the support I can get to win this important race for our country's future. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Calling for Accountability
body:
Beacon Hill Must do Better
| | | |
---
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, issued the following statement today regarding the end of legislative formal sessions for 2021:
"I am concerned that the Legislature's failure to complete work on several substantial bills before the end of formal sessions last night, including how to allocate almost $4 billion of money for pandemic-related concerns, will lead to these proposals being passed during informal sessions where there is no debate and no recorded votes.

"This is no way to make important decisions under normal circumstances, but it's even worse that it's coming at a time when the State House literally has been closed to the public for more than 600 days. I believe the people of Massachusetts deserve better and demand greater accountability from members of the Legislature. Taxpayers need important spending decisions to be made in the light of day, and voters deserve to know how their legislators are voting on important business.

"Therefore, I call upon members of the House and Senate to suspend their internal Joint Rule 12A and extend the time for formal legislative sessions for another month, through the third Wednesday in December. That way, legislators will have additional time to make sure any decisions they make on spending are fiscally responsible and above board. There must be checks and balances in-place, along with transparency and public accountability, to control passage of measures and spending that either need more deliberation or shouldn't be passed at all."

Diehl, a Republican and former State Representative from Whitman, has made government accountability and fiscal responsibility a cornerstone of his campaign for Governor, and has repeatedly called for measures to ensure greater election integrity in Massachusetts.

|

---
|
---
|

| |
---
|

Give me a moment to explain why we’re top targets for the National GOP, [_**then please split a $10 donation between our campaigns to defend our slim 50-50 Democratic Senate majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38764915/316951570/1869494812?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211118_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk2NWQ2ZC1hNTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gCutUdIJghkw0JnASzVlJoxrNF9zt0ISP4Tg5zES0f0=) Mitch McConnell recently said he thinks next year’s elections will be good for Republicans and he’s optimistic about flipping seats like mine and Michael’s to take back the Senate. Our Democratic majority overcame partisan gridlock to pass a historic infrastructure bill that will create jobs, transform our highways and bridges, and make our country more competitive on the global stage. We’ve got so much more to get done for folks in New Hampshire, Colorado, and nationwide but Michael and I are vulnerable to incoming attacks. I won my last election by just 1,017 votes, and wealthy, self-funders and Trump loyalists are running to defeat Michael. name: Carleah Summers
subject: Did you see how Trone characterized people struggling with addiction?
body:
Hey Team Carleah!

Did you see our latest post? Our opponent, David Trone, has chosen to depict those with substance use disorders as cartoon criminals stealing pill bottles from pharmacies- _ON HIS CAMPAIGN WEBSITE_!

If you think that's as ludicrous as we do, make sure to check out, like, and share the post on [Facebook](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/ea668fd613eb5f778d36d6a999340f4a9c7ef41f?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvotecarleahsummers%2Fphotos%2Fa.109646838151958%2F129293096187332&userId=7788844&signature=0148dfca2903d769), [Instagram](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/6335abae0c061cf960a67e3c9ae91dbc3ea64777?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fp%2FCWbaPfcJ4A1%2F&userId=7788844&signature=0aa2f069df927635), [Twitter](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/4ef9bd187a7c00dbd3a6476700ac91a5e8bad37d?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fcarleahsummers%2Fstatus%2F1461409154900414472&userId=7788844&signature=42300d71d37cfa1a), and TikTok!

Also, **please consider[donating this week](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/596fa0605f4bc9853c0f3e6882462cbc3f1691d4?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcarleah&userId=7788844&signature=e71b25a2d9b40431) as our funds are running dry!** Just $10, $20, or whatever you can spare would be a huge help towards our goals- remember, we are running against an incumbent who can easily self-fund with millions of dollars. We have to make our voices heard! We also heavily encourage setting up monthly recurring donations so we can have a better idea of where we'll be and a consistent amount of funds.

Finally, we want to thank our previous volunteer coordinator Kathy Brown for the work she's put in so far- sadly she's had to step back for a while to balance her time. That being said, if you are interested in the position, please reply! You would be tasked with sending regular (at least weekly), high energy emails to keep our volunteers (you) engaged!

In the meantime, I (Brett Guessford- campaign advisor, endorsement director, and assistant scheduler) will be taking up the task when I can- I hope I live up to your expectations!

Solidarity,

Brett

\--

**Vote Carleah Summers**
[Website](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/bdcf99ba3b36f882aaf6a6624479e8de79d51dd6?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.carleahsummers.com%2F&userId=7788844&signature=7fd92b72b1e39136) | [Facebook](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/5e219a8a2929cbaaef6e2b988244d8d05e34ae71?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvotecarleahsummers%2F&userId=7788844&signature=8d7d9167b12fb9d1) | [Twitter](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/4fa8a063477e92237f9eb66ce40c408fbee0eed8?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fcarleahsummers&userId=7788844&signature=e81e6db1857ee65d) | [Instagram](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/ea288fa90e9442a561f268db12e2054e7efba384?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fvotecarleahsummers&userId=7788844&signature=a981afbdb9d013f8)
[Donate](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/8b357ddb5c0c1d2259fe054f6d1ce351d22c3b62?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcarleah&userId=7788844&signature=b19f4e22c298a551) | [Volunteer Form](https://mailtrack.io/trace/link/09a83d800f37a02a613c950086a288b8db07d987?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2Fteamcarleah&userId=7788844&signature=298b2b76cc84ccc8)
[carleahsummers@gmail.com](mailto:carleahsummers@gmail.com)

name: Team Greitens
subject: We Must Stop Swampy Establishment Insiders in DC And Missouri Who Oppose President Trump And His America First Agenda
disclaimer_text: paid for by these morally bankrupt individuals masquerading as "political consultants
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| We Must Stop Swampy Establishment Insiders in DC And Missouri Who Oppose President Trump And His America First Agenda
---
| St. Louis, MO - Swampy Missouri and DC insiders are frightened at the thought of former Navy SEAL and Governor Eric Greitens becoming Senator because he will not be beholden to special interest groups and lobbyists who bleed Missouri dry. They know Governor Greitens cannot be bought and paid for by these morally bankrupt individuals masquerading as "political consultants."
Instead of fighting for the America First agenda and supporting President Donald J. Trump, establishment RINOs are more interested in protecting the status quo and their Swamportunities. Instead of helping the people of Missouri and their fellow Americans, they seek to take advantage of everyday Americans in order to enrich themselves and fatten their wallets.
Governor Greitens has made a courageous stand against the RINO establishment by pledging to support new leadership in the U.S. Senate. Shaking up the status quo terrifies the political and consultant class, but no amount of their whining against the MAGA movement will stop patriots like Governor Greitens from stepping up to fight against the liberal agenda destroying the country.
"The RINOs don't scare me," [Governor Greitens said](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012apNzsEOOTFxSsKxyfL53OIRzi6fPdj9xagvlYC5cwVjKvyusDACPstkBRnH07dJeasssxRFdlaf69oXdJeRZw_ObXW9DyfZ0oIKa_64vGJPj3Jm1KF3P7nP7yIxoV0kWvqVLwed7HnDZeVkt4skOk15JZ3-XVvYm3MIXSieWF5q82dGd8O9dg==&c=MORIHXW-NfGYJCL9bS8CQet4sn-ys6HfE7PCFSi_zqIGMixqnAw6yg==&ch=KvkvtqGix_dfGzr-3xPi9-nU6LB5n6W_5Wt1q-Q6pUPHOeCipdqSYQ==) this week on Steve Bannon's War Room.
[Watch Governor Greitens' new ad announcing he will not vote for Mitch McConnell for Senate leadership.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012apNzsEOOTFxSsKxyfL53OIRzi6fPdj9xagvlYC5cwVjKvyusDACPstkBRnH07dJD61mAqnCG2wavdYnSZat2AjlLRUmKb1tCMr_nS3w4CHr0LH1B97UviS_GmnPXvlg2F7yfN68tDOaramypnGP6g==&c=MORIHXW-NfGYJCL9bS8CQet4sn-ys6HfE7PCFSi_zqIGMixqnAw6yg==&ch=KvkvtqGix_dfGzr-3xPi9-nU6LB5n6W_5Wt1q-Q6pUPHOeCipdqSYQ==)
Follow Governor Greitens at [twitter.com/EricGreitens](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012apNzsEOOTFxSsKxyfL53OIRzi6fPdj9xagvlYC5cwVjKvyusDACPiLwtbhu8K-b9dXiMsLkF46FOt_I1yzM06ekveEXag_gqGmbam5-NhKM-rH_knngE2cm60jdABZiFiSX2dtwvOZeBY20FjQ6KDSGplyNUnUC&c=MORIHXW-NfGYJCL9bS8CQet4sn-ys6HfE7PCFSi_zqIGMixqnAw6yg==&ch=KvkvtqGix_dfGzr-3xPi9-nU6LB5n6W_5Wt1q-Q6pUPHOeCipdqSYQ==)

The past few weeks have been extremely busy. We are in a war that is unique in human history. This conflict demands the combined efforts of all who value freedom to stand in solidarity, or watch the world descend into darkness. That is not an overstatement...

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Americans left behind in Afghanistan grows
body:
(and not a word from the Leftist media)
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nz4TrqlNw9JV-9LmnIgn4W2W628_TNhQgKRIE5FJdRZHFDCIz4PpDE0-JC21mULqE6Ow3A8guugclW0rXf3mroKlHXT8QjQIcQaoeBFC8K6oLES9wBMh93qjjz2Jec5Z5s2b9kMkM6HBt4dlRH4cxKfVnjt9Nn0h&c=ogDD6pHXCbQ8TWbohJcMTNNbBJoex03dxE8l2aLO_160s5SFWBJJlQ==&ch=uwC13-kuZ6_xSLcMvHMjJTMAxMoXxLX_vnUgi5SUuH91_QS4Ui8W5A==)
---
|
---
|
# Americans abandoned, Michael Bennet is complicit
---
Every day we find out there are more Americans still left behind in Afghanistan. Following the disastrous withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan, their security is tenuous. Has the Biden administration been lying to us?
Shortly after the tragic failure, it was reported that only about 100 Americans were still left in that war-torn country. Foreignpolicy.com is reporting that the State Department believes there is as many as 14,000 Americans left in Afghanistan. Whether it's one American or 14,000, no American should be left behind. Our government and our military exist solely to serve the American people. Period.
Of course, we're hearing very little from the Leftist media about the ongoing impacts from Joe Biden's haphazard withdrawal--a disaster Michael Bennet covered up and is therefore complicit in. We now know Afghanistan's economy is collapsing and its people are starving; Americans are living in these conditions as well.
It could have been prevented. Michael Bennet, who serves on the U.S. Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, never spoke up. Of course, he has a long history of not standing up for anything, especially the people of Colorado or this country. I would have exhausted every effort to ensure there was a clear and reasonable plan to withdraw--all American citizens first, then equipment (worth more than $80 billion), and finally the military. But sadly, you won't hear any more about it on the news. By the way, where have all the honorable reporters gone?
Bennet says he "believes in a strong, thoughtful security policy that advances U.S. interests abroad while protecting our nation at home," yet his actions prove otherwise. In fact, it seems he is doing everything possible to undermine our national security abroad, and our public safety at home.
Help me bring courage, honor, and virtue to Washington. On the field of battle, I grew to trust the actions of men and women over their words. In this political arena, I notice Senator Bennett's words do not match his cowardly actions. America deserves better.
The irresponsible leadership keeps Americans at risk in a foreign country is unfathomable. I will stand up for what is right to protect Americans and Coloradans from the corrupt, self-serving politicians in D.C. Join our cause and donate today!

clean_body: (and not a word from the Leftist media) | | | | == | | Americans abandoned, Michael Bennet is complicit Every day we find out there are more Americans still left behind in Afghanistan. Following the disastrous withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan, their security is tenuous. Has the Biden administration been lying to us? Shortly after the tragic failure, it was reported that only about 100 Americans were still left in that war-torn country. Foreignpolicy.com is reporting that the State Department believes there is as many as 14,000 Americans left in Afghanistan. Whether it's one American or 14,000, no American should be left behind. Our government and our military exist solely to serve the American people. Period. Of course, we're hearing very little from the Leftist media about the ongoing impacts from Joe Biden's haphazard withdrawal--a disaster Michael Bennet covered up and is therefore complicit in. We now know Afghanistan's economy is collapsing and its people are starving; Americans are living in these conditions as well. It could have been prevented. Michael Bennet, who serves on the U.S. Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, never spoke up. Of course, he has a long history of not standing up for anything, especially the people of Colorado or this country. I would have exhausted every effort to ensure there was a clear and reasonable plan to withdraw--all American citizens first, then equipment (worth more than $80 billion), and finally the military. But sadly, you won't hear any more about it on the news. By the way, where have all the honorable reporters gone? Bennet says he "believes in a strong, thoughtful security policy that advances U.S. interests abroad while protecting our nation at home," yet his actions prove otherwise. In fact, it seems he is doing everything possible to undermine our national security abroad, and our public safety at home. Help me bring courage, honor, and virtue to Washington. On the field of battle, I grew to trust the actions of men and women over their words. In this political arena, I notice Senator Bennett's words do not match his cowardly actions. America deserves better. The irresponsible leadership keeps Americans at risk in a foreign country is unfathomable. I will stand up for what is right to protect Americans and Coloradans from the corrupt, self-serving politicians in D.C. Join our cause and donate today! | | | | | == | | | | I need your help. Please donate to our fight so I can stand for you in the U.S. Senate. A quick donation from you goes a long way. Meanwhile, I'll work to make your donation matter. | == | You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker opposing this outrage. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | | == | Together we can stand against the destructive policies of a heartless Biden administration. I need your support today | | | == PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: The Woke “Republicans” who voted for HB 257
body:
Made our children less safe. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=1a97595f15&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Last week, I called for Virginia’s incoming Delegates to use their new Republican majority to repeal House Bill 257, a 2020 bill under which Virginia schools are no longer required to report incidents of illegal misconduct, including sexual battery, to authorities. Townhall covered my call for repeal [**here**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=8fc47413d1&e=ae0ea222da).

Now, my call has been heard and Republicans are now proposing efforts to repeal this bill. This is good, but it is important to remember that this bill should have never been passed in the first place. And we cannot let those who passed it off the hook.

The Democrats and “Woke” Republicans who passed this legislation made our children less safe, and must be held accountable. You read that right: there were REPUBLICANS in the Virginia Senate and House of Delegates that went along with the liberal, woke agenda and voted for a bill that put our children in danger.

Many of the so-called “Republicans” who voted for this bill are now claiming that they didn’t know this bill would be used to protect sexual assailants. They claim this even though there were a number of Conservative voices who stood against the bill who warned against exactly that in the General Assembly. Even if it were true that they were unaware, it is unacceptable for a legislator to vote for legislation that they don’t understand - it is literally the job the American people hired them to do.

Before I founded the international organization I currently run, I worked on Capitol Hill. I have crafted, overseen, and even implemented complex legislation. I am running for Congress because I have the experience and knowledge for the job. As your Congresswoman, I will only vote for legislation that is clear, Constitutional, and in the best interests of my constituents.

I am a mother first. I am not another power-hungry career politician. I will always support legislation that protects our children, and I will always oppose bills like HB 257, which put our children at risk.

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=121346ed3f&e=ae0ea222da)
Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate
VA-7 Congressional District
---
|

---
| | | | | | [](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=4f01ecaedc&e=ae0ea222da)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38765485/316954840/1927938479?refcode=20211118_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGRjNWYxNy1hOTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKOjMY7mndVIzS74qrEHo8KRWu1nSYIiSaVT_ZiJyag=)
Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And when the clock strikes midnight, our mid-November deadline comes to an end. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the mid-month fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight tonight? I would not ask if it weren’t so important. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38765486/316954841/1927938479?refcode=20211118_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGRjNWYxNy1hOTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKOjMY7mndVIzS74qrEHo8KRWu1nSYIiSaVT_ZiJyag=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38765487/316954842/-1534947712?refcode=20211118_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGRjNWYxNy1hOTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKOjMY7mndVIzS74qrEHo8KRWu1nSYIiSaVT_ZiJyag=)

body:

Here's the deal, Peter -- When we first put together our campaign strategy, we didn't expect this unfavorable environment for Democrats.

Now, our original fundraising projections won't cut it, and we've got to be more aggressive in funding our plan to elect Tom as Governor of Maryland.

We need to bring in 350 contributions **TODAY** so we don't bug you over Thanksgiving. You're one of our most valuable team members, and Tom is hoping you can come through.

**_[Please rush $12, or as much as you can, so that together, we can send Tom to Annapolis to fight for our shared progressive values. subject: Tell Congress: Vote YES on the Build Back Better Act
body:
| | Friend, **Soon, the House of Representatives is expected to vote on the final passage of the Build Back Better Act.** This is a decisive moment for President Biden’s legislative agenda. After months of negotiations and numerous delays, the Democratic majority in Congress is finally close to delivering much-needed relief for working families. [Send a message to Congress: Vote YES on the Build Back Better Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38766158/316959822/171062101?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQzMDJkMy1hYTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcEJhksJSyb2BEnbIeQotOH8A4iX_wmPpko8mv4HcpI=&emci=53fdb25c-a748-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e54302d3-aa48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) Earlier this week, President Biden signed the bipartisan infrastructure deal into law. These historic, once-in-a-generation investments will grow our economy and create good-paying jobs — but this isn’t the time to let up. Now’s the time for Congress to make good on the rest of the Biden-Harris agenda by passing the Build Back Better Act, which includes:
* **The largest investment in climate action in history** , with $555 billion to decarbonize and promote clean energy
* **Universal pre-K and new investments to ensure affordable child care and home care** for parents and caregivers
* **An expansion of affordable health care** to lower premiums and close the Medicaid coverage gap
* **New investments in access to higher education** , including at Historically Black Colleges & Universities, minority-serving institutions, and Tribal Colleges & Universities
* **An extension of the Child Tax Credit** for an additional year
* **Immigration relief to keep families together** and make the system more humane
* **Unprecedented funding for affordable housing** and rental assistance

[Take action: Urge Congress to pass the Build Back Better Act without delay.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38766161/316959824/-1395021840?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQzMDJkMy1hYTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcEJhksJSyb2BEnbIeQotOH8A4iX_wmPpko8mv4HcpI=&emci=53fdb25c-a748-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e54302d3-aa48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) | [Write to Congress](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38766162/316959827/339075793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQzMDJkMy1hYTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tcEJhksJSyb2BEnbIeQotOH8A4iX_wmPpko8mv4HcpI=&emci=53fdb25c-a748-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e54302d3-aa48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172 "Write to Congress")

clean_body: You’re one of the TOP REPUBLICANS in Englewood, FL! | Peter, Congratulations! You’ve been selected from among all the Republicans in Englewood, FL to join the exclusive Elect Republicans Midterm MVP Club! These midterm elections could be the most important in the history of our nation. We’re on the edge of a cliff, and we need to Save America from the threat of socialism! We need to have a historic victory to end the threat of socialism once and for all, and we can’t do that without you on the team. | | | | | | Thank you. Elect Republicans MVP Club

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Media LIES about Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806103:JLjd9S2FN:m:1:3253819041:89DDA7220D1FC587B82FFB8C0DA24EE5:r)
Peter,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

* The liberal liars at MSNBC are calling the judge a white supremacist.

* The liberal liars at CNN had one of Rittenhouse's attackers on Anderson Cooper, telling a different story than what he testified at the trial.

* The liberal liars continue to paint Kyle as racist and evil despite any evidence.

**The attacks on truthful reporting have escalated as the liberal bias in the media is being exposed more than ever before. **

Let me tell you how my organization, the Media Research Center (MRC) is defeating the liberal liars in the media. We are the only organization solely dedicated to exposing media bias.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the liberal bias in the media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[**I am asking for your urgent support today to help us expose the lies being told in the Rittenhouse trial. Can you click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806103:JLjd9S2FN:m:1:3253819041:89DDA7220D1FC587B82FFB8C0DA24EE5:r)

Here is how the Media Research Center is TAKING DOWN the Fake News media:

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806103:JLjd9S2FN:m:1:3253819041:89DDA7220D1FC587B82FFB8C0DA24EE5:r)

Americans are waking up to the bias. Trust in the media is at an all time low. It's in large part due to our work.

But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media.

**I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. **

[**Please send an urgent donation today to MRC and support our work.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806103:JLjd9S2FN:m:1:3253819041:89DDA7220D1FC587B82FFB8C0DA24EE5:r)
[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $5,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58806103:JLjd9S2FN:m:1:3253819041:89DDA7220D1FC587B82FFB8C0DA24EE5:r)

Believe in America, not the media.

We are winning this battle for truth in reporting. But as we expose the media, their attacks increase. Your support can help us fight back.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

body:

& nbsp; &nb; sp;

|
---
| | | Hey, Fellow Conservative, do you have a minute?

Republicans are coming up on a very important deadline and are currently pacing behind the Democrats. This is the worst-case scenario for Republicans in battleground elections.
---
| | | [HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vw12-1lgcr-4qqlpo4/ "HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP")
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vw12-1lgcs-4qqlpo5/ "CHIP IN NOW")

**My friend Tim Scott is one of the Republicans who needs our help. He’s facing a tough reelection and Democrats want nothing more than to unseat him in the Senate.**

We can’t afford to let this happen. America needs Tim Scott’s leadership in the Senate. **[So if you can, please rush emergency funds toward Tim Scott’s Mid Month Goal NOW!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vw12-1lgct-4qqlpo6/ "So if you can, please rush emergency funds toward Tim Scott’s Mid Month Goal NOW!")**

Republicans across the country are gearing up for the fight of their lives. We are working to restore a Conservative Majority across all levels of government, but we need your help.

Every supporter and every contribution can and will make a difference in the next election.

Reaching our Mid-Month Deadline is essential in our plan to defeat the radical Left once and for all. **[Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to step up and help me ensure victory for Republicans?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vw12-1lgcu-4qqlpo7/ "Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to step up and help me ensure victory for Republicans?")**

Thank you for your continued support of efforts to take back the Majority and protect our Conservative values.

To victory,

Congressman Dan Crenshaw

**But recent polls are TIGHT -- Unless we raise $15,000 tonight, we could miss our shot to FLIP FLORIDA BLUE!**

(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=931%2E878179%2EF00aaN). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=931%2E878179%2EF00aaN).**

Fellow Conservative,

The liberal media has a bad habit of lying about Republicans. That’s why there’s long been a 20% gap in Democrat and Republican opinions on the accuracy of American media outlets.

Do you trust the liberal media?

Results in New Jersey also showed us that voters are turning against the radical progressive agenda being championed by Joe Biden and his party faithful._
_So, their only strategy going forward will be to_ simply buy the 2022 election. **After all, in 2020, liberals invested**$164,789,750** to get Ralph Warnock elected to the U.S. Senate - imagine what they will spend to keep him there, and it's why we need to gin up our efforts early.**

you?")**
2022 will be an all-out war in Georgia, and we need to be ready. We can't wait until next Fall to have the resources--we need to be on the ground with people and supplies and in the air with ads TODAY!
The New Journey PAC is ready to hand a humiliating defeat to the Democrats, but only if we have your support _right now. They are a one-trick pony, and now that we know their game --we're ready for them!_
_The progressive machine came after Rep. Byron Donalds and failed. Then, they called Senator Tim Scott an "oreo," and it backfired._
**_They even threw objects at Larry Elder and defeated his candidacy for Governor of California, but when they referred to Winsome Sears as "a black face speaking on behalf of White supremacy" in Virginia, we handed them a defeat they didn't see coming._**
**[A black Republican like Herschel Walker will be directly in the crosshairs of the Democrat attack machine, and we need to ensure he has the support he needs to win!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808262:JDFGtS2RN:m:1:3298722022:BFD00C3FFE532FA390E4DE477230D734:r "A black Republican like Herschel Walker will be directly in the
crosshairs of the Democrat attack machine, and we need to ensure he has the support he needs to win!")**
We cannot bury the Democrats under a Red Wave in 2022 unless we have your support. **[We need to hear from you today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808262:JDFGtS2RN:m:1:3298722022:BFD00C3FFE532FA390E4DE477230D734:r "We need to hear from you today.")**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Is the FBI trying to entrap Laura Loomer?
body:
Late last month, Rep. Paul Gosar wrote a letter to Attorney General Merrick Garland on my behalf.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/38kmB0oXX9N763D8Cb5uMbeQ/GtO4uNPfznG7wdcsA2NYHw) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/38kmB0oXX9N763D8Cb5uMbeQ/GtO4uNPfznG7wdcsA2NYHw) Late last month, Rep. Paul Gosar wrote a letter to Attorney General Merrick Garland on my behalf.

Like millions of other Americans, I’ve been placed in the FBI’s National Instant Background Check System (NICS), with no notice along with no rhyme or reason as to why the FBI arbitrarily stripped me of my Second Amendment rights.

**And if it can happen to me, it can happen to you.**

[**Help me fight back today and support my action against the FBI to clear my name and get answers!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/38kmB0oXX9N763D8Cb5uMbeQ/GtO4uNPfznG7wdcsA2NYHw)

In his letter, Rep. Paul Gosar made it clear that I was placed in the database without notification, and had I been caught simply having a firearm in my home, I would have been arrested.

Gosar asked: _“This begs the question, was the FBI trying to entrap Ms. Loomer, and how many other American citizens who are also in the FBI NICS database have not yet been notified that they have also been banned from owning or possessing firearms?”_

**That’s a MASSIVE question as the penalty for possessing a firearm if you’re banned from doing so is up to 10 YEARS IN PRISON!**

Now, the FBI has clearly been using the NICS database as a way to carry out political retribution against conservative “trouble makers” like me.

My former employer and Project Veritas founder, James O’Keefe, was placed on the database in 2019 and he had to sue the FBI to get off the list.

As of December 2020, 11.5 million Americans are listed in the NICS database – and that’s not even including the FBI’s other secret list, the “Federally Denied Persons File.”

That secret list, within the secret NICS list, has caused 6,399 denials. That’s 6,399 Americans who tried to purchase a firearm or get a concealed carried permit and were denied because their name was on this secret list – **including me and James O’Keefe**.

We have NO CLUE how big that list is, why people are put on it, and why conservative political activists are suddenly being placed on the list.

[**Help me get answers today by helping me fund a lawsuit against the FBI so that I can restore my Second Amendment rights and expose the FBI’s witch hunt against conservative Americans.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/38kmB0oXX9N763D8Cb5uMbeQ/GtO4uNPfznG7wdcsA2NYHw)

Thanks so much for all you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

**_Wisconsin U.S. Senate | November 2021_**
Sarah Godlewski (D): 48% (+2)
Ron Johnson (R): 46%
_Public Policy Polling_
