**Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control.** Major election forecasters are already ranking this race a toss-up, and _CNN_ is calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent senator up in 2022. This latest statewide poll of the U.S. Senate race in Wisconsin proves Sarah is our best shot to defeat him, and your support will make a big difference.

**[We already know this race is going to be a dead heat until the end, which means we’ll need the strongest candidate to take on Ron Johnson. Please, if you can, donate now to help Sarah Godlewski flip Wisconsin blue and protect the Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38767351/316965782/1201999653?refcode=em21_211118_Poll1_fndd_gq_act___WSA_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211118_Poll1_fndd_gq_act___WSA_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGJjM2Y4Ni1iMTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yYtJQ9EsLQDYivrG0L30ewg4UWnuV0RliesGe7pCnKs=)**

We have real momentum in this race: We see it in the polls, the energy here in Wisconsin, and even in the desperate actions of the Wisconsin GOP who are already taking cheap shots at our campaign. But we must grow and sustain that momentum to win.

Sarah has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and she is not going to spend a minute of this campaign asking special interests for donations. That’s not how we plan to win. Our campaign is relying on people like you to stand with us in the fights ahead.

Thank you for all you’ve done so far and will continue to do to help us flip this seat.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
We need allies like him to help us all succeed https://www.ericlynnforcongress.com [https://www.ericlynnforcongress.com]Dear friends,
During my time as a Senior Advisor in the Obama-Biden Administration, I had the opportunity to get to know many capable Members of Congress who have made a real difference for their districts and the country at large.
I’m honored to now call many of them friends, and Congressman Eric Swalwell (CA-15) has not only become a close friend, but also a valued advisor. He’s been extremely helpful to our efforts to keep Florida’s 13th Congressional District blue because he knows the value of maintaining our Democratic majority.
Today, I want to take a moment to focus on his re-election campaign, because when I get to Congress, I want to work with allies like Eric to accomplish our goals and bring progress to all Americans, from Florida to California.
Please, will you contribute today to help his efforts? Your donation will be split evenly between his campaign and ours so that we can both succeed. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119]Maintaining the House Democratic Majority will be an all hands on deck effort. We’ll need to work hard across all 50 states to ensure that we defend vulnerable seats and flip Republican-held districts. Only then will we be able to accomplish our goals towards our shared values.
Please click here to give a split donation to Congressman Swalwell’s campaign and our campaign to keep FL-13 blue! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-swalwell1119]
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Congress MUST stop the delays:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We must safeguard the future of our species.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/34WRSNePrVB~/TWVMT3loS2x3b3hHc3dWWWhFL1V5RGgzWVlDN0ViVDIwUVYyTnU3TmszMTJjdkJrRElMWmFLNW82Wlh6bTM2QXVBK01mWEZZbWRXUEs1c3BjVjI2UktqWHA1ZVdOWHUxU3dzMlZpZXNUaGs9S0/MkxKSS91UzlOOXVwbXRLbFdIUUdqNy94NnJwRkNGZlZTaGtOVDc0QlNIaz0S1) Friend -- As the climate crisis worsens, the future of the planet is in our hands. Right now, it's specifically in the hands of our nation's 100 senators and 435 representatives. Congress passed a bipartisan Infrastructure bill and now it must pass the Build Back Better Act to make historic investments into combatting the climate crisis. To safeguard the future of our species, we need to get the Build Back Better Act onto President Biden's desk as soon as possible. Investing in physical infrastructure was only the first step; now Congress must take action to safeguard the future of our species. [_**The time for action is now. Will you add your name urging Congress to pass this crucial bill without delay?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/9bq3h0zEK3Cq/TWVMT3loS2x3b3hHc3dWWWhFL1V5RGgzWVlDN0ViVDIwUVYyTnU3TmszMTJjdkJrRElMWmFLNW82Wlh6bTM2QXVBK01mWEZZbWRXUEs1c3BjVjI2UktqWHA1ZVdOWHUxU3dzMlZpZXNUaGs9S0/MkxKSS91UzlOOXVwbXRLbFdIUUdqNy94NnJwRkNGZlZTaGtOVDc0QlNIaz0S1) If the United States doesn't lead on building a clean energy economy that works for all of us, we will be left behind. And, beyond that, we will continue to watch Americans suffer as the climate crisis creeps into each of our backyards. I can tell you with certainty that the Build Back Better Act is the most important climate bill of my lifetime. It would make the largest investments into defeating the climate crisis in history. But for our nation and world to reap the benefits, Congress must pass this historic bill. What we do over the next five years will determine our planet's fate. We simply can't afford to wait on Congress any longer. Our Washington state Senators, Patty Murray and Maria Cantwell, are leading the way to ensure Build Back Better is passed. Now they need the rest of Congress to step up. [_**Let 's make sure Congress understands the true gravity and urgency of this moment for our country, world, and species. Add your name right now demanding Congress finally acts to pass the Build Back Better Act without further delay.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/9bq3h0zEK3Cq/TWVMT3loS2x3b3hHc3dWWWhFL1V5RGgzWVlDN0ViVDIwUVYyTnU3TmszMTJjdkJrRElMWmFLNW82Wlh6bTM2QXVBK01mWEZZbWRXUEs1c3BjVjI2UktqWHA1ZVdOWHUxU3dzMlZpZXNUaGs9S0/MkxKSS91UzlOOXVwbXRLbFdIUUdqNy94NnJwRkNGZlZTaGtOVDc0QlNIaz0S1) Let's meet this make-or-break moment with imagination and optimism. Very truly yours, Jay | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/2WP-M_3jVvcz/TWVMT3loS2x3b3hHc3dWWWhFL1V5RGgzWVlDN0ViVDIwUVYyTnU3TmszMTJjdkJrRElMWmFLNW82Wlh6bTM2QXVBK01mWEZZbWRXUEs1c3BjVjI2UktqWHA1ZVdOWHUxU3dzMlZpZXNUaGs9S0/MkxKSS91UzlOOXVwbXRLbFdIUUdqNy94NnJwRkNGZlZTaGtOVDc0QlNIaz0S1)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Can I Count on You?
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is carrying a massive legal caseload into 2022, and **_[your help is essential](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57152&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_** to maintaining our readiness to respond _quickly and decisively_ to meet the challenges posed by corrupt politicians and secretive government bureaucrats.
Do you support Judicial Watch:

* Vigorously pressing forward with all our investigations and lawsuits to combat unlawful secrecy, corruption and threats to the constitutional rule of law from government bureaucrats who think they are above the law?
* Holding corrupt politicians in both parties accountable to the law?
* Continuing to fight for honest elections?
* Challenging and exposing unlawful sanctuary policies and Biden's border lawlessness?

I ask you **_[to give Judicial Watch your personal support,](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57152&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_** and your approval for us to continue our investigations and lawsuits into 2022 and launch new investigations and lawsuits to fight government corruption.
I also ask you to back up your approval with **_[a special tax-deductible donation to Judicial Watch.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57152&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_**
Right now, Judicial Watch is working on multiple, very important fronts...

* _Our election integrity team is working through federal government and public voter registration data to identify states and counties with registered voters whose numbers exceed their counts of eligible voters_. Dirty voting rolls can mean dirty elections.

We anticipate filing more lawsuits against state and county officials who fail to take legally required actions to take reasonable steps to clean their voter rolls!

* _We are moving forward with our lawsuit in Santa Clara County (San Jose), California, challenging the county 's deadly sanctuary policy_.

Our multi-year litigation up the road in San Francisco, _which included forcing the release through discovery of stunning documents detailing the massive number of criminal illegal aliens_ _released on to the streets by the San Francisco Sheriff 's Department_, led directly to positive policy practices there.

* _We are in federal court right now with a new lawsuit against the Biden administration to force the release of government documents related to the incompetent and deadly surrender in Afghanistan_.

The American people have a right to learn what led to one of the biggest foreign policy disasters in recent U.S. history... _and we won 't let Deep State government bureaucrats keep the truth from us_!
**So, you can see how**** _[joining Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57152&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_**** _now_ will help us continue using the courts to reaffirm our motto _and_ motivation, "Because no one is above the law!"**
We're currently pursuing _thousands_ of open Freedom of Information Act requests and a record number of lawsuits against several branches of the federal government, which is why your **_[approval and special contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57152&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_** are so important. 2022 will be just as challenging as 2021.
**_[Your support and commitment will mean so much to us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57152&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_** , _and I pledge to honor your trust in us every day_.
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57152&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

name: Navarre HQ
subject: Lessons learned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Folks,
Election day here in Virginia was just over two weeks ago, and we think it’s safe to say that the dust has finally settled.
Let’s start with the good news. We saw record turnout by Virginia voters. As Americans, we should all be reassured that Virginians are actively participating in the essential element of a vibrant democracy. Within the district, we elected and re-elected a diverse slate of candidates up and down the ticket.
Stewart was out across the district on Election Day helping with getting out the vote, and there are a few things that he learned we wanted to share.
http://stewartnavarre.com/ [http://stewartnavarre.com/]
We must do a better job of actively engaging with rural voters. Over the past four years, Democrats passed transformational legislation: Expanding Medicaid; Fully funding universal broadband access; Improving access to the ballot box; and so much more. We win when we run on WHAT we have done - and WILL DO - to make a material impact in our lives.
http://stewartnavarre.com/ [http://stewartnavarre.com/]
This is the United States of America, and the only way to win elections and govern effectively is to be united. It can’t be all red vs blue, rural vs urban, us vs them. That simply won’t work, and we saw that play out on November 2nd.
We have a chance to defy historical precedent in 2022 because Democrats ARE DELIVERING for the American people. But we can only win elections up and down the ticket if we’re united and willing to bring everyone along with us.
That’s the type of campaign Stewart is committed to running here in Virginia. That’s the type of campaign that we know can win. And we’re glad we’ve got your support along the way.
Thank you,
Navarre HQ
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

clean_body: Folks, Election day here in Virginia was just over two weeks ago, and we think it’s safe to say that the dust has finally settled. Let’s start with the good news. We saw record turnout by Virginia voters. As Americans, we should all be reassured that Virginians are actively participating in the essential element of a vibrant democracy. Within the district, we elected and re-elected a diverse slate of candidates up and down the ticket. Stewart was out across the district on Election Day helping with getting out the vote, and there are a few things that he learned we wanted to share. [] We must do a better job of actively engaging with rural voters. Over the past four years, Democrats passed transformational legislation: Expanding Medicaid; Fully funding universal broadband access; Improving access to the ballot box; and so much more. We win when we run on WHAT we have done - and WILL DO - to make a material impact in our lives. [] This is the United States of America, and the only way to win elections and govern effectively is to be united. It can’t be all red vs blue, rural vs urban, us vs them. That simply won’t work, and we saw that play out on November 2nd. We have a chance to defy historical precedent in 2022 because Democrats ARE DELIVERING for the American people. But we can only win elections up and down the ticket if we’re united and willing to bring everyone along with us. That’s the type of campaign Stewart is committed to running here in Virginia. That’s the type of campaign that we know can win. And we’re glad we’ve got your support along the way. Thank you, Navarre HQ PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS Stewart Navarre for Congress PO Box 150 Fredericksburg, VA 22404 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

clean_body: Don’t sit on the sidelines of this MUST-WIN race. | Friend, In just two months, we’ve built a remarkable grassroots coalition to defeat radical liberal Tony Evers and FLIP the battleground state of Wisconsin. But as the year draws to a close, I’ve been looking through our donor files and was surprised you never accepted your Founding Membership with our campaign... With Tony Evers already running lying attack ads against us, I’ve had to set an ambitious new goal to raise another $500,000 before we close the books on 2021. Now more than ever, I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to step up and accept your Founding Membership to ensure we have the resources to WIN this TOSS-UP race. We can’t afford for strong conservatives like yourself to be on the sidelines in this race. We need YOU. Plain and simple. An amazing opportunity lies in front of us to undo four years of devastation and failure at the hands of Tony Evers -- but I can’t seize this opportunity without you. I can promise you, Friend, your dollar will not be wasted in this race. In fact, we already have the advantage among registered Wisconsin voters... Our state’s most conservative congressional district has nearly 100,000 more registered voters than its liberal counterpart. But this all means nothing if we don’t have the resources to fight back against Evers’ attacks and press our advantage -- and that starts by growing our coalition of Founding Members right now. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Maggie for NH
subject: Our razor-thin majority is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Bad news, team. **Polls are showing that Senator Hassan is one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection.** And to make things worse, our grassroots fundraising has significantly slowed down, **putting our razor-thin majority at risk.** We see this happen every year around the holidays, but with the 2022 midterms less than a year away, we can't afford to take it easy. Mitch McConnell and GOP megadonors across the country are spending millions of dollars to unseat Maggie. Most recently, a Republican super PAC placed a massive ad buy in New Hampshire attacking Maggie, and that's just the tip of the iceberg. If we're going to defend this seat and our fragile Senate majority, it's going to take a surge of grassroots support. **That's why we're setting an emergency goal to raise $30,000 before next week.** **[Can Maggie count on you to chip in $5 -- or whatever you can -- today to help us close our fundraising gap and keep this seat and our Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38768486/316970066/-1803038125?refcode=e20211118_emerg-goal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTc3Yjc2My1iNDQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RwkpClJ5zW3CQuuIyl9dLUefeoAkkaTneKRdIXFPXPk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38768488/316970069/-1803038125?refcode=e20211118_emerg-goal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTc3Yjc2My1iNDQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RwkpClJ5zW3CQuuIyl9dLUefeoAkkaTneKRdIXFPXPk=)

name: Ken Russell
subject: Water is life / Agua es vida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Friends,
I am reaching out today because I would like to talk about water. Our economy and prosperity depend on the beaches, inlets, lakes, and rivers that make Florida so beautiful. Unfortunately, our many waterways and their wildlife are in danger.
Pollution, runoff, drilling, and more put our water systems at risk. Florida is such a special place, and it has been my home all my life. Which is why I am dedicated to not only protecting but also cleaning up the waterways across this state and this country. Can you help me fight for clean water in the Senate by donating to my campaign today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2111-q4-kr?refcode=211118-email-issues]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2111-q4-kr?refcode=211118-email-issues [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2111-q4-kr?refcode=211118-email-issues]
Theodore Roosevelt is one of my favorite presidents. He created the first national park system in the world and protected huge portions of land for generations to come. As an activist and a City Commissioner in Miami, one of my greatest priorities has been ensuring clean and healthy waterways and ecosystems. When I get to the Senate, I intend to act boldly and quickly to do everything I can to protect our environment, but I need your help.
Can you chip in $35 today to help me ensure clean water for future generations? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2111-q4-kr?refcode=211118-email-issues&amount=35]
A green economy is an economy with millions of job opportunities. We do not need to choose between economic success and ecological success, the two are bound together. I understand that, and I will bring that knowledge to the U.S. Senate.
Thank you,
Ken Russell
Candidate for U.S. Senate
Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today.

name: Team AOC
subject: Do you find this behavior acceptable?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s a sad day when a member who leads a political party in the United States of America cannot bring themselves to say that issuing a depiction of murdering a colleague is wrong.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211118-2652-header&t=1&akid=2652%2E2526796%2ExzfsY3)
**Yesterday, the House censured Representative Paul Gosar** – a Republican from Arizona – after he tweeted an animated video depicting him killing Alexandria and attacking the President.
But **Republican Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy criticized the censure, saying it was “unprecedented.”**
**It’s a sad day when a member of Congress who leads a political party in the United States of America cannot bring themselves to say that issuing a depiction of murdering a colleague is wrong.**
By downplaying this incitement of violence as a “joke,” Rep. Gosar and others betray the meaning and importance of the work that happens in the people’s Capitol. They convey that everyday actions of elected leaders in the United States of America don’t matter.
But they do matter. When leaders in our country incite violence against their colleagues in Congress, that violence trickles down into violence in the rest of the country.
**This resolution to censure Representative Gosar for his disgusting and desperate attack against Alexandria is about more than her or even him — _it’s about drawing the line._** It’s about the core recognition of human dignity, value, and worth.
While Alexandria doesn’t allow these desperate attacks to get in the way of doing her job, this behavior is unacceptable and has no place in our government, or any professional workplace.
This is not the first time Alexandria has been the target of attacks. From Representative Ted Yoho first calling Alexandria “a f— b—” on the steps of the Capitol, to Representative Marjory Taylor Greene chasing after Alexandria screaming and then stalking her office with fellow insurrectionists.
**In any other workplace, a coworker making a cartoon video killing another coworker would be fired.** Not in the U.S. House of Representatives, though.
[If you agree that this behavior is unacceptable in any workplace, but especially in the U.S. House, then add your name in support of the decision to censure Representative Paul Gosar for his actions to incite violence against Alexandria >>](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/support-censure-gosar/?source=em20211118-2652-P_ENG_RES_HDL&t=2&akid=2652%2E2526796%2ExzfsY3)
**[Add your name](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/support-censure-gosar/?source=em20211118-2652-P_ENG_RES_HDL&t=3&akid=2652%2E2526796%2ExzfsY3)**
The decision to censure Representative Gosar is not as complex as Republican Minority Leader McCarthy would like many folks to believe. It’s pretty cut and dry. The questions we must ask ourselves are: Do we find this behavior acceptable? Would you allow depictions of violence against women, against colleagues, in your home? Do you think that this should happen on a school board, in a city council, or in a church?
If not, then why is it acceptable in the United States House of Representatives?
It shouldn’t be. [If you agree, add your name here now to show your support for the resolution to censure Rep. Gosar.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/support-censure-gosar/?source=em20211118-2652-P_ENG_RES_HDL&t=4&akid=2652%2E2526796%2ExzfsY3)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211118-2652-P_ENG_RES_HDL&t=5&refcode2=2652_2526796_xzfsY3&akid=2652%2E2526796%2ExzfsY3)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211118-2652-P_ENG_RES_HDL&t=6&akid=2652%2E2526796%2ExzfsY3)**
---|---

name: Tim Williams
subject: EVERY vote matters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.

subject: Kara's the problem solver we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38769274/316973305/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQxYjU3Ni1iNzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4Q8aK2dbx9zyd6FxKYDxfD_BsAVX8HPWy9aF4qUmwE=)

Hi team -- I'd like to take a few minutes of your day to explain why Kara Hahn is the right person to represent us in Congress.

**A great example of Kara's values in practice is her work tackling the opioid epidemic on Long Island in her decade as a county legislator.**

Back in 2012, Kara passed legislation to equip police officers with NARCAN nasal spray and train residents to carry and use it to save lives. These efforts were a _resounding_ success, and lives were saved within days of the program's launch.

Kara didn't stop there, she then passed legislation that would ensure those saved would receive outreach about their treatment options. Next, knowing that addiction often starts after a sports injury, Kara helped write a curriculum for athletic coaches to be trained to identify and intervene upon seeing the signs and symptoms of addiction. In addition, as a daughter of a first responder, she fought for and secured funding for compassion fatigue training for EMTs, paramedics and other ambulance workers who face the trauma of overdoses almost daily.

**Now, after nearly a decade championing the fight,_she hasn't given up._** Just this week, she passed bills that ensure that the millions of dollars worth of opioid settlement money Suffolk County is set to receive will be used solely to fight the substance abuse crisis.

**You see, when Kara takes on an issue, she sees it through. That's a testament to her grit as a legislator and compassion as a community member, and that's exactly the kind of leader this district deserves representing them in Congress.**

name: Cynthia Cano, Beto for Texas
subject: Beto reached out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Add your name to join our Beto for Texas team.
#
Did you see Beto's email on Tuesday? He had one very important question for you:
[Will you join our campaign to elect Beto to be a governor for ALL of Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211118&t=1&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)
**[Join our campaign »](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211118&t=2&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)**
Texans deserve better than the fringe policies and incompetencies that we see on masks, guns, abortion, and more today. And Texans deserve a leader who will listen to them and take action to meet the pressing crises of our day. **That leader is Beto.**
**Please, read Beto's email below to learn more about this people-powered movement for a big, bold vision for Texas.[Then, add your name to join our Beto for Texas team.](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211118&t=3&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)**
More soon,
Cynthia Cano
Beto for Texas
_\----Forwarded message----_
Date: November 16, 2021
Sender: Beto O’Rourke
Subject line: Will you join our campaign?
Yesterday, Amy and I kicked off our campaign for governor.
This campaign is about the future of Texas — the Texas that Amy and I want for our three kids. A Texas where our leaders unite us rather than divide us, and are focused on protecting working families and keeping our communities safe.
**I’m running for governor because I believe Texas deserves better than the failed leadership and divisive politics that we see today. I know that we can crush Covid, fix our broken power grid, and guarantee that Texas has the safest, healthiest, and most prosperous communities in the nation — but only if we come together to push for something greater.**
[If you're with me, will you add your name to join our campaign today?](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211118&t=4&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)
**[Join our campaign »](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211118&t=5&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)**
In my past work as an entrepreneur and small businessman, a member of the El Paso City Council, a U.S. Representative, and the founder of a grassroots voting rights organization, I learned that we’re able to do the most good and get the most done when we take the time to listen and learn from one another.
That’s why I’m on the road right now, traveling across the state to listen and learn from the Texans that I hope to serve as this state’s next governor. Texans know exactly what we need — better jobs, better schools, expanded health care access, and safer, healthier communities. They just need someone to take action.
As governor, that's what I promise to do: Take action on the issues most important to Texans and work with each and every one of you to get a lot done together.
**We’re building a campaign of, by, and for the people of Texas.** [So, will you take a moment to join our campaign to represent every single Texan?](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-join-our-campaign/?source=em20211118&t=6&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)
We are doing something historic together. Thank you for being a part of it.
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211118-163059-footer&t=7&refcode2=163059_444211_UbyX6F&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=8&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=163059%2E444211%2EUbyX6F)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian?=
subject: what a joke
body:
RE: Idaho special session |
---
| | The Idaho legislature just ended their special session...

_And passed no bills. _

(Some good articles on that are [here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=8336854b13&e=dea908e0fe) and [here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=97df1d59ca&e=dea908e0fe))

And make sure you [watch Ron Nate sum it all up in this video](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=6a609a0f41&e=dea908e0fe)...

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=443737c049&e=dea908e0fe)

Bottom line...

This was a waste of time, a waste of money, and a slap in the face to all Idahoans who are concerned about medical privacy, bodily autonomy, and government intrusion into our personal lives.

The main problem... is the senate.

We have a TON of good people in the house, but when they pass good bills and kick them up to the senate, the bills get put on the shelf, never get a vote, and never see the light of day.

I'm running in District 13 (Nampa senate) to change that.

My opponent has voted for the largest spending bill in Idaho history, was the deciding vote on the "toddler indoctrination bill" (a bill to push woke BS and Critical Race Theory on 0 to 5-year-old kids in Idaho), and of course, he even voted to take $5.6 Billion from ~~Brandon~~ Joe Biden in the name of "COVID relief" making Idaho a slave to the federal government.

He has an **"F" rating** with the American Conservative Union.

He has an **"F" rating** on the Idaho Freedom Index.

And he has a dismal, **NEGATIVE (below zero) score** on the Idaho spending index.

_All while claiming to be a conservative._

I could name more... and I will as time goes on.

But it's safe to say that this man does not represent me, or, the majority of Idahoans I talk to in the Nampa area.

We want the government OUT of our lives, we want to be free from federal government monetary control, and we want our kids to be safe in schools instead of being taught about transgenderism and wokeness.

My opponent in Nampa does not want those things.

Because his voting record PROVES it.

**So, this is where you come in...**

I need help to get the word out and beat this guy in May.

Your time, your money, your voice - all of those or any of those.

I cannot win this alone.

So any way you can help, especially if you're in the Nampa area would be appreciated.

**_Because this won't stop until we stop it_. **

To get involved or volunteer - [click here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=9a30e4b14d&e=dea908e0fe "Get involved").

To help me get the word out with ANY amount of money - [click here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=8c2eccb090&e=dea908e0fe "Contribute").

I sincerely appreciate it.

Please reply with any questions you have - I'd be happy to help.

Stay frosty,

**Brian**
---
| | _Copyright © 2021 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Brian Lenney for IdahoPO Box 3753Nampa, ID 83653-3753
[Add us to your address book](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=707e17e6e9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=707e17e6e9).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&afl=1)
---

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: We need immediate, aggressive action on climate. Add your name if you agree.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
From the mountains to the coast, we’re seeing the consequences of inaction from our leaders on the climate crisis.
#

Friends -
From the mountains to the coast, we’re seeing the consequences of inaction from our leaders on the climate crisis. We need action — from expanding renewable energy to creating good jobs to cutting carbon emissions.
The bipartisan infrastructure bill that was passed last week was an important step toward investing in climate-resilient infrastructure. But the truth is we need even more aggressive action — starting with the Build Back Better bill.
The Build Back Better plan is a historic opportunity for us to take bold action on climate. Before this bill comes up for a vote, it's important that we make our voices heard:
**[Please add your name to my petition to tell Congress to ensure aggressive climate provisions remain in the Build Back Better bill and then to pass this bill immediately.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38769732/316976381/-1993202043?source=em211118-1-ngp&refcode=em211118-1-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQ1ZmZlNC1iYTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2xarvS-I4h0WTRPE0dn-1axtFKra4qnFq47Nidh91GE=&emci=b2842e77-b448-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7ad5ffe4-ba48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**
North Carolina is the birthplace of the environmental justice movement, and we need leaders with the courage and vision to lead this fight.
With the future of our planet at stake, we cannot afford to wait.
\- Cheri Beasley

clean_body: From the mountains to the coast, we’re seeing the consequences of inaction from our leaders on the climate crisis. This progressive fighter shook up one of the most powerful Democrats in D.C. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCpdUU4oGrtZl79NdhEhPV2gzR-ocCTtGHNSkkIKL62U8dJt9KbCDITlYkQzAGCoAF8aSYCLY2jYjsL1vQ4Ry5DZwGmt9Rs5HG3MsMlUoht04ft88fkCOnckGmJvF0_GPFepLEWw-Kv0j_v8r6KpqhdPRUlP3qzLXmlzQ4_HOzRNk/3h4/IDg8YohVTgenr_I3mo4AtA/h0/0yfWzIe-dXk1tWBVZoTVCwIzzfDBxl8m2pLfFW_CaWI)
---
Peter -- The Future Generations slate has a brand new member. Meet Mckayla Wilkes, candidate for U.S. House in Maryland's 5th district.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zXnRVTzwf0dONB-ZYEQeU_kMJ3dy2Lt4AaERNqWpEuttaOtcvqPJmeQOW-J1MBgOHnmiHRV2mBzIFEq_ZTOCddh9ZlStaQ-6OzMFTdcZRuZAu4zG2_eJka9VAF8iPHBXy47p9bQj-ytlEf6hMT15ywQMZObfx3-rr3JCNdlifNzdX9tmfQkz5tMtOu2wijc_n1FG83APJjgtBSd7k3lE1MIahiDxxiZeB6SFQrIm_czRmRIgJOWnqnJkM_DYAUfdMJacPDz7t39LXNwXyXcw-E3df0uw_pxcVZeVm0QEkfC8OsTgOmCUNfUGZMmfyhPfJN99Mv9SIL9sNyQPO_AXPhje42E2mpZN-bFhsy0H-02A/3h4/IDg8YohVTgenr_I3mo4AtA/h1/nfgOOztJWI79p9jmvWeut7dvQubTd5h7gCB8IPNL9Kg)
---
Mckayla has been an activist and organizer her entire adult life. In 2020, she ran for this seat against **an incumbent that has served in Congress for FORTY YEARS** , championing environmental, economic and racial justice. She and her team knocked on over **57,000** doors and made over **400,000** calls to voters. Every conversation began the same way:** "What issues are most important to you?"** Now she is running again to grow our movement and address the issues the folks in her community face. **Will you help us make sure Mckayla has the resources to finish this fight by making a split contribution with her campaign and Future Generations today?**
---
[ **Elect McKayla for the Future!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zXnRVTzwf0dONB-ZYEQeU_kMJ3dy2Lt4AaERNqWpEuttaOtcvqPJmeQOW-J1MBgOElujHsJZB_TkbVKn5W7G7WjZ_2_2zj12x7jJ5lg_3pggxEo2atH11AT8f8QMfvjpBKMO9VMlrrqQf8Jz2ULNYKcxw7OnGmsyt1xLKDanxS1ScQpfLHpBEf66X5fyBC6xCWk67INcjLZk5_6pjD3h8ZiygGnLD4FMzYE7u64eOvbXAK2r4l-cpJcWPUInGZB5yskl6tVW2gtZOSAWJGPPTbgHwbXTQYyjl4U8ufxPTFU1pzmaK6rWnAc8DW206GvTT8nApXPoiQ_LnNhbCmhAYsyL6ffFCsW44-CBd9ejc_5w/3h4/IDg8YohVTgenr_I3mo4AtA/h2/Tj3PEJWJdUEZ2NmfoGN1IADHaslb1HQrJ6gJeAL6aEU)
---
Mckayla's story is one of triumph, but her experiences are all too common in marginalized communities. As a child, she was incarcerated for truancy while dealing with grief and undiagnosed depression after losing her aunt in the 9/11 terrorist attacks on the Pentagon. While she was pregnant with her daughter, she nearly died due to deep-vein thrombosis, forced to fight our corrupt for-profit health system as insurance providers attempted to deny her medication. And as a working class single mom, Mckayla certainly knows what it means to live paycheck-to-paycheck. **Lived experiences like hers are lacking in Congress and drive her advocacy, including ending the school-to-prison pipeline, to invest in people instead of neglecting them and to care for the environment.** After her 2020 campaign, she co-founded the nonprofit advocacy organization **Schools Not Jails** to ensure no one experiences the school-to-prison pipeline like she was forced to.

Mckayla Wilkes continues to be a resounding voice on issues that affect the people of her district.
---
_" I am thrilled to be endorsed by Future Generations. Our campaign is centered on economic, racial, and environmental justice. That's why we are building a grassroots movement here in Maryland's 5th Congressional District to defeat a 42-year incumbent - because it's time for some damn change. For the sake of our children and the generations to come, we must enact a Green New Deal, guarantee healthcare and housing as human rights, honor indigenous sovereignty, and finally secure a just and livable planet."_

**Mckayla Wilkes, Candidate for U.S. House (MD-05)**
---
Future Generations is proud to be standing with Mckayla as she continues the fight to bring the fierce leadership and seismic change Congress so desperately needs. When elected, she would be the first openly LGBTQ+ person and first Black woman to represent her district.
But make no mistake -- this fight will not be easy. Mckayla is running against the second most powerful Democrat in the House and the most heavily corporate-funded. The status quo will do everything they can to stop her momentum.
**We must do everything we can to get her over the finish line.**
**[Will you help us in our efforts to make history in MD-05 with a split contribution between Mckayla and Future Generations today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zXnRVTzwf0dONB-ZYEQeU_kMJ3dy2Lt4AaERNqWpEuttaOtcvqPJmeQOW-J1MBgOGCXFgptK6vkYsrMuylG1e5L6qruEU2VaCRSDFjGpUNIaca936bIslGi_VNcJS1xHvs57Q5wXKq4m4tWrj975CvqsyCHp8OFDzdbjvnVLN7Vjse2OTeVBnD4FwopTaPLg7E9fP0DChRf1QxCwfem54nsjBz1AR_NXI6HWkIcBgVUJ0shCQiL40TrMALm4-J-aWYXX8pH33HZxrpJWvnD-2uHhj3D4Z0iIw3xBMOU8P1r8qWWW9Wa5AkkUj1eW4r3OXmvJHMhe6cgSXSagMZcYoMRfV4lRwYACKQKXJ_FJ11zw/3h4/IDg8YohVTgenr_I3mo4AtA/h3/G1S_6v37uDWLkY89izuL1WdoeWje9sWfMc7j3XBSS4g)**

Let's fight for something better. Help us elect #MckaylaForTheFuture! In solidarity,
Roza

| | **Future Generations** is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats.

We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. And as a working class single mom, Mckayla certainly knows what it means to live paycheck-to-paycheck. Lived experiences like hers are lacking in Congress and drive her advocacy, including ending the school-to-prison pipeline, to invest in people instead of neglecting them and to care for the environment. After her 2020 campaign, she co-founded the nonprofit advocacy organization Schools Not Jails to ensure no one experiences the school-to-prison pipeline like she was forced to. Mckayla Wilkes continues to be a resounding voice on issues that affect the people of her district. " I am thrilled to be endorsed by Future Generations. Our campaign is centered on economic, racial, and environmental justice. That's why we are building a grassroots movement here in Maryland's 5th Congressional District to defeat a 42-year incumbent - because it's time for some damn change. For the sake of our children and the generations to come, we must enact a Green New Deal, guarantee healthcare and housing as human rights, honor indigenous sovereignty, and finally secure a just and livable planet." Mckayla Wilkes, Candidate for U.S. House (MD-05) Future Generations is proud to be standing with Mckayla as she continues the fight to bring the fierce leadership and seismic change Congress so desperately needs. When elected, she would be the first openly LGBTQ+ person and first Black woman to represent her district. But make no mistake -- this fight will not be easy. Mckayla is running against the second most powerful Democrat in the House and the most heavily corporate-funded. The status quo will do everything they can to stop her momentum. We must do everything we can to get her over the finish line. Let's fight for something better. Help us elect #MckaylaForTheFuture! In solidarity, Roza | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. Join our people-powered movement in the fight for the future. | | Connect with us by clicking on the links below: | | | Future Generations PAC P.O. Box 362 Palo Pinto, TX 76484 ©2021 Future Generations PAC, all rights reserved. | | Paid for by Future Generations PAC. ---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe using the link below. | | Sent via . Ashley wants to know so she can best fight for you in Congress when she defeats Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and flips this seat next year. | — Team Ehasz | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Fellow Conservative,

**We can't wait for our event at Mar-a-Lago with President Trump in two weeks!**

One of the things we are most excited about is President Trump offered to reserve one ticket to our reception for the lucky supporter who wins our contest.

Here's how to enter: **[make a donation of ANY AMOUNT](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=46cfe41074004257ae69ed1c1a53ce80&_e=_9wGr_d-mPGZcTghV0Vjx0p4rV6Zc4aHgeuT_oqXCBkiO_MgPh51W6n7JMrxz-WAMkbaLh-QDJ5Uk1P3lwAxHiOz0kPBKXfojBHPFzs7mK3dEYt2DpXlAeY7ntJOeBWHwxXOKF7SMaK950Teg3zkxGccVdpCJ6mDvoD-XxbKWQpzWPLwMz7vsP25J6N_UANv_NAUJpEz6FKZjgrt0iFapUL--g8Z3xRGyF0PQ1gbFmoWRPIhVzgZzrEDkwXaQak_ql3HcVJQ-B745kAwcbBpE_-7A-PmQZauAY1V759jjLjKzLRGd7CILHvSuJAfU0jOzPSdyn9X4LL90hRcXwYqJX0H81pgPQODZBH3tGvtOsZbCHpid6s3lFHO_UBYSWrMJOGO5WHyKSiaooJqklAqXx6AFzg2o9F203WdFUZEdy4OUWWx8xyUWOclDxDbGFHqozli8REDplCYSk5P_m5f4w%3D%3D)** benefiting our campaign for the Senate and your name will be automatically entered into a drawing for roundtrip airfare, hotel stay, and a ticket to our event with President Trump.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Don’t believe their lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ecb0202ea0074f2ab00542355b76f27e&_e=qsUc1bTdx3hbygaTF1zr6kpqn5PNR01WsCM6iqvCBZZ84z99EfdRQCrulvHMa6ygcZUpoX2WnKTQ4FaMg1xXU41Yj0yo3bdqhi1dnF65dQBII5F1w6xrSpin35SYCa48HYA_tM3CTRiNeQudzOyoThCe2cEeO1FNH_ScV-pw7BQRJFu808bi55vep2TATxBXnFxtTtN8Ppa_ihGmpH_BQIgTa_6HDIe-oNqemisbIgU2QLx3w1ywthNWPGDcSJyn-XT8zIfHgAFPV3fpfUs_qZE6LW-iITw39jWLNrNGc4IV_HPBFPK9ixf3eQ8PZNEK3CAPbu2yFHqMfFM9h2hAvKwb7JSx_7J68uXad_yfaUeMfbfiMGzGuLxAweenMm6fxH1BMYcdmnhfhMjUxy5cT8bsrWP-SwXIq5bil81k_Fjk3okstHgjY5Dz5CC4AHXhZlR77YdKGPq81gc9a8klIA%3D%3D)

---
Peter - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it.

All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans.

I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ecb0202ea0074f2ab00542355b76f27e&_e=qsUc1bTdx3hbygaTF1zr6kpqn5PNR01WsCM6iqvCBZZ84z99EfdRQCrulvHMa6ygcZUpoX2WnKTQ4FaMg1xXU41Yj0yo3bdqhi1dnF65dQBII5F1w6xrSpin35SYCa48HYA_tM3CTRiNeQudzOyoThCe2cEeO1FNH_ScV-pw7BQRJFu808bi55vep2TATxBXnFxtTtN8Ppa_ihGmpH_BQIgTa_6HDIe-oNqemisbIgU2QLx3w1ywthNWPGDcSJynHb_GrG1UV7fbZL7wxzCbwGK6OzyVhVZZ8yI6faJXyXCReEARRI96l3u9WdQOs86xIMK_U_kPQMNhEjjhFBmkjJ2QA1C3a6pjMgL0hrVfh3G8aOYk4tEnFDoE-WujLH36cPMYTBPMDCCw3NUEOuLfuam2jzzcNHVT9JJIFE0pG3FBqYhatUfkxizmacEPYqKjmKD6NF8otlnxyc7bMY5DhQ%3D%3D)
Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump.

President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - _a mentor, a confidante, and a friend._

Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run.

Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ecb0202ea0074f2ab00542355b76f27e&_e=qsUc1bTdx3hbygaTF1zr6kpqn5PNR01WsCM6iqvCBZZ84z99EfdRQCrulvHMa6ygcZUpoX2WnKTQ4FaMg1xXU41Yj0yo3bdqhi1dnF65dQBII5F1w6xrSpin35SYCa48HYA_tM3CTRiNeQudzOyoThCe2cEeO1FNH_ScV-pw7BQRJFu808bi55vep2TATxBXnFxtTtN8Ppa_ihGmpH_BQIgTa_6HDIe-oNqemisbIgU2QLx3w1ywthNWPGDcSJyn5c9M3dX5viwc42qnshHFWAjiHjZrACaxX-10xGhXtLLkuY4jfT8ZfNeLId7eGSLmmKXqgfyvl742bpEH7G0P1HNST0MYvrZvnRCeDE7WBntpFD6TEcKI9mzcPLLCR_3xdqWDWd00msB9HtwMDNUZm7gDBX_1scCTufZk-UtSb8Yf0w65avRdg_1fC6LKmmK2dLWDb5NtLGhOt6eqNgQF5Q%3D%3D)
I firmly believe national leaders are taking our country down the wrong path. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year, which starts in Georgia by defeating the country's most vulnerable Senate Democrat.

**[Peter, if you agree that our nation is on the wrong track and desperately needs fresh, new leaders who will unite us instead of dividing us, will you support my campaign with a personal contribution of $25, $34, $50 or $100?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ecb0202ea0074f2ab00542355b76f27e&_e=qsUc1bTdx3hbygaTF1zr6kpqn5PNR01WsCM6iqvCBZZ84z99EfdRQCrulvHMa6ygcZUpoX2WnKTQ4FaMg1xXU41Yj0yo3bdqhi1dnF65dQBII5F1w6xrSpin35SYCa48HYA_tM3CTRiNeQudzOyoThCe2cEeO1FNH_ScV-pw7BQRJFu808bi55vep2TATxBXnFxtTtN8Ppa_ihGmpH_BQIgTa_6HDIe-oNqemisbIgU2QLx3w1ywthNWPGDcSJynbpz7tPmvuSI4IENOOQ4sFKuFMXhi0BbaZIKYYdi_mHvkW5LJKMyTWDh29ISbAiEC-3AlwXRdRKFo8ey8LCrKXMefAEN0p7tWojYGpsTPBSzlGHx75gvNIF3Y3rVqOYZdVVf7T_CPiQjrg9zcYFXK6iltPhozoaqbGVmRirqtrL2Yfj-JX6JpMAGctxpwt-NoJDOsp_KTaT_vUJAy01rmaA%3D%3D)**

Once we elect the right people to office and hold them accountable, we will bring this nation together rather than tearing it further apart. That's one of the reasons why I'm running for the U.S. Senate and why I'm humbly asking for your personal financial support today.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ecb0202ea0074f2ab00542355b76f27e&_e=qsUc1bTdx3hbygaTF1zr6kpqn5PNR01WsCM6iqvCBZZ84z99EfdRQCrulvHMa6ygcZUpoX2WnKTQ4FaMg1xXU41Yj0yo3bdqhi1dnF65dQBII5F1w6xrSpin35SYCa48HYA_tM3CTRiNeQudzOyoThCe2cEeO1FNH_ScV-pw7BQRJFu808bi55vep2TATxBXnFxtTtN8Ppa_ihGmpH_BQIgTa_6HDIe-oNqemisbIgU2QLx3w1ywthNWPGDcSJynjwzJ2iuI8Adpi0H3UZUooUTSs_dKuikQ3iUcNvRQ-Y8X5odhpgajtG9bYg44A-oeKrx5_cwraU9horIYhhvAnrRZhnhIWFiIF3dDa4416ld24f7s_7s9xTpMSo8eII2Yv5MJOGAa6lQFfq4zizae4i02ovrqmGkDU-Lw8-JIM17HWMWdi7QR1Af8QE52DTYbd7jO6oB5Qej-pqmok_tS8Q%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. This is a dangerous world. There's too much at stake right now to be pitting American against American. clean_body: If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. | Peter - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it. All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans. I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome. Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump. President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - a mentor, a confidante, and a friend. Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run. Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation. I firmly believe national leaders are taking our country down the wrong path. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year, which starts in Georgia by defeating the country's most vulnerable Senate Democrat. Once we elect the right people to office and hold them accountable, we will bring this nation together rather than tearing it further apart. That's one of the reasons why I'm running for the U.S. Senate and why I'm humbly asking for your personal financial support today. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. This is a dangerous world. There's too much at stake right now to be pitting American against American. If you agree, then I need all the support I can get to win this important race for our country's future. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: The first-ever Electrification Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38770233/316978591/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODMxNTc0ZS1iYzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqT2xxVcf-gORcQlUGI0UxkeZxRwoiMsAW_j_sSmuzs=&emci=e7d0c9ef-b848-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a831574e-bc48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)
---
It’s been a big week, folks. Yesterday, I launched an Electrification Caucus in the House and Senate, alongside my co-chairs Senator Tina Smith and Representatives Kathy Castor and Paul Tonko. Together, we are lighting the way for a full clean energy transition in homes, vehicles, and businesses. **Electrifying America is one of the most meaningful, direct ways we can act on climate change.** That’s why it’s so important we make it accessible to every New Mexican and person in our country. Our first-ever Electrification Caucus will help advance policies to make that happen — cutting down energy bill costs, cleaning up our air, addressing the climate crisis, and creating lots of good jobs. Thanks to the historic infrastructure bill, New Mexico is getting $38 million to expand an electric vehicle charging network. We’ll see even more benefits when we pass the _Build Back Better Act_ and put money back into folks’ pockets when they install electric appliances in their households. The Electrification Caucus will build on all this great work — bringing forward more policies to take on climate change, boost our economy, and insulate you from the fluctuating costs of fossil fuels. I’m counting on this grassroots team to power the hard work ahead. **Can you chip in any amount to build on this momentum and support our work to address climate change with the urgency it deserves?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38770234/316978592/1569722553?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODMxNTc0ZS1iYzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqT2xxVcf-gORcQlUGI0UxkeZxRwoiMsAW_j_sSmuzs=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38770235/316978593/1569722553?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODMxNTc0ZS1iYzQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqT2xxVcf-gORcQlUGI0UxkeZxRwoiMsAW_j_sSmuzs=)

clean_body: It’s been a big week, folks. Yesterday, I launched an Electrification Caucus in the House and Senate, alongside my co-chairs Senator Tina Smith and Representatives Kathy Castor and Paul Tonko. Together, we are lighting the way for a full clean energy transition in homes, vehicles, and businesses. Electrifying America is one of the most meaningful, direct ways we can act on climate change. That’s why it’s so important we make it accessible to every New Mexican and person in our country. Our first-ever Electrification Caucus will help advance policies to make that happen — cutting down energy bill costs, cleaning up our air, addressing the climate crisis, and creating lots of good jobs. Thanks to the historic infrastructure bill, New Mexico is getting $38 million to expand an electric vehicle charging network. We’ll see even more benefits when we pass the Build Back Better Act and put money back into folks’ pockets when they install electric appliances in their households. The Electrification Caucus will build on all this great work — bringing forward more policies to take on climate change, boost our economy, and insulate you from the fluctuating costs of fossil fuels. I’m counting on this grassroots team to power the hard work ahead. Can you chip in any amount to build on this momentum and support our work to address climate change with the urgency it deserves? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. It will take each and every one of us doing our part to tackle the climate crisis. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5cuni0onld7f1c8m692s6c05cngitu795cn9g30_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9jmcoj0cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zca5iq1hpc6b50u95vrts08h2c4lvbfdq5j79gso_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c9jmcoj0cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! subject: RE: Steve Bannon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
CNN called it a "warning" to the rest of President Trump's allies.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808784:6_mBeS2dN:m:1:3253819041:0C64282303143146D8F1F4CA22BC0690:r)
---
Peter,
---
**_Steve Bannon was just INDICTED on bogus charges of 'criminal contempt of Congress.'_**
---
CNN immediately called Bannon's indictment a "WARNING" to the rest of President Trump's allies like me.
---
_There 's no other way to say this: I urgently need your support._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808784:6_mBeS2dN:m:1:3253819041:0C64282303143146D8F1F4CA22BC0690:r)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808784:6_mBeS2dN:m:1:3253819041:0C64282303143146D8F1F4CA22BC0690:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808784:6_mBeS2dN:m:1:3253819041:0C64282303143146D8F1F4CA22BC0690:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808784:6_mBeS2dN:m:1:3253819041:0C64282303143146D8F1F4CA22BC0690:r)
---
**To indict Bannon for refusing to testify is LUDICROUS.**
---
Bannon may not even have the right to testify in the first place due to executive privilege.
---
__But these vengeful thugs don 't give a DAMN about the law.__
---
Hell, they had the gall to RAID my law offices!
---
This is nothing but political vengeance against President Trump and his allies like me who had the audacity to form a new government that finally put the American people first.
---
In fact, CNN accidentally admitted the truth...
---
**...They said that Bannon 's indictment will show whether President Trump's allies "can endure protracted legal battles..."**
---
_The Deep State is trying to bury us in so many subpoenas and legal fees until we can simply no longer "endure."_
---
_But mark my words:_ **__I WILL endure__** \-- because thousands of patriots like you are supporting me against this unjust assault on my freedom and justice.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808784:6_mBeS2dN:m:1:3253819041:0C64282303143146D8F1F4CA22BC0690:r)
---
Thank you,

Rudy Giuliani

body:
This is a critical opportunity to show Mitch McConnell and the GOP that we aren’t going to let them flip the Senate on our watch.
#
Peter, yesterday Patty told you about our big $21,987 fundraising goal \-- and this team has already stepped up in a huge way. _**We’re nearly halfway to meeting our goal.**_
This is a critical opportunity to show Mitch McConnell and the GOP that we aren’t going to let them flip the Senate on our watch. We’re standing with Patty and Senate Democrats -- and we will fight as hard as we can to keep the Senate blue so we can keep moving our nation forward and create the opportunities families, workers, and small businesses need.
We’ve only got one more day to meet our big mid-month fundraising goal, so we’re asking:

name: Dennis + Lee Horton
subject: fwd: You're invited!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Don’t miss tonight’s event.
#
Derek,
Did you see John’s email from earlier this week?
**Our Power of a Pardon Virtual Event is tonight at 7:00 PM ET and it’s not too late to say you’ll be there.**
Join us for a viewing of PBS's new documentary series, _The Power of a Pardon_ , followed by a panel discussion. We’ll share our story and path to freedom, and the power of a 2nd chance.
[**_Will you RSVP right now to let us know if you can make it?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211118-3514&t=1&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)
**[RSVP Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211118-3514&t=2&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)**
Thanks, and see you soon!
— Dennis + Lee Horton
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: John Fetterman <info@johnfetterman.com>
Date: Monday, November 15
Subject: You’re invited
I *can’t wait* for this, Derek.
**On Thursday, November 18 at 7:00 p.m. ET, our team is hosting an exclusive viewing of PBS's new documentary series,_The Power of a Pardon_ , followed by a panel discussion on the power of a 2nd chance.**
[**_Can you join us? After you RSVP, we’ll send you the link to join the event on Thursday._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211118-3514&t=3&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)__
**[RSVP Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211118-3514&t=4&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)**
[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211118-3514&t=5&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)
While most states allow those serving life sentences access to parole, that's not the case here in PA. Brothers Dennis and Lee Horton spent 28 years in prison for a crime they did not commit.
As told in PBS's new documentary series, _The Power of a Pardon_ , the story of the Horton brothers' path to freedom could only run through the Pennsylvania Board of Pardons.
This Thursday, we’ll be joined by Dennis and Lee Horton, documentary series producer Jamila Paxima, and our Team Fetterman Political Director, Celeste Trusty.
This live virtual event is free to attend and open to the public. It’s important that we get a head count, though, [**_so please RSVP now if you can so the team can count on your attendance this Thursday, November 18 at 7:00 p.m. ET._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211118-3514&t=6&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)__
**[RSVP Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211118-3514&t=7&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)**
And remember: **After you RSVP, we’ll send you the link you’ll need to tune in to the event.**
Thanks and see you soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211118-3514-footer&t=8&refcode2=3514_434096_c6Tby0&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3514%2E434096%2Ec6Tby0)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: The right to vote is sacred.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
We have to fight to protect it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38770597/316980705/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211118Opponent_OPPO_MTO_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDYyMmQxMi1iZjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7wv4QWbmSfT4S9bIOmaQ2WVAWWVvzr8Tb9y1cBG9G4=)
When I became New Mexico’s Secretary of State, I knew I would be carrying a great responsibility. **The right to vote is sacred.** It is the cornerstone of our democracy -- that every single person who is eligible to vote gets to vote. I _live_ by this principle as Secretary of State. It guides everything that I do.
That’s why I have fought for:
* Early voting.
* Easy access to the ballot box.
* Same-day voter registration.
* Mail-in ballots, especially while we are still in a pandemic.

**_My opponent thinks New Mexico should not have any of that._** That should be very troubling to everyone.

_Now more than ever, our democracy is in _peril_._ We _must_ fight to ensure that _all eligible New Mexicans can exercise their right to vote_.
**In a matter of weeks, I will have to stop fundraising because the New Mexico Legislature is returning to session, but my opponent can continue raising money. We are trying to raise $5,000 before our fundraising blackout.[Will you chip in $20 right now while we’re in this final push?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38770598/316980708/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211118Opponent_OPPO_MTO_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDYyMmQxMi1iZjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7wv4QWbmSfT4S9bIOmaQ2WVAWWVvzr8Tb9y1cBG9G4=)**

_ _
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6593%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KZm%2fZa7Ol%2ffCDnF1CaK6cQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67165%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fvX1RJTC4mGdLEkKZR45Tg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67166%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E%2bVEv9IIqI1ehQ%2foDhqdpQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67167%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hVlS9X7WQqm3H4%2bSQ26O5w&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6593%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KZm%2fZa7Ol%2ffCDnF1CaK6cQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6593%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KZm%2fZa7Ol%2ffCDnF1CaK6cQ&sysid=1)
