name: Herschel Walker
subject: Republicans must take back control of the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a6d4fc2cd2040f4a6da1b4811d007a5&_e=WpEM0GvkucKgA6bX681JWp6HWowLBC4sjCJATe_aOAIXO60PchYX1sRmvECdztncadIzbg5Tb4cQx9BduHWrM8l727dbCh_NLqwLaqxvQ86x8Uj7t9mZ4vhEydferQOx4DGIPQrW4lS-gLb7h_EoeRT9nCB1mBwMVBuTLBpkAAM0roI6TaY1cIZQ0LVz8KRJEwmpbnyT5Ec7yjrLJkQcBFxQDy7rohddv1wyYVNy2atB2OYVDhPIpZSH6EoDFBpvzRTOdnKSxts0FHclPpzMZCmY9d0gkcqeC2OYe2905okXJM1hS_PtSOLDfbwFP6ck6ZWCFtX4aneeV-eOZ5-AFqxd-kWTgwWJqgN07Pho_W5tNm6B4NQzXOOR3et7deGcWvCCoyTeh8zF_Sj4BlsVnDq_X69RZkP6vAycYEYIwOYUgke1vvYfasmwKBFh17o52D4Vj2z7KPPUnyuUdTPwMA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it.

All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans.

I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a6d4fc2cd2040f4a6da1b4811d007a5&_e=WpEM0GvkucKgA6bX681JWp6HWowLBC4sjCJATe_aOAIXO60PchYX1sRmvECdztncadIzbg5Tb4cQx9BduHWrM8l727dbCh_NLqwLaqxvQ86x8Uj7t9mZ4vhEydferQOx4DGIPQrW4lS-gLb7h_EoeRT9nCB1mBwMVBuTLBpkAAM0roI6TaY1cIZQ0LVz8KRJEwmpbnyT5Ec7yjrLJkQcBFxQDy7rohddv1wyYVNy2auDPyXyDDN6C7T1e_AT3ze8baVormMTwdyy8mCZR1aixoc23WYiExKBE3XmkLzAgj2GV3iGegbFK20cyq5urCBYXsbYWeoRsKB37izaCN1RN23rI7_USOoweW1pCxCzUf5e2_Hk8g9LbHiDH8CRMTzoQlqAgx1hnlqdOx-AoNOKBdLlQr5jxy2H-IEr2RF5nqk7YPk-wx0ZZX1PgFPaTs6VFycgjXX8a6u7DqoKvg7CIA%3D%3D)
Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump.

President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - _a mentor, a confidante, and a friend._

Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run.

Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a6d4fc2cd2040f4a6da1b4811d007a5&_e=WpEM0GvkucKgA6bX681JWp6HWowLBC4sjCJATe_aOAIXO60PchYX1sRmvECdztncadIzbg5Tb4cQx9BduHWrM8l727dbCh_NLqwLaqxvQ86x8Uj7t9mZ4vhEydferQOx4DGIPQrW4lS-gLb7h_EoeRT9nCB1mBwMVBuTLBpkAAM0roI6TaY1cIZQ0LVz8KRJEwmpbnyT5Ec7yjrLJkQcBFxQDy7rohddv1wyYVNy2asssZcWBuwGg-Z89N__hwi-u7tGVg2Adp4qi0J2pex12wo25jr694ca-uGvOuku8IWYV1UHpV82UgklNwiezEi14NnAjSlyeKpBpJ4QD46PZnnLLjqy9DNN3X-P0baRb9we2SfANN46v9QKQN0TzFTG47-f65IDx-kBidrAOCrNxHGF0qUp6rr74-awvcxx_kER2c--iwcJtTZHQvVRz77CbyEFU7w2BuicnBgQh-KNJg%3D%3D)
I firmly believe national leaders are taking our country down the wrong path. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year, which starts in Georgia by defeating the country's most vulnerable Senate Democrat.

**[Fellow American, if you agree that our nation is on the wrong track and desperately needs fresh, new leaders who will unite us instead of dividing us, will you support my campaign with a personal contribution of $25, $34, $50 or $100?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a6d4fc2cd2040f4a6da1b4811d007a5&_e=WpEM0GvkucKgA6bX681JWp6HWowLBC4sjCJATe_aOAIXO60PchYX1sRmvECdztncadIzbg5Tb4cQx9BduHWrM8l727dbCh_NLqwLaqxvQ86x8Uj7t9mZ4vhEydferQOx4DGIPQrW4lS-gLb7h_EoeRT9nCB1mBwMVBuTLBpkAAM0roI6TaY1cIZQ0LVz8KRJEwmpbnyT5Ec7yjrLJkQcBFxQDy7rohddv1wyYVNy2auUiZqnmOkZmNcQWdmTOPcoaGHXqMO6EfSyUeGVFWhnY-F2Pz2kiTz4uMxwcKdsP1ICmf8SpM-23XaVFUx4TmTfZXEDoI6FNgUu2RbYUa_q8dzBkBnpbD3AGFi3hHBFpTRoX-i9S-HGkl1gfZhzHbdPbS9rOVFjtsNrc-h-IhUWc_LNO6RHRtAILbP-vtS8KjH0hz5Tqxde-8ag8LDo0THBPcy2e7Ad8UHrkxSEchJYfA%3D%3D)**

Once we elect the right people to office and hold them accountable, we will bring this nation together rather than tearing it further apart. That's one of the reasons why I'm running for the U.S. Senate and why I'm humbly asking for your personal financial support today.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a6d4fc2cd2040f4a6da1b4811d007a5&_e=WpEM0GvkucKgA6bX681JWp6HWowLBC4sjCJATe_aOAIXO60PchYX1sRmvECdztncadIzbg5Tb4cQx9BduHWrM8l727dbCh_NLqwLaqxvQ86x8Uj7t9mZ4vhEydferQOx4DGIPQrW4lS-gLb7h_EoeRT9nCB1mBwMVBuTLBpkAAM0roI6TaY1cIZQ0LVz8KRJEwmpbnyT5Ec7yjrLJkQcBFxQDy7rohddv1wyYVNy2avV6RzH6kO707khs3opBJWJ5qqoeFOEl3RZeDmAr_FUdHi6k-W5WRH9zcsowtxhj8FOqpX4wkN6ZFzjR16gEs1QbAzv7R61A0qMYtyKtMO7ji96mz02Hj1FM65yGqzCSCCGF-Irkx45JWs3YE5BJmHD30RDLCzxDUQYdCbnpXZW-q86y6_o03e3_wT6JZDzT58oRO5cnUeReT8rHvX3kBvYFsytkA4ZnpDrQOjMVGFSYw%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. This is a dangerous world. There's too much at stake right now to be pitting American against American. clean_body: If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year. | Fellow American - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it. All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans. I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome. Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump. President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - a mentor, a confidante, and a friend. Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run. Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation. I firmly believe national leaders are taking our country down the wrong path. If we are going to turn this nation around, Republicans must take back control of the Senate next year, which starts in Georgia by defeating the country's most vulnerable Senate Democrat. Once we elect the right people to office and hold them accountable, we will bring this nation together rather than tearing it further apart. That's one of the reasons why I'm running for the U.S. Senate and why I'm humbly asking for your personal financial support today. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. This is a dangerous world. There's too much at stake right now to be pitting American against American. If you agree, then I need all the support I can get to win this important race for our country's future. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? President Donald J. clean_body: They’re attacking President Trump’s allies one by one... | Peter, First, it was Rudy Giuliani, now the Deep State has INDICTED my good friend Steve Bannon all because he’s an America First warrior who refuses to be silenced. Unfortunately, I’m no stranger to being the target of the Deep State and shady billionaires like George Soros who pull the strings from behind the curtain. In fact, Soros funded a radicalized prosecutor to make false allegations against me and is actively paying a liberal watchdog to file endless FEC complaints against our campaign to try and stall our momentum. These far-left elitists are DESPERATE to stop America First patriots from taking back our country -- but together, we can beat their schemes. CNN even called Bannon’s indictment a “warning” for President Trump’s allies. It’s clear the liberal powers that be are willing to go to whatever lengths necessary to silence pro-Trump patriots. Just consider the lengths Soros has gone to attack me to try and save Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority. I firmly believe that the collective power of grassroots Americans will ALWAYS prevail against corrupt liberal elites, but we need to show at this pivotal moment that we REFUSE to back down. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Here we go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We're one step closer to the final vote on a bill that will deliver popular progressive policies to the working people.
#
Peter, here we go: Floor debate has officially begun on the Build Back Better Act!
We're one massive step closer to the final vote on a bill that will deliver popular progressive policies to the people — like universal pre-K, paid family and medical leave, Medicare expansion, action to address climate change, affordable housing, affordable childcare, and much more.
Because of supporters like you joining Pramila in this fight, Peter, we got this far — _but we can't let up now._**Only hours remain before the big vote — and we need everyone to join us in urging the House to PASS the Build Back Better Act.**
[**Can you let Pramila know that you're still with her in the push to pass the Build Back Better Act this week by rushing a contribution of $3 to our movement right now? No more delays.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211118?refcode=em20211118-812&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=812_420207_gs5vR4&akid=812%2E420207%2Egs5vR4)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: BREAKING: Sunrise endorses Jessica Cisneros
body:
We’re going to defeat Exxon’s choice in TX-28.
#
Peter, we’ve said electing Jessica Cisneros in TX-28 was going to take a mountain of grassroots support and partners on the ground supporting our fight against corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar. Well, today, our coalition grew in a big way: **Sunrise Movement just endorsed Jessica!**
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84402?refcode=em20211118-20555&t=1&akid=20555%2E1203867%2En2ZVdJ)
**Jessica is the Green New Deal champion we need in Congress fighting for the people and the environment.** Her opponent, Henry Cuellar, has received more than $800,000 from the fossil fuel industry. He’s one the most conservative Democrats in the House, especially when it comes to climate change. We need to elect Jessica and defeat him.
[Can you add to Jessica’s momentum today and donate directly to her campaign? $5, $10, $27, or anything at all will help Jessica run a winning campaign. Early voting is less than 90 days away!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84402?refcode=em20211118-20555&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20555%2E1203867%2En2ZVdJ)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84402?refcode=em20211118-20555&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20555%2E1203867%2En2ZVdJ)**
The Democratic Party isn’t taking the bold action we need to solve the climate crisis. The answer is right there in front of us: a Green New Deal. But lawmakers like Henry Cuellar and the rest of the corporate Democrats are holding us back. Cuellar doesn’t even want to take _incremental steps_ on climate. That’s how bad he is.
**Peter, we need to send Jessica support today so that she can beat the corporate incumbent.** Cuellar has more money than Jessica because of all the money he takes from Big Oil and Wall Street. We’ll organize harder than Cuellar, that’s for sure, but we need to close the money gap too.
[So, can you step up today and send a donation directly to Jessica’s campaign? With early voting just around the corner, now is the time to send a few bucks to a progressive fighter for the Green New Deal.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84402?refcode=em20211118-20555&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20555%2E1203867%2En2ZVdJ)
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=20555%2E1203867%2En2ZVdJ) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=20555%2E1203867%2En2ZVdJ) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211118-20555-footer&t=25&refcode2=20555_1203867_n2ZVdJ&akid=20555%2E1203867%2En2ZVdJ)**
---

body:
Asking for your help in case i get de-platformed | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=8fc2039798384548bd5997baa90d1e81&_e=sztowWcrdWRlyHbC8JIH84tp6MoJh3GbLPP3B7RVLTgFMo6N0kbp0T4KzCXpvLTvmC49mRyj6-sAEZgDEwwJ-AsOvwo5XxfuMumMqdWouySHrqbvyvJ7GHkCcUwCSZsIFHMG1Y-JDiDeFQRmdXV5Kv7lZJ4JdudpVHwUv6_3tZUOUdRRNkU_d75oS-_9DMxiUIL1sMVEov0vdlIcW5ztdOx8qTsgGHTaiHq8Blp5cfQ2-Nm0kMWE796EGqlssFZhGKl2gqtVwObQkWj2Hy1UWwJ5ej1RcAP29I_ajsv9Gitb5gKLYe1o-HpJpqUX-zBP3_AzFG5akWFbwkkQuTvc60h1vPs6Smt6gdfa4tgQsY-d59Nyp2mwQS_KaRPLB2OsHHkrdxL6gcwJN4olE222ris01azJmW8-kqCwgEVVmMMQezZltANgtKVfZx7dKejKDNRXQwSc0G1dv8mYGxagv0xAVSWKpPIHdII38DDCPf5Sm2tZke81d38NPEJ6MAAJlaK8sIBvSu4Hqu9FsUmof4pH00JzaIEQvhCxX9f888s3WMD8Feg56kKziv3njs--3SJwLzlnQ_5FLtaCtoS0pfbbC9vdHbeYg7HuFCNnEp51hjOGvdqwQf1ItbJxrwKu)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I have some disappointing news. This week I missed out on an _important endorsement_ opportunity.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=8fc2039798384548bd5997baa90d1e81&_e=sztowWcrdWRlyHbC8JIH84tp6MoJh3GbLPP3B7RVLTgFMo6N0kbp0T4KzCXpvLTvmC49mRyj6-sAEZgDEwwJ-AsOvwo5XxfuMumMqdWouySHrqbvyvJ7GHkCcUwCSZsIFHMG1Y-JDiDeFQRmdXV5Kv7lZJ4JdudpVHwUv6_3tZUOUdRRNkU_d75oS-_9DMxiUIL1sMVEov0vdlIcW5ztdOx8qTsgGHTaiHq8Blp5cfQ2-Nm0kMWE796EGqlssFZhGKl2gqtVwObQkWj2Hy1UWwJ5ej1RcAP29I_ajsv9Gitb5gKLYe1o-HpJpqUX-zBP3_AzFG5akWFbwkkQuTvc60h1vPs6Smt6gdfa4tgQsY-d59Nyp2mwQS_KaRPLB2OsHHkrdxL6gcwJN4olE222ris01azJmW8-kqCwgEVVmMPumEsi65I-fl3rmXdczsK2y3R9_zmpdqScicF9pH6eBDxM3SoGHd1zd6Bad-6No4sHOnydLsbJTqJq7988TrWCOYqTsnRRqC_Ev5m55pRJRNWSBDA6vEMIfMmevDGMpHa4dj7TIawQgbQOe0K7j8YMDwIwoMv97E6fWDrWKplSuVE2sb8OEL8B2KpdMP2uZYm6l0PmmpLVmBMQi-fF91Sq)
I lost the support of Keith Olbermann.

_Of course, I am kidding._

_I wasn't counting on the support of a Leftist corporate media shill._ **But his trolling made me think of something that we almost overlooked.**

They are a one-trick pony, and now that we know their game --we're ready for them! The progressive machine came after Rep. Byron Donalds and failed. Then, they called Senator Tim Scott an "oreo," and it backfired. They even threw objects at Larry Elder and defeated his candidacy for Governor of California, but when they referred to Winsome Sears as "a black face speaking on behalf of White supremacy" in Virginia, we handed them a defeat they didn't see coming. "A black Republican like Herschel Walker will be directly in the crosshairs of the Democrat attack machine, and we need to ensure he has the support he needs to win!" We cannot bury the Democrats under a Red Wave in 2022 unless we have your support. "We need to hear from you today." For a New Journey, "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley" James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley Founder, New Journey PAC | PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Rabine for Governor
subject: 11/18 Newsletter
body:
Our movement is growing and the enthusiasm for this campaign is undeniable.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=1) | |

[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=2) Dear Peter -- Our movement is growing and the enthusiasm for this campaign is undeniable. On Sunday Charlie Kirk joined for me a special event in Schaumburg. The place was packed with more than 200 attendees who listened to Charlie, and I talk about what we need to do to turn Illinois around. We need to push back against Pritzker’s war on families and I am the candidate who can best make him a one-term Governor. **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=3)
---
Best Regards,
Gary Rabine
* * *
### Project Hood 100 Day Camp-out Against Gun Violence (11/27)
Pastor Corey Brooks will mark the tenth anniversary of Project H.O.O.D. with a 100 Day Camp-out in protest of gun violence.
Pastor Brooks is raising funds to build a community center to expand Project H.O.O.D.’s services. Gary Rabine amongst CEOs, leaders, community stakeholders, and celebrities will join Pastor Brooks as they commit to spending at least one night on the roof.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=PZU23hx_LbfyyAY8PsDc1LZQczIB-CXto5lhTl6HOwR95-rjqWvwbiuQyd-4aqr-&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=4 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=PZU23hx_LbfyyAY8PsDc1LZQczIB-CXto5lhTl6HOwR95-rjqWvwbiuQyd-4aqr-&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=4)
---
### Pints & Politics (11/23)
Come out & meet Gary Rabine on November 23rd from 6PM-8PM for Pints & Politics hosted by the Kane County Chapter of the Three Headed Eagle Alliance!
TUESDAY, November 23rd
6PM-8PM
Copper Fox
477 S. Third St, Geneva IL
$10 donation for non-members.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOXbwY9LNMw-WE1tTqgLJHF2&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=5 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOXbwY9LNMw-WE1tTqgLJHF2&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_newsletter_email_list&n=5)
---
* * *
### Illinois Pension Debt Hurting Working Families
A new report shows Illinois families are on the hook for $110,000 in pension debt, a sum I believe in not sustainable.
For decades, leaders in Springfield have ignored the growing pension crisis in Illinois, and the end result is a debt level that is crippling our economy and hurting working families. Pretending this problem does not exist will not make it go away.”
The Wirepoints report shows each household in Illinois owes an average of $110,000 to shore up the state’s cash strapped pension funds. Illinois owes about $530 billion in state and local retirement debts, up $100 billion from last year according to the report. The state’s pension systems were only 39 percent funded in 2019, the lowest percentage in the country.
We have a big, big problem that none of our leaders in Springfield are even talking about. Pritzker and the leaders in the House and the Senate have plenty of time to debate legislation to take away the Right of Conscience for Illinois workers and rush to get that bill passed, but they cannot even bother to spend even a few moments on trying to solve the state’s pension crisis. Pension debt is consuming more and more of state tax revenue and forcing taxes to go up for working families.
We need a special session on pension reform. The longer we wait to solve this crisis, the worse the problem will become.
### Bill Allowing School Staff to take Administrative Leave for COVID-19 Hurts Kids
A measure the Legislature approved to all school staff to use administrative leave rather than sick time for COVID-19 related issues will lead to more days off and more remote learning days, according to school administrators.
“We fear that one of the unintended consequences would be more closures and a reverting back to remote learning,” Peg Agnos, Legislative Director with South Cooperative Organization for Public Education, told a legislative committee.
House Bill 2778 reclassifies sick days as administrative days for any COVID-19 related issues. Unfortunately, this legislation was approved with a veto-proof majority so even if the Governor vetoes it, the bill will likely be enacted into law anyway.
Decisions like this should not be made in Springfield, they should be made at the local level by local officials accountable to the people they represent. As Governor, I will stand up for the rights of parents and students and oppose over the top mandates such as the ones contained in House Bill 2778\.
### Legislation Silences Free Speech
This week, I had the privilege of speaking at the Madison County Lincoln Day in Granite City. I talked about my vision for turning Illinois around by lowering taxes, creating jobs, and standing up for Illinois families.
The day after the dinner, I had met with Pastor Barry Simmons of the New Visions World Ministries in Cahokia Heights, IL.
Pastor Simmons is looking for help to mentor and train young people in his community to get good paying jobs and turn away from a life of crime. He is doing some amazing things there, but he needs help. He needs a Governor who will put rhetoric into action. I look forward to working with good people like Pastor Simmons to help them continue to provide services to troubled youth. We can’t let these kids fall through the cracks.
* * *

TUESDAY, November 23rd 6PM-8PM Copper Fox 477 S. Third St, Geneva IL $10 donation for non-members. "Event Details Here" Illinois Pension Debt Hurting Working Families A new report shows Illinois families are on the hook for $110,000 in pension debt, a sum I believe in not sustainable. For decades, leaders in Springfield have ignored the growing pension crisis in Illinois, and the end result is a debt level that is crippling our economy and hurting working families. Pretending this problem does not exist will not make it go away.” The Wirepoints report shows each household in Illinois owes an average of $110,000 to shore up the state’s cash strapped pension funds. Illinois owes about $530 billion in state and local retirement debts, up $100 billion from last year according to the report. The state’s pension systems were only 39 percent funded in 2019, the lowest percentage in the country. We have a big, big problem that none of our leaders in Springfield are even talking about. Pritzker and the leaders in the House and the Senate have plenty of time to debate legislation to take away the Right of Conscience for Illinois workers and rush to get that bill passed, but they cannot even bother to spend even a few moments on trying to solve the state’s pension crisis. Pension debt is consuming more and more of state tax revenue and forcing taxes to go up for working families. We need a special session on pension reform. The longer we wait to solve this crisis, the worse the problem will become. Bill Allowing School Staff to take Administrative Leave for COVID-19 Hurts Kids A measure the Legislature approved to all school staff to use administrative leave rather than sick time for COVID-19 related issues will lead to more days off and more remote learning days, according to school administrators. “We fear that one of the unintended consequences would be more closures and a reverting back to remote learning,” Peg Agnos, Legislative Director with South Cooperative Organization for Public Education, told a legislative committee. House Bill 2778 reclassifies sick days as administrative days for any COVID-19 related issues. Unfortunately, this legislation was approved with a veto-proof majority so even if the Governor vetoes it, the bill will likely be enacted into law anyway. Decisions like this should not be made in Springfield, they should be made at the local level by local officials accountable to the people they represent. As Governor, I will stand up for the rights of parents and students and oppose over the top mandates such as the ones contained in House Bill 2778\. Legislation Silences Free Speech This week, I had the privilege of speaking at the Madison County Lincoln Day in Granite City. I talked about my vision for turning Illinois around by lowering taxes, creating jobs, and standing up for Illinois families. The day after the dinner, I had met with Pastor Barry Simmons of the New Visions World Ministries in Cahokia Heights, IL. Pastor Simmons is looking for help to mentor and train young people in his community to get good paying jobs and turn away from a life of crime. He is doing some amazing things there, but he needs help. He needs a Governor who will put rhetoric into action. I look forward to working with good people like Pastor Simmons to help them continue to provide services to troubled youth. We can’t let these kids fall through the cracks. * | Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.

I can't say this enough, Peter.

California is the key to winning back a Republican House majority in 2022. Eleven seats are targeted by the NRCC and/or DCCC, and redistricting could create 10 battleground seats - and we only need to flip 5 to win back the House!

**We just turned Virginia red, and nearly did the same in New Jersey - both places where Biden won in 2020.**

[**Now, we need to make California the next place where the Republican Wave breaks.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e3da9a0942d4b77bcc9e8021eab3105&_e=iNNd7aviqvFdyIw2vMsCkosfUZa0RYgIB5nuzQicCYsAo8wuK3xwaC7Y6G6QfoEdfGQ9ISA-DpGHJCpxfUn53dBAb-_L8WdltPwXwnYJnmARXkJMY7yq_lKvA92BgVRxw8VOsJpATWXsO8-fijoQjrbAZpke6t8KwkC1apcZLfq1SwB0V856l8VNRSCusFTnZ7NOgb4UuX7nbvui5b0wxfq64yod9eQMGWmNSIbW7SQMlRJ1L49Jq42eG0HBtIu49KfZsOF62ydniGdSt4y-W_LMhkixKe4yo5y1qhQ0Z55nIudp3ktqcuqF90CrJM3kMiessjIcQyxOw6Vlvd5qaUSJwpXIXkS-dY5G_BE2uOBhwDxIeoI-yKQDg_uTS-iVlmv3D81Q8UKathpp6Quz4_DbyuVNr0KXu2wVGRDkAjMLVwngHC0wxT8Gv0duNWZZxZ7iVpBlHt0mOSn9fZ5bVA%3D%3D)

As the **Co-Chairman of Save California Now PAC** , I'm asking for you to help us flood the West Coast with grassroots conservative dollars so we can flip these competitive, targeted House seats in California and win back a majority.

[**We need 250 grassroots conservatives to chip in $25 in the next 48 hours so we can maintain the momentum from our Virginia wins and take the fight to California next.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e3da9a0942d4b77bcc9e8021eab3105&_e=iNNd7aviqvFdyIw2vMsCkosfUZa0RYgIB5nuzQicCYsAo8wuK3xwaC7Y6G6QfoEdfGQ9ISA-DpGHJCpxfUn53dBAb-_L8WdltPwXwnYJnmARXkJMY7yq_lKvA92BgVRxw8VOsJpATWXsO8-fijoQjrbAZpke6t8KwkC1apcZLfq1SwB0V856l8VNRSCusFTnZ7NOgb4UuX7nbvui5b0wxfq64yod9eQMGWmNSIbW7SQMlRJ1L49Jq42eG0HBtIu4Cu5CBG1goDEo2mltMlsdgTwRoR9xKmzuTrWOIjHaufp5PpiAD-AIf_G8VlCJJRbr6F9B2WhAseNDgi-GEQklR6bhn-IcreKSZLYyzu8c490RkmvqaK_TuMmleKBVdQHdDSeQjrH5wi6v8w5uFjgdMIRiU6hufv74BELMeusvO_lGNfiSbc4h2dVZGsAwprIO2SwXx2PHt6F38Z11rpoEYA%3D%3D)

# [WATCH: Sen. Kennedy deploys bigoted and xenophobic tactics in committee](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=dce8a87805&e=03e0a9e31b)[.](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=34b6818c61&e=03e0a9e31b)
| Peter,

clean_body: | Peter, Joe Biden’s tanking approval numbers and radical agenda are spelling doom for Democrats’ electoral hopes next year. With an 8-point lead in the polls, Republicans are poised to flip the House majority -- but we MUST win this seat FIRST. Make no mistake -- a RED WAVE is coming in 2022, but Nancy Pelosi is desperately doing everything she can to hold onto power in Congress -- and that means she must keep me from winning. Democrats know that keeping the majority means they must win this battleground district, so they are raising huge amounts of money to try and beat me. Despite poor polling, Nancy Pelosi and the Left are stockpiling record amounts of cash to win this Arizona seat, trying to cling to power and retain control of Congress. Republicans failing to win back the majority would just empower Pelosi to continue fast tracking Joe Biden’s dangerous agenda -- something that Americans just cannot afford to let happen. We can’t take anything for granted. We must double our efforts to win voters and spread our winning message. But to ensure we have the resources to WIN, we need YOUR help. Peter,

There's no doubt about it: Anthony Fauci needs to resign.
* _He lied about masks. _
* _He lied about funding gain of function research._
* _And he's never going to tell the truth about the origins of COVID-19._

He's intentionally misled, misinformed, and failed the American people.

But here's the thing: a power-hungry bureaucrat like Fauci is never going to step down on his own accord.

Just look at this recent headline:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808693:6gKz5S2kN:m:1:3253819041:92F42A03EF11D824DAF518678B7DEE4C:r)
That leaves us one choice, Peter. If Fauci won't step down, he must be FIRED.

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58808693:6gKz5S2kN:m:1:3253819041:92F42A03EF11D824DAF518678B7DEE4C:r) **

We know if the media's favorite doctor had his way, COVID-19 would NEVER be in the rearview mirror.

You can tell by the way he downplays natural immunity, hypes up any "variant" of the virus, and ignores the most recent, effective treatments for Coronavirus.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy Fauci EVER. He won't sacrifice the power if he has a choice. _That 's why he's basically telling us he's NEVER going to step down. _

But I refuse to allow Fauci's chaos to become permanent. I'm calling on the administration to do what is right and FIRE FAUCI NOW.

Will you join my fight by chipping in today?

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38774270/316999107/-783913782?refcode=EM_FR_211118debt_N_JA_90DO_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGU4MzY3MC1jZTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LcZ4253yu-vMUwXh9Th7ksS164vx5Xijq4A9BwhZVOE=) Team,

**Student loan debt is the second-largest source of household debt, and it’s crippling entire communities.**

Black Americans hold _twice as much student loan debt_ as their white counterparts, making student loan cancellation a matter of racial justice as well as economic equality.

In 2020, we helped elect President Biden and a Democratic majority in Congress in part because they vowed to address the student loan debt crisis. With over 45 million people in the US holding $1.6 trillion in student debt, it’s time they act.

_Peter, I know you don’t always have the time to read a longer email like this one. But this is really important to me so I hope you’ll read the whole thing._

When we won the White House and majorities in both bodies of Congress, Democrats were thrilled -- but I was a little apprehensive.

_**Would we be able to pass the critical reforms that the American people desperately needed?**_

Now, 10 months later, the honest answer is: I don’t know.

The good news is alongside President Biden we HAVE passed incredible legislation like COVID-19 relief, environmental protections, and just recently the incredible $1.2 trillion infrastructure bill.

But to be honest, I was sorely disappointed that we weren’t able to include the rest of President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda -- paid family leave, free community college, a wealth tax, climate change action, and more.

And as Republicans continue to obstruct, filibuster, and cheat Americans out of these needed reforms, we’re realizing it will take more than two years to undo all of Trump’s damage and enact our own reforms.

_**That’s why it would be so tragic if Democrats lose the House in 2022.**_

Because the honest truth is, we’re on the precipice of instituting our progressive vision for America. We just need a few more years.

[**Peter, that’s why I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $3 to help me keep CA-41 blue and save our House majority? clean_body: With the midterms right around the corner... | Friend, With Election Day less than 1 year out, we’re kicking things into high gear to RETIRE Nancy Pelosi. We’ve set an ambitious new fundraising goal to close out 2021 by doubling down on our last $1-million quarter -- and to help us get there, I’ve secured an unprecedented 400% MATCH on all gifts for the next 24 hours. Remember, if we win Texas’ NEW seat, we will END Pelosi’s radical majority and place the House back in conservative hands. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. I'll be brief, so please hear me out --

The team reached out earlier because we've had to recalibrate our strategy to elect Tom Perez as the next Governor of Maryland. In light of recent elections that were _way_ too close for Democrats, we have to increase our budget to execute our strategy.

Making up the gap means we need to bring in an additional 350 contributions today and with less than five hours to go, we're still 243 contributions short. **I need to have this deficit handled before Thanksgiving so I've got to ask:**

_**[Please rush $12 or as much as you can RIGHT NOW to help elect Tom. name: Team King for Maryland
subject: King's Chronicle Newsletter #4
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
The King's Chronicle: November 18, 2021

Happy American Education Week, Team! This week we celebrate public education and honor all the amazing educators and school staff who work tirelessly to guarantee every student has the tools to succeed in and out of the classroom. Especially as the GOP continues to blow their Critical Race Theory dog whistles, it's more important than ever that we stand up to defend our teachers.
More than that, we need to elect leaders with real education authority and expertise, who will lead by listening, and who will be the best advocate for Maryland schools and students. We need John King, and we're so glad to have your support as we build this movement to elect a teacher as governor.

Onward,
-Team King
PS: This Saturday in Prince George's County, District Heights Mayor Johnathan Medlock is hosting an event with John! RSVP by clicking here: https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/426032/ or check out the invitation below for more details— we hope you can join us!

TEAM KING UPDATES
TED TRIED : Yesterday, Senator Ted Cruz called out John during a Senate hearing using the far right's new favorite dog whistle, Critical Race Theory. He referred to John as "some fellow" so we'll just leave this here....

FORUM FRENZY : Next Monday, the Maryland Democratic Party is hosting their first Burgers & Brews Gubernatorial Candidates Forum in Waldorf, MD and Team King will be rallying in full force to show John our support before he takes the stage — want to join us? If you'd like to come out for the rally, you can RSVP here; https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/427685/ or you can sign up to watch the virtual livestream here: https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/428161/.

ENDORSEMENT ALERT : At-large Frederick County Councilman Kai Hagen endorsed John King for Governor of Maryland following the release of King’s plan to make Maryland a national leader in the fight against climate change. Councilman Hagen had previously endorsed Comptroller Peter Franchot, but switched his support after the Comptroller’s controversial vote on the I-270/495 toll lane expansion.

JOHN IN THE NEWS
MARYLAND MATTERS: John King on Climate: 'Many of My Opponents Have Vague Policy Platitudes'
"King released his climate action plan earlier this month, and while it may not have as many provisions as those of some of his opponents, he does appear to provide more details on how he plans to meet his goals than most of his opponents. King pledges to get Maryland to net-zero carbon emissions by 2035, with an interim goal of a 60% greenhouse gas emissions reduction by 2030, and his plan lays out specific goals for distinct sectors. King refers to it as 'a whole of society approach to tackling climate.' The list of priorities is broad and deep."
READ MORE: https://www.marylandmatters.org/2021/11/16/john-king-on-climate-many-of-my-opponents-have-vague-policy-platitudes/

Last week, John went on MSNBC to talk with Stephanie Ruhle on MSNBC to discuss how Critical Race Theory has become a talking point for the GOP to fear-monger voters into supporting them.
WATCH: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_news?refcode=20211104_newsletter

PROMISE TO PROGRESS: HOW MARYLAND WILL LEAD THE FIGHT AGAINST CLIMATE CHANGE
"Climate change is an existential threat to humanity. I am frightened for my young daughters’ futures and I am sure many readers feel the same way. We no longer have the time to be complacent or think about the climate crisis as some far-off issue for our children and grandchildren to solve. ....I’m running for Governor to take the promise of a sustainable, livable future and turn it into the progress we so desperately need."
READ MORE: https://www.johnkingforgovernor.com/news-article/promise-to-progress-how-maryland-will-lead-the-fight-against-climate-change/

ON THE ROAD WITH JOHN
Last Wednesday, Nov. 10th during our virtual Climate Town Hall, John shared his plan to lead Maryland toward a more sustainable future with Councilman Kai Hagen and thousands of Marylanders who joined us by phone and on Zoom.
On Monday, Nov. 8th John joined the Maryland Legislative Latino Caucus for their Virtual Forum. He continued to establish himself as the only progressive in the race by focusing on health care and housing as human rights.
On Sunday, Nov. 14th, John and Melissa enjoyed a great night out at the MD Legislative Black Caucus gala!

UPCOMING EVENTS
Prince George's County Meet and Greet with Mayor Medlock
Saturday, Nov. 20 @ 5:00PM
North Forestville Community Center,
2311 Ritchie Rd, Forestville, MD
RSVP: https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/426032/

MD Dems Burgers & Brews Gubernatorial Forum Rally
Monday, Nov. 22 @ 5:30PM
Red Tails Ocean Grille
173 St. Patrick St, Waldorf, MD
RSVP: https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/427685/

MD Dems Burgers & Brews Gubernatorial Forum Livestream
Monday, Nov. 22 @ 7:00PM
Virtual Livestream on Facebook Live
RSVP: https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/428161/

Baltimore City Meet and Greet with Secretary John King
Wednesday, Dec. 14 @ 6:00PM
Proof of vax required
Address Provided Upon RSVP
RSVP: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/090121?refcode=121421bell_em

WAYS TO GET INVOLVED
We are always eager for new supporters to join Team King, and there are many ways to get involved with the campaign!

SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER: https://secure.ngpvan.com/k4tMmAcfr0Wx2nb2-u6_IQ2
HOST AN EVENT: https://secure.ngpvan.com/k4tMmAcfr0Wx2nb2-u6_IQ2
WEAR YOUR SUPPORT: https://store.johnkingforgovernor.com/
DONATE MONTHLY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=newsletter&recurring=true
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JohnKingforGovernor
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/JohnBKing
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/johnkingforgovernor/

Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
John King for Governor
PO Box 8429
Silver Spring, MD 20107
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e9061356-7c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/6ecc2189-d048-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWNjMjE4OS1kMDQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rhjssL2cd_ZbeCa4WioP8TeHb31vO1inp5CD1_Gx8cU=&id=128050175 .

body:

| | Peter,

In the time I’ve spent with Dr. Yadira Caraveo, one thing that’s really stood out to me about her is her work ethic and willingness to go the extra mile for her community. **[Before I tell you about that, I have a request: we need to raise $2,000 from grassroots donors before the end of the week. Donate $25 or whatever you can right now >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38774559/317007041/1424041718?refcode=em_YC_FR_MM2_111821_op_a_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2FmYzFhYi1kMTQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkQxJfwKNdQMrDaMnstlfscldNOqG9134fK9EDGjJSA=)**

Dr. Yadira basically works nonstop. Between the campaign, the Colorado legislature, and the clinic — she’s always busy.

She’s busy because her constituents and her patients need her — and she’s dedicated her life to serving them. But at the same time, she’s fighting to fix the biggest challenges facing Coloradans. She knows that to solve issues like access to health care and education, or immigration reform, we need leaders like her in Congress.

I know she’ll bring this work ethic with her to Congress every single day and fight for what matters most to families across Colorado, not special interests and big corporations — because she’s already proven she can do it in the state legislature.

But her biggest challenge right now is beating back her GOP opponents — who are backed by special interests and dark-money groups with deep pockets, and foment the worst conspiracy theories undermining our country.

**[Can we count on you, Peter? | **Dr. Yadira Caraveo** is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: PRESS RELEASE: Statement on OSHA’s decision to suspend COVID-19 Vaccine Mandate on employers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rabine for Governor
body:
| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_press_release&n=1)
---
## **Statement on OSHA’s decision to suspend COVID-19 Vaccine Mandate on employers**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **Woodstock, IL** – Gary Rabine, candidate for Governor, is issuing the following statement on the Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) suspending the implementation of and the enforcement of the mandatory vaccine mandate on businesses and employees. “This is a big win for the rights of small business owners and the working men and women these businesses employ. There is still a long way to go in the ongoing litigation against the Biden Administration, but the decision to suspend the enforcement of the mandate ensures small owners and their employees will be protected while the courts deliberate. I am proud the Rabine Group of Companies has joined the Job Creators Network lawsuit against the Biden Administration. Standing up for the Right of Conscience of my employees is something I take very seriously. My employees are like family and requiring them to violate their right to make their own healthcare decisions is wrong. OSHA’s decision to not enforce the Biden Administration’s unconstitutional vaccine mandates is welcome news for employers and employees.” The Rabine Group of Companies is one of the lead plaintiffs in the [Job Creators Network](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=fuVJOTS7ma5HUWnAwpKOBZButmzrKUIfAm4acu4F5gdoNY-LGuyXQoOaaCdTQNQtSheHnN9NXan11BBqEMyQp-PsdO2UN2hC_810GAluvNZamDdH-1QNhxATtoIE1Tc1xrDbCxzwfosCoSJ_P_Uqd8Cyhuc48cv5oO06H7q-SLLvhjsjKvoj8-cqwlZgZOPrVWVJrXO4LbAdsF6cKvs2MroU9fB8kLecG3z4fYtw9AtEcjNOqDBj9KGTeLlVwSHLjTd1Nv9j8N859xRIKWrIgUfSHqL1eqpM4JeUq5b-bmS30YXq46R30CmjfZB0aGdT7nBmRoI3LF8KWr7zRnm2B_s0eZsJf596pEaF60hMMuYUnVVA65bXAINEu6tqmfBqa8MNQFMQC3aFTsSwa31U5w&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_press_release&n=2) (JCN) lawsuit in the United States Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit against the Biden Administration to block the implementation of its vaccine mandate on small businesses. The lead plaintiffs in the lawsuit include:
* **The Rabine Group of Companies (Gary Rabine, Founder)**
* **Lawrence Transportation Company (Eric Lawrence, CEO)**
* **Guy Chemical Company (Guy Berkebile, President)**
* **Independent Bakers Association (Nicholas Pyle, President)**
* **Terri Mitchell, Employee of Guy Chemical Company**

Paid for by Rabine for Governor
A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_press_release&n=3).
You can also keep up with Rabine for Governor on [Facebook](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uA-8DLBhIHBVvCsvLF75PkWa6PFHXYHGFtdpip_6NAs&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_18_press_release&n=4).

Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director

clean_body: When will Joe Biden help the American people? | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, Joe Biden has unraveled Americans' energy dominance and destroyed affordable energy. No to the American pipeline. Yes to Russia. No to drilling on American Federal lands. Yes to OPEC sending us more oil. When will Joe Biden say ‘yes’ to helping the American people? While Joe Biden makes a fool out of America, our foreign enemies are profiting off Joe Biden’s poor energy decisions. God Bless, Fred Keller Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: 23 North Derr Drive, Suite 2 Lewisburg, PA 17837 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: HAPPY BIRTHDAY PRESIDENT BIDEN (via DCCC)
subject: you WON’T sign President Biden’s card??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
SIGN THE CARD: Wish President Joe Biden a Happy Birthday >>
| | | **It 's almost President Biden's birthday!!

And here at Democratic HQ, we want to celebrate President Biden's special day with a card signed by his best supporters --_but your name 's not on it yet!_

Will you sign his card ASAP so that we're ready to make Saturday his best birthday yet?**

[**https://action.dccc.org/card/biden-birthday**](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [SIGN THE CARD: WIsh President Joe Biden a Happy Birthday >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
---

President Biden's birthday is only TWO days away!

And to celebrate, we want to show how grateful we are for President Biden's leadership and all he's done for our country.

**So we 're calling on 46,000 of his best supporters to sign his birthday card before midnight tonight. Can we count on you?**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/78ZXTZYdd8H-)
President Biden is an AMAZING leader.

_He led the charge to FLIP the Senate, HOLD the House, and DEFEAT Donald Trump.

He helped PASS the American Rescue Plan and an historic infrastructure bill.

And best of all, he's only just getting started!_

After all he's done for our country and for Democrats nationwide, we need to make sure this is his BEST birthday yet -- **but we can 't do it without your help!**

**So please: Will you help us make President Biden 's day INCREDIBLE by signing his card straight away?**

[QUICKLY: Sign President Biden's birthday card before midnight >>](https://links.e.dccc.)

Thanks,

DCCC

|

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45965132&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMjA3Nzk0MQS2&l=14176647&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. clean_body: SIGN THE CARD: Wish President Joe Biden a Happy Birthday >> | | | It 's almost President Biden's birthday!! And here at Democratic HQ, we want to celebrate President Biden's special day with a card signed by his best supporters --but your name 's not on it yet! Will you sign his card ASAP so that we're ready to make Saturday his best birthday yet? | President Biden's birthday is only TWO days away! And to celebrate, we want to show how grateful we are for President Biden's leadership and all he's done for our country. So we 're calling on 46,000 of his best supporters to sign his birthday card before midnight tonight. Can we count on you? President Biden is an AMAZING leader. He led the charge to FLIP the Senate, HOLD the House, and DEFEAT Donald Trump. He helped PASS the American Rescue Plan and an historic infrastructure bill. And best of all, he's only just getting started! After all he's done for our country and for Democrats nationwide, we need to make sure this is his BEST birthday yet -- but we can 't do it without your help! So please: Will you help us make President Biden 's day INCREDIBLE by signing his card straight away? Thanks, DCCC | Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

**Forgive the urgency, but I just had to drop into your inbox with huge news, friend:**
After Roll Call analysts named Marco Rubio the second most vulnerable GOP senator in the country, I'm falling short of the $50,000 I need to raise by midnight tonight to win in Florida. Simply put, missing this goal will force my team to make some difficult decisions in this race.
This is _not_ the time to come up short. All the indicators point to my success, to my ability to flip Florida blue and defend the Senate: recent polling showing me within the margin of error, and The Cook Political Report has increased my chances of winning. **I'm gaining ground in my race, friend, but if I don't have the resources to seize this momentum, I risk losing this critical pickup opportunity and the Senate. **
Florida's last Senate race was decided by 0.12 points (just 10,033 votes). Winning such a tight race means I cannot afford to be massively outspent by Marco Rubio and his allies, which** ** means I cannot afford to miss tonight's midnight goal.**I urgently need your help to compete in this race that will decide Senate control. [So please, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare to help me hit my midnight fundraising goal? | | Friend,

Please join me and my dear friends, volunteers, and supporters for my 29th Annual Thanksgiving Dinner.

**The event is scheduled for Saturday, November 20, 2021 from 11:00 am - 2:00 pm at Alice Harte Charter School, 5300 Berkley Drive! **

The event is drive-thru, so stay in your cars and we will serve you. Food will be served on a first-come, first-served basis.

To volunteer, call (504) 510-9000.

Sincerely,
Congressman Troy Carter

subject: War on Cops claims another casualty
body:

The worst part about this story is that it's not an isolated incident. Tens of thousand of law enforcement officers have resigned or retired this year.
**The City of Phoenix has budgeted for 3,000 sworn officers, but has only been able to retain 2,770. They're missing more than two hundred police officers!**
That has consequences across a city of 1.6 million. Crime is rising and there simply aren't enough officers to keep the peace.
[_**As the largest law-enforcement led political organization in the country, Protect America Now is taking up this fight. name: John Fetterman
subject: I am asking you to please donate what you can to the UPMC Solidarity Fund.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
They’ve been our heroes during the pandemic — it’s time they’re treated like it. ✊
#
Hey, it’s John.
I'm emailing you to ask if you'll please [** _kick in any amount at all to UPMC's Solidarity Fund, as UPMC staff go on strike today for fairer wages + working conditions._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37420?t=1&akid=3515%2E434096%2Enl2csZ)
University of Pittsburgh Medical Center, a.k.a. UPMC, is the largest private employer in our entire Commonwealth. And today, their workers are flexing their collective power and exercising their right to strike for the wages and conditions they deserve.
They’ve been our heroes during the pandemic — it’s time they’re treated like it. ✊
[**_Please chip in any amount that makes sense for your budget to support UPMC's Solidarity Fund. I am so proud to stand alongside them._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37420?t=2&akid=3515%2E434096%2Enl2csZ)
Look, Derek: UPMC workers have shown up through all the challenges of the pandemic. Now, they need UPMC to show up for them, too.
If you ask me, these essential workers deserve all of this and MORE:
✅ Livable wages
✅ Affordable healthcare without medical debt
✅ Paid leave
✅ And the right to form a union without interference
Shouldn’t UPMC, the state’s largest charity & private employer worth BILLIONS, make sure none of our health care heroes are struggling to put food on the table? To me, that's a no-brainer. **So I hope you'll join me in supporting UPMC staff walking the picket line right now by**[** _chipping in to the UPMC Solidarity Fund to support them while they're on strike._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37420?t=3&akid=3515%2E434096%2Enl2csZ)
**[Donate to the Solidarity Fund](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37420?t=4&akid=3515%2E434096%2Enl2csZ)**
The union way of life is sacred, and we should *always* protect it here in Pennsylvania and across the country. Thanks for standing with me. 🙏
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211118-3515-footer&t=5&refcode2=3515_434096_nl2csZ&akid=3515%2E434096%2Enl2csZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=3515%2E434096%2Enl2csZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=3515%2E434096%2Enl2csZ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Now, they need UPMC to show up for them, too. If you ask me, these essential workers deserve all of this and MORE: ✅ Livable wages ✅ Affordable healthcare without medical debt ✅ Paid leave ✅ And the right to form a union without interference Shouldn’t UPMC, the state’s largest charity & private employer worth BILLIONS, make sure none of our health care heroes are struggling to put food on the table? To me, that's a no-brainer. So I hope you'll join me in supporting UPMC staff walking the picket line right now by The union way of life is sacred, and we should always protect it here in Pennsylvania and across the country. Thanks for standing with me. 🙏 In solidarity, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

subject: Help us wish the NRA a happy birthday
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

150 years ago yesterday, the NRA was founded.

As Commissioner of Agriculture, Nikki kicked the NRA out of gun permitting and signed on to a lawsuit challenging Florida’s dangerous gun preemption law. She'll continue to take on the NRA and fight for our safety as governor.

Friends, you can bet the NRA will be out in full force attacking Nikki again. Click here to help us wish them a happy birthday by raising $5,000 online before midnight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=nra]

For far too long, the NRA has played far too large a role in Florida’s government and politics.

Let’s wish this dangerous organization a happy birthday by helping make sure they don’t have a friend in the governor’s office anymore.

Click here to chip in now and help us reach our $5,000 midnight goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=nra]

Thanks,

Team Nikki

* **Senator Sinema has obstructed President Biden's agenda for long enough.** She's obstructed his agenda on issues ranging from health care to education, from climate change to immigration, voting rights and more.
* **Sinema has empowered both Mitch McConnell and Republicans at the expense of the rest of us.** Arizonans deserve two U.S. Senators who will fight for their priorities — and we definitely don't deserve a Senator who goes out of their way to prevent progress from happening.
* **Change is possible — but ousting an incumbent Senator is hard work, and it doesn't happen overnight.** When it comes to voter education, outreach, and organizing, it's earlier the better. We're working closely with grassroots organizations on the ground in Arizona who are leading the fight to hold Sinema accountable and helping to lay the foundation for a successful primary challenge.

**[As an early supporter of our Primary Sinema Project, we want to hear more from you — specifically, why you're in this fight with us — to help inform our strategy moving forward in 2022 and beyond. | | [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/3bNqpsBlv/c?w=m2wv6Cwphx7frWez3IBVpRXewMrkLZR0TzCuh-IIoeI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhldHJhZmFsZ2FyZ3JvdXAub3JnL3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDIxLzExL1dBMDMtMjJQcmltYXJ5LU5vdi1Qb2xsLVJlcG9ydC5wZGYiLCJyIjoiYzhmYTJmMWEtZDAyZS00ZmQ2LTYzZWQtNGFmMGIyMjJiYjdkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)

We can't combat the disinformation from the sidelines - so I am taking it head on to directly transmit truth. I implore you to listen in to what I have to say, even if the Lars Larson show isn't your usual fare.

| I want to represent WA-03 to:

name: Team Morgan Harper for Ohio
subject: We’re breaking 👏 it 👏 up 👏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is why Morgan is committed to breaking up Meta.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211118-401-footer-ak&t=2&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)
**You can call it whatever you want Mark Zuckerberg, but Morgan is going 👏 to 👏 break 👏 it 👏 up! 👏**
In case you haven’t heard yet, Facebook is officially changing its name to Meta as they venture into the virtual reality space (_because that’s just what would make this pandemic better right? Virtual reality meetings_).
No matter how many name changes Facebook goes through they can’t erase their dirty laundry. Here’s three key things to know about the Big Tech company that we’ve learned straight from the mouth of whistleblowers:
1️⃣ **Facebook has known about human traffickers using its platform since 2018 but**** _is still_****struggling to crack down on related content.**
2️⃣ **Facebook knows that its platform Instagram has a hugely negative effect on teens but they still target that audience.** Internal Facebook research shows that _1 in 3 teen girls_ say that it makes their body image worse. 17% say that it makes eating issues like anorexia worse.
3️⃣ **Internal documents have shown that Facebook has**** _known_****that its strategies were insufficient to combat the spread of posts calling for violence in countries at risk of violence like Ethiopia.**
**We need folks in Congress who are willing to break up these conglomerates. Morgan is that person.** She’s not afraid to take a stance on tech and regulate it. She’s been pushing back since she worked at the CFPB (Consumer Financial Protection Bureau) and testified in Congress about breaking up Big Tech companies like Facebook.
[**_Can you rush a donation of $5 to send Morgan to the U.S. Senate where she is committed to fighting to protect everyday working folks across the country from Meta’s exploitation?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14729?t=3&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14960?refcode=em20211118-401&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)**
Folks in Ohio are already pushing back against the tech giant for its exploitation of folks in our home state:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14729?t=23&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)
**It’s abundantly clear that Meta and Mark Zuckerberg only care about money. And they’re throwing Ohioans under the bus to get it**** _right now_****.****_[Morgan is proud to fight for her Ohio community but we need your help to send her to the U.S. Senate so she can fight for Ohioans on an even bigger scale. If you’re with her please donate $5 today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14729?t=24&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)_**
Onward,
Team Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14729?t=25&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211118-401-footer&t=26&refcode2=401_90090_NvfVOv&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=401%2E90090%2ENvfVOv)

Fellow American,

You probably don’t keep tabs on the amount of money that Nancy Pelosi and the national Democrats raise each quarter, but I do, and **that’s why I’m writing to you today to sound the alarm.**

Even though the Biden/Pelosi machine is an absolute failure that

* **Stranded American personnel and left military equipment for terrorists**.

* Had federal agents looking into concerned parents at local school board meetings.

* **Disincentivizes work, and made it harder for employers to keep those that DO work**.

* Has no plans to solve the illegal immigration problem

House Democrats are **STILL** outraising House Republicans. Their cash-on-hand advantage gives them the only chance they have of maintaining control of Congress and continuing to force their liberal agenda on the American people.

[** HELP REPUBLICANS LEVEL THE PLAYING FIELD
CHIP IN $10 TODAY->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3b95829a658b45f988085f256cd6587e&_e=hyehb5bB7yTDJKV5SnOdq5uXBW5JSTqvWpaX6cIhSbIfuUGDOU0VJOQvAIPNNorwOz8TTRcTSCdDbsRVDGTsfhuT2OOzP4rRStTVy_ZLdoGv1ZOgQllQmOIUCi16FpJMAQNiE7so9wzW4ArjbdsZeskjBGQO5WN5eLRqThiQ705qVaia0wV3zKlwJCr1xVBvAbPJ49JA6J43NuVgRSH38GXidjJ6pfaLmW-gGdYWHftVlcbSaQLZkFavwF6eqDBATs5jStZI9bVRpBcIwHbbyyS1XCV26Kqw3iTaWfpi7vTSPiryOO5VlDVMWp8wfce7TwAdUqVweMQfI8GMG3hJUzfOZPU-PT1ugFaAKQPRPTA%3D)

**Democrats' $1.5 million fundraising advantage can make the difference between Republican victories like we saw this year in Virginia and New Jersey, or two more years of an unfettered Speaker Pelosi.**

We must work together to overcome this gap, or else face losing very winnable races next year.

I know that we ask for conservatives like you to make a donation often, but the truth is**[we wouldn’t need to ask if we were able to keep pace with what Democrats are raising](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3b95829a658b45f988085f256cd6587e&_e=hyehb5bB7yTDJKV5SnOdq5uXBW5JSTqvWpaX6cIhSbIfuUGDOU0VJOQvAIPNNorwOz8TTRcTSCdDbsRVDGTsfhuT2OOzP4rRStTVy_ZLdoGv1ZOgQllQmOIUCi16FpJMAQNiE7so9wzW4ArjbdsZenXt4SyNTTa2E68jijkqa9IvTQrtFZK8g2n96CmS_FbNEvxw9QuO4iQRpqNgaf8tMkFQ87pSQFKZa_1S93LaOB_c5ZdqS6sdAnXk_6WU7FptvkwiLNrGmYhHjYq7kwkI2pXpJcVwOlblY3JWpZTKAWb-jdOfBib54vH0Y43GxgsnxWkDOlpiTzmGnXLLdQ10nqX594BzC3_k0IWokgLnjMk%3D)**.

If you want unstable gas prices, expensive groceries, illegal immigrants flooding the southern border or for Democrats to bankrupt the country,**then please ignore this email**. If you want to help me and my team do something about the crises Democrats have created over the past 9 months, then **[please chip in $10 or more right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3b95829a658b45f988085f256cd6587e&_e=hyehb5bB7yTDJKV5SnOdq5uXBW5JSTqvWpaX6cIhSbIfuUGDOU0VJOQvAIPNNorwOz8TTRcTSCdDbsRVDGTsfhuT2OOzP4rRStTVy_ZLdoGv1ZOgQllQmOIUCi16FpJMAQNiE7so9wzW4ArjbdsZeqfcLP813ySknbZdZb1V1_Uf2CJeKdslyCaDe6kQ3viqDj9WYL5bkZKvxAmr6HejqgCFIGUc4u6BzAypOES4GrAkxUkol9iEauQyahLrwMen0fQHg2mvqBCJU1Pg6uf1Adusq2HXsE6yKFbj9FfzL36uMhxQkPaDJhxXxIdO8suVDhiToOCJftCNKphsihLHRvK8mWNwYSUKhcbsZwqyyck%3D)**.

We’ve got a country to save,

Their cash-on-hand advantage gives them the only chance they have of maintaining control of Congress and continuing to force their liberal agenda on the American people. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: New Poll: 32% of Americans believe Trump is their President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Turn up the heat! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6791978f23&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark FInchem. I am the Trump-endorsed, Election Integrity, America first candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona. _[With your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c9079094a8&e=44b8c466b0), I WILL be the next Secretary of State in Arizona. [We have the momentum, the grassroots support, and Arizona is desperate for a change.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f061bcbd11&e=44b8c466b0)_

Arizona is the epicenter of what amounts to treasonous fraud which led to Joe Biden’s “Presidency.” Arizona is the epicenter of distrust in the American system under the Democrats.

**A distrust which the Democrats have baked into the fabric of every day America life.**

_Monmouth University released a poll demonstrating this black-and-white._

The headline of their article reads:
_GOP Belief in 2020 election fraud couples with fundamental distrust_
Gee, I wonder why...

This poll digs into one crucial fact. Americans DO NOT TRUST the Democrats. How could they? Every time the clock strikes 3 AM, they call in their nightly “miracle” to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. _It happened in 2020. It happened again in New Jersey._

Let’s look at a few key data points.

_“Fewer than half of all Americans believe the American system is ‘basically sound.’”_

Don’t get it twisted. “Sound” doesn’t meant competent or they agree with it. It simply means that there are basic processes in place which the government is capable of executing.

**Americans right now don’t even believe that!**

But let’s look at what the Liberal propagator of this poll had to say:

_“The increase of distrust in the American system appears to be linked to the persistence of ‘the big lie.’ The fact that this belief continues to get oxygen is having a serious, and potentially dangerous, impact on faith in our fundamental democratic processes,” – Patrick Murray, director of Monmouth University Polling Institute_

So, let’s get this right. Patrick Murray thinks the belief that there was fraud is a reason that people don’t trust the government. Well, he’s right about that. But he is categorically wrong if he thinks that nothing shady happened in 2020.

**In fact,_according to his own poll_ , 32% of those polled believe that Biden is President _only_ due to Fraud. A number likely much higher given Republicans notorious disdain for pollsters (who can blame them?)**

And this is the heart of the Left. One man thinking that 32% of Americans wrong when they claim fraud.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a4230bb524&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **In court, sometimes all it takes is one good witness and enough evidence to convict.**

_We have countless witnesses, in countless states, with piles of evidence, with 32% of Americans seeing the fraud, and that is still not enough for the Liberals!_

**Talk about double standards...but this is Democracy at stake.**

Many of us have probably said to our children or have heard it said “if everyone jumps off a bridge would you do it?”

**Well for liberals like Patrick, this analogy is more apt:**

_If you see that the building is on fire, and everyone is saying the building is on fire, and you see the smoke, and everyone is leaving the building, why would you stay there?_

In this particular instance, the answer would probably be “I don’t like Trump, so I will just choose to disbelieve the evidence.”

**Folks, we see the smoke, we know there’s a fire, and tens of millions of Americans know that the Biden Presidency is not legitimate.**

_So, to the pollsters over at Monmouth I ask this: What did you expect?_

If you agree that President Trump should be our President, and we are witnessing the Fraud of a lifetime, I need your help to root it out. Right now, I am pushing for a critical Audit of Pima County, while developing high-security techniques in partnership with currency-grade authentication firms to protect our elections.

Fellow American - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it.

All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans.

I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6db5b66cb51a489bb87f379bcc1fd2c7&_e=nvl9vPQVDQfeVTLdRhgQRWCLkQoev0rswmObXbeCorgD5kgInRrh0G318b284MaVgWK8A2Sb54_G2MaTFEHDs6zmm81PV57njSh7kp265-pVJmWfhkTyLM9yeu-DGYH3ZOsXxSYQtRsbbl2tkHI8kRSPDceGoGcdQO9xW1QFTs-SGj07LLGbhb8EBqfSLBfp5pTnbsTzLhN_4nufJefxyK9y53JeHhr-xrS3ARBumxVjtWxNrd-VpH_DoVQ6r3vzouunUE_JzE_JDTE3HmZVvNuubZr4hGxkHZGieC_UUMfpQW14x65vaqWhT5jyKioXR9buVi6zzLe7kZqNauzbWB96DWwTFRkyTOYnwnI1XdjjQpTCfo_2lpuqE5Q7iaqsywDwknNvxrR7cH7Irkq8pyLa0SlVif4nb70cKLTDPf871YV0J44B7i9xRQLtZW8UC2fXgqqyt-GQjZQzAgIkfA%3D%3D)
Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump.

President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - _a mentor, a confidante, and a friend._

Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run.

Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation.
