subject: Following a Strategy Devised by AG Candidate Nathan Hochman and Victims Advocates, 10 District Attorneys Adopt Policy to Combat the Spread of Fentanyl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
"Alexandra Notices" aim to combat the continuing spread of Fentanyl by getting repeat offenders off the streets. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/fentanyl-update?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/fentanyl-update?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/fentanyl-update?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/fentanyl-update?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/fentanyl-update?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
November 18th, 2021
---
Contact:
Press@NathanHochman.com
---
| **Following a Strategy Devised by California Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman and Victims Advocates, Ten District Attorneys Adopt Policy to Combat the Spread of Fentanyl**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA** – Following a statewide push for reform led by victims’ advocates and a strategy devised by candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, District Attorneys from Butte, Contra Costa, El Dorado, Kings, Napa, Orange, Riverside, San Bernadino, San Luis Obispo, and Yolo counties have implemented "Alexandra Notices" aimed at reducing the recidivism rates of fentanyl dealers. Fentanyl poisonings represent one of the leading killers of Californians and Americans, reaching over 100,000 deaths in last year alone.

The policy advocated by Hochman and implemented by the 10 District Attorneys involves giving an “Alexandra notice” to convicted fentanyl drug dealers, forcing them to acknowledge that the manufacture and distribution of fentanyl is “extremely dangerous to human life,” and if in the future someone dies as a result of their continued actions, they can be charged with voluntary manslaughter or murder. This is similar to the notice currently given to convicted drunk drivers that if they get convicted of drunk driving and someone dies, they may be charged with murder.

Matt Capelouto, whose daughter Alexandra died from fentanyl poisoning, stated: _“After the State legislature failed to pass “Alexandra’s law,” a law named after my daughter Alexandra who tragically died from fentanyl poisoning, I met Nathan Hochman. As a former prosecutor Nathan came up with a strategy to reach out directly to all 58 District Attorneys throughout California to see if they would implement an “Alexandra” notice. This out-of-the-box strategy has worked, and I am proud to say that over 10 District Attorneys to date have agreed to provide these admonishments. Through Nathan’s efforts, lives will be saved. I commend him highly for his commitment to confronting the scourge of fentanyl in our state and finding solutions to address it.”_

In June 2021, Hochman sent a letter to each District Attorney in each of the 58 counties in California asking for the policy change at the county level and providing additional information about the issue.

_“In spite of Sacramento's failure to address this issue, we are working hard with District Attorneys and advocates to bring solutions to this tragic issue." _Hochman added. _"The District Attorneys have the power to act, and the time to act is now. We must get fentanyl off the streets and utilizing 'Alexandra notices' to prevent repeat offenders is a great way to start. The goal is for a first-time fentanyl dealer to never become a second-time fentanyl dealer, which will save lives.”_

Fentanyl is 50 times more powerful than heroin and 100 times more powerful than morphine. As little as two milligrams (or two grains of rice) can kill within two minutes, and there are 5,000 milligrams in a teaspoon of fentanyl. Fentanyl is responsible for over half of the drug overdose deaths in California which equates to over a thousand child deaths a year. In most circumstances, drug dealers hide lethal doses of fentanyl inside counterfeit and fake Oxycodone, Percocet, Adderall, and Xanax pills (“fentapills”) or mix it with traditional hard street drugs such as heroin or cocaine, and even marijuana products, to increase their profits per drug sale.

Nathan Hochman has served as a prosecutor, defense attorney, victim rights advocate, and was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate in 2008 as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. Nathan also served as President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission . Nathan is running as a Republican for Attorney General of California in 2022 and has made addressing fentanyl and the drug epidemic a major campaign priority. On social media, Nathan has posted a series of [videos](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=6c02a01cdf&e=94837ebab3) on the fentanyl epidemic that have received over 500,000 views.

To learn more about Nathan's efforts on fentanyl, visit: [NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5faff20522&e=94837ebab3)[/Fentanyl](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=7339e475b5&e=94837ebab3) or follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=ad75ecd02b&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=60e687b40b&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=72afe0ad07&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=7d6cde1d1e&e=94837ebab3). ###

Team -- The last time electoral maps were redrawn, Republicans pulled off what the _New York Times_ called **“the most audacious political heist of modern times.”**

_And now they’re at it again._

New district maps, which could determine the balance of Congress, are being redrawn this year after the 2020 census, and Republican legislators across the country are doing everything they can to rig those districts in their favor for **YEARS** to come.

With our political future at stake, Democratic strategists need to know where you stand before it’s too late to stop the GOP’s power grab. **We’ve set a goal of 10,000 responses before midnight, and right now we’re 7.8% behind our goal! Please tell us:**

**Live Poll -- Deadline: MIDNIGHT****Should gerrymandering be BANNED?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5165?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211118-UrgentUpdate-BanGerrymandering-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211118-UrgentUpdate-BanGerrymandering-ETG-sl1&akid=1969%2E9716520%2EzAcAMT)

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: We can’t let this continue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we can’t
let this continue.

President Biden’s Build Better Act started out as a $3.5 trillion
resolution that would deliver meaningful investments in health care,
climate action, childcare, housing, and working families.

But because some conservative Democrats and every Republican Senator are
working under the influence of Big Pharma and the fossil fuel industry —
life-changing policies are being stripped from the final bill, and our
future hangs in the balance.

So now we have to make a choice:

* We allow corrupt politicians like Rand Paul to continue to stand in
the way of progress.
* Or we elect a leader who will proudly fight for the change working
people need in our country.

What’s happening right now is an urgent reminder why we must expand our
Senate majority and send more champions for working people like Charles
Booker to the Capitol. To do that, we need to make sure Charles has the
community support he needs to take on Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13225?refcode=em20211118-1243&t=1020&akid=1243%2E346206%2Eryc3zA ]Can you rush a
$5 contribution so we can elect Charles and expand our
Senate majority? Every dollar helps build this movement that will end the
filibuster and fight proudly for people-first priorities.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13225?refcode=em20211118-1243&t=1021&akid=1243%2E346206%2Eryc3zA ]Contribute $5

The struggles that working families in Kentucky and communities
like Cresco are immense. We deserve bold, meaningful solutions
that match the scale of challenges we currently face. We deserve a
Kentucky New Deal.

With this next election, we have the power to come together and finally
elect someone who will fight for us. That’s why Charles is in this race —
because he knows exactly what it feels like to be abandoned by our
politicians.

Charles knows what it’s like to choose between paying rent and refilling a
prescription.

Charles knows what it’s like to be homeless — to watch his mother skip
meals so that he had enough food on his plate.

And Charles knows that he’s not the only one who’s gone through these
challenges. Kentuckians have been suffering for decades. Not because we’re
lazy, not because we don’t want a better life for our children. Because
our politicians aren’t willing to fight for us.

Not anymore.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13225?refcode=em20211118-1243&t=1022&akid=1243%2E346206%2Eryc3zA ]Your contribution today will help build our powerful, grassroots
movement to take back Kentucky’s seat at the table and write a new kind of
politics that works for all of us — can we count on you to chip in today?

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211118-1243-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1243_346206_ryc3zA&akid=1243%2E346206%2Eryc3zA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1243%2E346206%2Eryc3zA

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

The pharmaceutical industry’s chief lobbying arm, PhRMA, has spent nearly $23 million on lobbying against efforts to lower drug prices in just the first nine months this year, putting the lobbying giant on track to beat its 2019 spending record of $29.3 million. Meanwhile, millions of diabetic Americans are forced to ration their insulin because it is too expensive.
**Americans across the board overwhelmingly support lowering prescription drug costs -- it’s no wonder Big Pharma is shaking in their boots.**
As an allied healthcare professional, Melanie knows that healthcare is a human right.
That’s why she supports the Build Back Better Act, which includes a $35 cap on the price of insulin, and allows Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices. And she’s rejecting lobbyist money -- _especially_ from Big Pharma.
**[Stand with Melanie and sign the petition: stand up to Big Pharma greed! clean_body: | | | The pharmaceutical industry has been on a months-long lobbying and advertising blitz to save their own profits and kill the Democratic proposal to lower prescription drug prices. The pharmaceutical industry’s chief lobbying arm, PhRMA, has spent nearly $23 million on lobbying against efforts to lower drug prices in just the first nine months this year, putting the lobbying giant on track to beat its 2019 spending record of $29.3 million. Meanwhile, millions of diabetic Americans are forced to ration their insulin because it is too expensive. Americans across the board overwhelmingly support lowering prescription drug costs -- it’s no wonder Big Pharma is shaking in their boots. As an allied healthcare professional, Melanie knows that healthcare is a human right. That’s why she supports the Build Back Better Act, which includes a $35 cap on the price of insulin, and allows Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices. And she’s rejecting lobbyist money -- especially from Big Pharma. Thanks for taking action. \-- D’Arrigo for Congress | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. clean_body: He’s shoving it in the face of every American... | | | Peter ーAndrew here. It’s bad enough that Biden has created the worst economic conditions in DECADES, but now he’s shoving it in the face of every American. Some reports have the supply chain crisis lasting until 2023! Biden’s nominee Saule Omarova admitted to wanting to bankrupt companies! Gas prices are showing no sign of going down! Biden is bankrupting the middle-class ,bankrupting our country , and bankrupting our children’s future ! Peter, we can’t let this economic attack on Americans continueーit’s time to fight back by taking of government out of Biden’s hands once again. Thank you, Andrew Garbarino \---------- forwarded message below ---------- | Hi Peter, We don’t know why they let Biden around a microphone anymore, but here he is, MOCKING that Americans are paying high gas prices. 👇👇👇 He CANCELLED construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline He has killed THOUSANDS of jobs in the energy industry He has committed to AOC’s SOCIALIST Green New Deal Now he’s acting like he has no idea why gas prices are rising... Andrew doesn’t find this funny and neither do the people of our district. **Have you heard that failed presidential candidate Beto O 'Rourke is running to be governor of Texas?**

Now I know what you're thinking: this guy must just LOVE losing elections. But here's the thing, the Radical Left is serious about turning Texas blue, and they are ready to spend BIG TIME trying to flip this governor's seat.

Now I know what you're thinking: this guy must just LOVE losing elections. But here's the thing, the Radical Left is serious about turning Texas blue, and they are ready to spend BIG TIME trying to flip this governor's seat. | | | "KEEP TEXAS RED" Beto has already raised over $5 million dollars, and it's only been 24 hours since he announced! This is shaping up to be a real battle, but I know our grassroots movement is ready for the fight. And if we all work together, I am confident we can keep Texas red. "It is essential that we keep Texas Red. After what happened in Georgia, we can’t take anything for granted. That's why I’m reaching out today to personally ask you to join us as we fight to keep Texas red>>> " | | | KEEP TEXAS RED FUND | | 5X MATCHING ACTIVATED | | | "CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT" MATCHING OFFER EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT | | | "KEEP TEXAS RED" "Because this is so urgent I have been assured that all donations given tonight will be 5X matched by a top GOP donor. So please step up today and help defend Texas from the Radical Left. " Because Democrats are banking on us getting complacent, but I won't let that happen! Every Conservative must step up and defend what is ours or we risk losing it all. "So Friend, can you chip in and help me KEEP TEXAS RED?" name: Mike Franken
subject: the next Fox News “scandal” in the making
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDM-EBQfsbGG-s9DaLmbUEihpOkig6mNguK8yZijudTPis4F4Mj8IH3nnr6OeImF8tMAs0CyzkY1kT5Ibz-xHNlRjU2B2mHOaE7LEbUlT6W9zeht4DOu0r2N_tQWnaxS0-LzdXc1WZh5OaX-BKHXnnBYQQCyCrSig_C-RJfgTXr8T6bRu20epHoGb1N20rEXO5JDVU4hZBYMneB7nkdWKHN4XqyVCB7eQqLnkbOr60dFzE9n0v58cZYmE6Vp7OqkVMg/3h4/rRs-qhlTQxeIQkBzKbBvJA/h0/cnrSk4Y_l7Ao3RpocdZwH-mvzn7Gd1q6hMjd7PyWCUQ)

Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, this past week, the first tracker of the campaign began showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**
And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley next year!
**I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $9,000 before midnight tonight if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still short.**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford before midnight tonight to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHGh5pDBuisfHqOE_u1lIliFd-NDHBeig2egFDJ8Lm1Rqof3JeyvsxpID5MmggOxrx9r-1DKSnrEdGY_Vpx55J3vdAnFVghzxaqSaSAVyzH1TuqZfy8XuyOK1L4XlrpdNetB_a34Yn3LobR4eydtPhQMmPKPopI4HVVDYjWRbcjcSgOSgGkMyLKyinPDLH7ijmr2tirW8EN9JZxiN3dYAPAKIImGM-JsFUqCjrnXKlXhDy16XHvxZO0JzhBBN55YGcpVPxby1BdRfTrANTJbCuhAl0TgaSff-xdo3Q0yvvzWpekbVPJltsZQTlyKUKbsyksl8bPsMQCH6hRLxslB9thw/3h4/rRs-qhlTQxeIQkBzKbBvJA/h1/sl870Sky8LbIxAZt7SSTXrHSR_mbQuJbH-bhO-EzvRk)

name: Governor Steve Sisolak
subject: An update on redistricting in Battleground Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi folks, I just had the honor of signing into law two redistricting bills that reflect the growing diversity of Nevada. After a thoughtful and productive session with the Nevada Legislature, we emerged with new district maps that are fair and promote equality. As Nevada continues to grow in diversity, it is our responsibility to accurately reflect these changes. These new maps are the result of 10 years' worth of growth in our state. We will continue to support our growing diversity by providing meaningful representation to everyone. As we look to the future of Nevada, we will continue to listen to feedback from the public on how we may best serve their needs. I would like to thank everyone involved in this process and hope that we may continue to accurately celebrate the diversity and growth of Nevada. Sincerely, Steve Sisolak **[P.S. clean_body: | | | | | Hi folks, I just had the honor of signing into law two redistricting bills that reflect the growing diversity of Nevada. After a thoughtful and productive session with the Nevada Legislature, we emerged with new district maps that are fair and promote equality. As Nevada continues to grow in diversity, it is our responsibility to accurately reflect these changes. These new maps are the result of 10 years' worth of growth in our state. We will continue to support our growing diversity by providing meaningful representation to everyone. As we look to the future of Nevada, we will continue to listen to feedback from the public on how we may best serve their needs. I would like to thank everyone involved in this process and hope that we may continue to accurately celebrate the diversity and growth of Nevada. Sincerely, Steve Sisolak | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. subject: Sharing our new polling numbers against Ron Johnson (please read)

body:
We are leading Ron Johnson by two points in a new poll of Wisconsin’s Senate race. Here’s what these numbers mean for our campaign: **A new poll released by _Public Policy Polling_ has us leading Republican Senator Ron Johnson by two points: 48%–46%. Let me explain what this means for our campaign.**

The top-rated pollster from Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ found that Wisconsin Democrats strongly prefer a candidate who can beat Ron Johnson (81%). They also believe we have the best chance to defeat him (+7). And right now, we are the only Democratic campaign polling ahead of him.

That says a lot about the movement we have built so far to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat from red to blue. It’s clear our hard work is paying off, but we cannot afford to slow down now. Not when we have the momentum in this race.

Look, this Senate seat is up for grabs — and the latest poll proves what we've been saying all along: Our campaign has the best shot to defeat Ron Johnson and expand our majority. But I need your support right away to grow and sustain this momentum, especially as we head into the final weeks of the year.

**Can you help us capitalize on this new poll by chipping in any amount that is meaningful to you? Ours is a campaign built on momentum, and right now, we have it. We cannot afford to waste it — not in a race this close. When I first ran for public office, it wasn't for fame, money, or power — it was because politicians like Scott Walker slammed the door on workers and families. I believed Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, not bending to the will of wealthy donors and corporate interests.

That's why I'm running for U.S. Senate, and as Wisconsin’s next Senator, I'll fight for a $15 minimum wage, good-paying union jobs, a real strategy to tackle climate change, voting rights, reproductive freedom, and universal health care for everyone. If we need to get rid of the filibuster to get it all done, then I'll fight for that too.

**[This will be one of the most closely watched Senate races in the country, and it will be one of the most expensive. But I’m confident we can take on Ron Johnson to flip this seat blue. Can I count on your support to help fuel our grassroots campaign for the long haul?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38776238/317022833/1201999653?refcode=em21_211118_Poll2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211118_Poll2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDI0M2QxZi1lNjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q0WcVwhNYIZpBOl2GdtH0ACF_6YQmtwkgtYCBqY-1jY=)**

Thank you for anything you’re able to give. The response to these emails is always great, and it’s something I rely on each time I reach out. I’m so grateful to know you’re a part of our growing team of supporters, and I hope you take a moment to enjoy this great news for our campaign — because it proves that if we’re doing all the hard work we know has to be done, we will defeat Ron Johnson.

Forward.

— Sarah Godlewski

P.S. There’s a reason the Republicans have already started lobbying cheap shots at our campaign. It’s because they see the same polling numbers we do showing us in the lead. **[Donate now to help us return this U.S. Senate seat to the people of Wisconsin once and for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38776239/317022834/1201999653?refcode=em21_211118_Poll2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211118_Poll2_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDI0M2QxZi1lNjQ4LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q0WcVwhNYIZpBOl2GdtH0ACF_6YQmtwkgtYCBqY-1jY=)**

## The #FakeNews Is Losing Their Minds...
---
Last night on a Livestream there was a couple of things I said that totally triggered the #FakeNews and Liberals across Social Media. 1\. I said that "Anthony Fauci is a mass-murder and Kyle Rittenhouse is a hero." This is completely true and I will say it AGAIN!
2\. I said that COVID19 is treatable with "Ivermectin, Hydroxychloroquine & Budesonide." This comment caused YouTube to take down my video.

subject: UPDATE: The Border is in CRISIS.

body:
The Albuquerque Journal reported this week what we have known for quite some time – we have an absolute crisis at the border. It’s a crisis created by Peter, The _Albuquerque Journal_ reported this week what we have known for quite some time –**we have an absolute crisis at the border**. It’s a crisis created by the terrible policies of President Biden and Governor Michelle Lujan-Grisham. The Journal reported that Sunland Park is being overwhelmed by illegal immigrants and human smugglers. _“It’s every day, during the day and during the night. Even at midnight and after midnight, you can see a lot of people crossing, sometimes 20 to 30 at a time,” said Jose Hernandez, a resident of Sunland Park._ _(ABQ Journal; Nov 14, 2021)_ The reason liberal politicians like Joe Biden and Michelle Lujan Grisham continue to pursue such dangerous and wildly unpopular policies is because they don’t believe voters will ever learn the truth. Articles like we saw this week in the _Journal_ are few and far between. **[That’s why I need your help today. **President Biden has completely opened the border and Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is making it worse.** According to Customs and Border Protection, we have already seen an almost 300% increase in border crossings in our sector with 176,000 migrant encounters just this year. To put that in perspective, that’s roughly the equivalent of the population of Rio Rancho and Las Cruces crossing the border. This is a crisis calling out for leadership, but our Governor has instead chosen to side with the Far Left. One of the first acts of her Administration was to remove the National Guard from the border. Then she pushed to make New Mexico a sanctuary state. **And once she got her hands on COVID funds, she and the legislature gave stimulus checks to illegal immigrants!** Voters have a right to know the truth about these issues. That’s why I hope you will contribute to my campaign today by clicking here. Here’s what I will do about it. I will fight to secure our borders by ending her sanctuary state policies, using the National Guard to assist border patrol like they are doing in Texas and Arizona, and partner with our border governors to take strong action. **_If President Biden won’t lead, I will!_** **[But we can only make these critical changes if we win this election. Please contribute to my campaign today so we will have the resources necessary to communicate our message to voters across the state.](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=fa23e2a3861c4500ba8614ceb5c20a46&_e=FEtb14Qqy7i9bVuOmNVKy86kjwcVVE38UTBd6wWsUcDCI-tS9ppVjq888ZVI2MlyJpZs0Z_Na30kWkIIPvzLawSyvpUXqipX9q7b8X1DSCIHTTA-JApvWd8RTjx5eOQNtsCS6tCG4Zd1bj-6Xb0MBD6uaWa19r1QMlQ9bzai9lXPPAQpWdrhaQFCFJ-XBm92XBIitUu3M--T4fgQ6tzZnM-xRy03lnBkbZQvQjtf50bpUnzkWFziedbO2Wy8FqOTb3uUhbAFUVSpr3yLc8RBlZ3KFDWy_21BkPZKV9mm-eFj4GKuaT11L7Dc-7qoiaFmdVJJ-sdrabHtiyEjbX7kD0OWizMh8hCvJo1Ns6NPSEBt2_Pw3eyx8PfxTKiqJzWP_ai5HRlRKidfK9GHenZ2KkHTpJHuI2ViSWGutHVSWvEuqu5Om7GjAuZcR584OMc4Gdcks5yFd5vfKGd6lIMJsrFwf9pdTtI7cWtympg9vD_ej2tkwZY3fzHsEvvDymbAdiZAev5PwweFRfloVzIXgg%3D%3D)** With your help, we will win this race and get right to work securing our border. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Mark Ronchetti | |

body:
| | | Team, **I don’t have a typical background for a politician.** My dad was murdered while my mom was pregnant with me. I was taken to a juvenile detention facility instead of being given the support I needed after my aunt died in the 9/11 terrorist attacks. I wasn’t always interested in politics because I didn’t see any politicians speaking about issues that were important to my community. No one was knocking my door or calling my phone. Over the past few years I’ve seen politicians run for office who are ordinary people. People like AOC and Cori Bush. They taught me that we can speak truth to power — and we can win. **[_Can you make a $1 contribution to Mckayla’s campaign for Congress before Friday’s deadline? Your grassroots donation means so much to our campaign._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t22q-n1o_CURxvBjalHxxdalI4dwkSpfwlbiNVU-JS4lua1yCQci7WOLp6vs7CeELojDGvZJJDDl_9HfDpdq12_P0RPD3pkIUAezmnUKlKCAHEgArXnXS2ofVqw1r93yK2BXaIv78zTuVtOeiqVZnriEdWG9V_r_2eora8vVnX-MMLUv6HZiicKxDlVwMt2t2TmR0vV7pzEP7hADtsmevmAkkHvqfyxg8fBN-Yl8ijpHVarJ37HRqbs5wnCMIPNl9YEACXJTqveLXSaKMZlou_S90LN7vRhIZXiWe0Kv4358DFYvSv0IgQ-xWbP6kgylr7rSyQu6qPoWaYs0sRxQn4vw/3h4/sx_NdcAnRzGrHE9X8bczJA/h0/sIeAXz5B06-Br1xgpdUtriYtW63-5hPOSGp9qV5A-GE)** What we have at stake is providing affordable housing, jobs with liveable wages, a Green New Deal and criminal justice reform. We’re going up against someone powerful. Someone who is backed by the machine. We have to show them that we have the people. Those who have been affected by legislation and who are closest to the pain. _That’s_ who runs this movement. It’s us. It’s you, it’s me. And that’s what inspires me every day. When I see people from all walks of life chipping in to our movement, it gives _me_ hope. **I know a few dollars here and there might not be much for some of you. It might be a lot for others. But every person who donates shows the strength of our movement and makes it clear to me that we can — and we will — win.** **[_So will you donate now? Peter - If you're like me, you're probably tired of it.

All day long, all we hear about is what divides us: black vs. white, rich vs. poor, urban vs. rural, Trump states vs. Biden states. It's clear to me - and I hope it's clear to you - that the professional politicians and the mainstream media have one goal in mind: pitting Americans against Americans.

I don't believe in that garbage because it's a lie. These are the United States of America. As soon as we remember that and start working together, there's nothing we cannot accomplish or overcome.

[**Join Team Herschel ->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f4c73894d1714d308d455d21ccd80bf2&_e=nsDy16NnPEPAUFdsyg9-WZiK-t0CGsCL_nbdYH6eV0lbztAKU5DibLnqc97Bvll85pYVLBT8VyG_aGZJbWH_u3nnIo7CKRGLnAPC-xQVy0kcbmgahQpWNKu7NCzzyppKv1t8KujL6Vu2NzUppMmqrvItF3QSSjScYzbwUF6mPthb6mEe4Vs036vwuvGuaqWowUeqlfYh5VbCDUJxlTUEDqJ2Lc4Q6icqPqiRzIjl6JYZMjv_cHo1U-lIEXwHCrxQ9BqqlgkNZ3N-48o1mN0WF1fAJ8VvdsHoGrppsrRQB7JuVcWJiAmQ3PEum1ftdPpAWoXyQHv-9ksyX7OLs6Qmf7HHk_oZ16RB5do-Dgxn5s_qJIztcdo3VHdOLz07wPebIki8AiZITWmu6ZvNaI1Nb2ZWTSbioqPNrTspoGsFvTolvNZmi2zIm5WG9MR7xpN2mh5fNeBSHoYD0kETjg4iQA%3D%3D)
Since playing football in the NFL and for the University of Georgia, I've been a successful businessman, starting and managing multiple businesses responsible for hundreds of jobs. I've also been actively supporting the kind of conservative candidates who I believe put our country first. One of those candidates is my good friend, President Donald J. Trump.

President Trump was one of my first bosses in the 1980's when he owned the New Jersey Generals in the USFL. Throughout the last four decades, he's been so much more than that - _a mentor, a confidante, and a friend._

Before I decided to throw my hat in the ring for United States Senate, President Trump and numerous other people encouraged me to run.

Winning this Senate seat won't be an easy task, but I've never been afraid of hard work. Our far-left leaning Democrat Senator has already built a massive $17 million campaign war chest, funded by Democrats from across the nation.

Friend,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

clean_body: Our race is now a "toss-up." This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate! | ☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜ Lean Democratic → Toss-Up Friend, BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in. Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic." If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message. In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters. Take a look for yourself: I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up. While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column. Therefore, we must increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game. While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schmitt for Congress
body:
I am pleased to announce that...

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=6ea5718bf2b24724adc61733b90fc9a9&_e=WkJ-LLfIeI0iHYCVjPAiFMKul9UnuT-yh52EojhLOlRzIhCtMoBRr9fOxQjCVB_cwq3ECSihPfsj94JuBH-u_Tj-exWVUA9W2Wd4RDxX1GSq240aNi8DEzRTyN8VwynSXEKonWgTE3gKPjWe_YbI8uqDGsVEbkn8PemxDZ2U69vswlKj2ZPqZuOfSFdtGbwYr3ktjINYYlKprE_ATweymDIB3Pnu-_hx1noyueCb_ubI35rfg252O-OgSTpErZNXCvbw6X_zX79mW6YNO6eMJ9YoLSFYuIIJmXyvCq5L_B7DW_X34WyQ_CKytwLxnf151R37ovZStc5haB1-fyZ1hOVjc2-U9yP9s20Gi-_EKibu88pzos1FnfI72ibEvB_A1nEqIh--Gn_HmZKgsgOQ9akxkVCNX_NO2quK0gLuO0PPNWs8wPfbv-xBLImGYMw103SOBabDL4WRWWwQkcF5fz32dAEdO_cKfBXigFId3tZxZlC94mbi7PT9spP1Jdib)

Friends,

I am pleased to announce my endorsement of my friend and future Congressman, Assemblyman Colin Schmitt. Colin has proven himself to be a man of integrity, honor, service to the community, and will be an excellent addition to the Halls of Congress.

Colin will be a full-time fighter for his constituents, not a spokesman for the failed Biden-Pelosi agenda. Hudson Valley families deserve better from their federal representatives. They deserve a leader like Colin Schmitt.

Colin Schmitt will be their voice and fight for them in Washington. **[I look forward to working with Assemblyman Schmitt to ensure his victory in 2022 and am confident that the residents of the 18th Congressional district will join me in supporting him.](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=6ea5718bf2b24724adc61733b90fc9a9&_e=WkJ-LLfIeI0iHYCVjPAiFMKul9UnuT-yh52EojhLOlRzIhCtMoBRr9fOxQjCVB_cwq3ECSihPfsj94JuBH-u_Tj-exWVUA9W2Wd4RDxX1GSq240aNi8DEzRTyN8VwynSXEKonWgTE3gKPjWe_YbI8uqDGsVEbkn8PemxDZ2U69vswlKj2ZPqZuOfSFdtGbwYr3ktjINYYlKprE_ATweymDIB3Pnu-_hx1noyueCb_ubI35rfg252O-OgSTpErZNXCvbw6X_zX79mW6YNO6eMJ9YoLSFYuIIJmXyvCq5L_B7xzDAgdmoO-UTzRxwpg2JZ7kfrjKG67PEW6FCpi3ir4kyIYZyBigZq1M3DuPJCqwc4R8DJ9g7U5HJb_0Sy8XJ_FmPPazymEs6Z7xd7gyaPwGnYzbhf94Ik74SwEigE2lgd041ODeN_2hoomLM4E63FcBTlxICDFN-brhnklJeqUdFPqeTKL90R0a5ZjZJljqA-e3THifrxhXWKAR5t4eUP) **
| [**SUPPORT COLIN SCHMITT FOR CONGRESS**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=6ea5718bf2b24724adc61733b90fc9a9&_e=WkJ-LLfIeI0iHYCVjPAiFMKul9UnuT-yh52EojhLOlRzIhCtMoBRr9fOxQjCVB_cwq3ECSihPfsj94JuBH-u_Tj-exWVUA9W2Wd4RDxX1GSq240aNi8DEzRTyN8VwynSXEKonWgTE3gKPjWe_YbI8uqDGsVEbkn8PemxDZ2U69vswlKj2ZPqZuOfSFdtGbwYr3ktjINYYlKprE_ATweymDIB3Pnu-_hx1noyueCb_ubI35rfg252O-OgSTpErZNXCvbw6X_zX79mW6YNO6eMJ9YoLSFYuIIJmXyvCq5L_B7tqg7Y5Mm6PqnVgQgOHjNGLsJf0pD8kLRfLfP_4RXJMZhK3foq4cy1ci2TM-OicfCABHoLVPwgxidpF1EHe5je0gJwrKaV2F21Cplq6InwI-Z4ecJXnTjVzGI8G7lg6ursc57PxQk-bF81qBu3Ze_xTQYF-XTVx9ZvSHkmpuzfK9GVvbvYVAIPuSQNmO0LtGp8FbSQdFTtLDMOx07MLDrO)
